# November Meeting and Christmas Party
---
---
|
---
# News
Heads up, our normal meeting space in El Segundo

is not available because of an event. We will be meeting 6:30 PM 20620 Leapwood Ave, Suite G, Carson, CA.
This month we will be talking about our upcoming Christmas party and electing our pics for Republican of the year.
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## Christmas Party
---
Tuesday December 12th we will be celebrating the Christmas Holliday and also will be awarding our Republican of the year award. We will be holding the event at Rock & Brews in Redondo Beach (Torrance address). This will be a great time, don't miss out.
---

---
| | Patriot,

---
Crooked Joe Biden’s Department of Justice will put me – _his leading opponent_ – on trial the day before Super Tuesday (when I am likely to be named the presumptive presidential nominee). It will be an unprecedented moment in American history.
---
I firmly believe that the people of our country have a _RIGHT_ to see what takes place in that courtroom – which is why it should be televised for voters to see for themselves.
---
_**If there’s no wrongdoing, if everything is honest and fair, then there should be nothing to hide from the public, right?**_
---
_But the Biden-appointed Special Counsel is trying to keep cameras out of the courtroom._
---
_It really makes you think..._
---
In fact, the Special Counsel specifically fears that I will call the trial a “political witch hunt” on camera.

---
To not allow voters to see what takes place in the courtroom 24 hours before the most important day of voting in the primary would be a clear act of Election Interference.

---
**That’s why I’m asking you to peacefully demand transparency by signing my petition for cameras in the courtroom.**
---

It’s because of grassroots supporters like YOU that we’ve been able to consistently call out the Fake News media EVERY SINGLE TIME they try to spread misinformation or outright LIES about the important work President Trump is doing to SAVE AMERICA. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=d1bbaaf3c4174077a1909293848cdc38&_t=nPGqQk9-mF7AGe3GwQYNiOdASIlI5GhH7Jc5PFJjL_6ZQ7XaHaZtkidST5Nq6WA_vvfvBFWKiH277VixLGxBfcqPnCQX3qRmFXcCBFIoK60%3D)

clean_body: My Urgent Petition:| | | | | Patriot, Crooked Joe Biden’s Department of Justice will put me – his leading opponent – on trial the day before Super Tuesday (when I am likely to be named the presumptive presidential nominee). It will be an unprecedented moment in American history. I firmly believe that the people of our country have a RIGHT to see what takes place in that courtroom – which is why it should be televised for voters to see for themselves. If there’s no wrongdoing, if everything is honest and fair, then there should be nothing to hide from the public, right? But the Biden-appointed Special Counsel is trying to keep cameras out of the courtroom. It really makes you think... In fact, the Special Counsel specifically fears that I will call the trial a “political witch hunt” on camera. To not allow voters to see what takes place in the courtroom 24 hours before the most important day of voting in the primary would be a clear act of Election Interference. That’s why I’m asking you to peacefully demand transparency by signing my petition for cameras in the courtroom. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Roger needs your input... On November 1st Roger introduced legislation to halt immigration functions at our southern border until the Department of Homeland Security can ensure that ZERO** individuals on the terrorist watchlist are able to enter our country. Democrats are fighting this legislation -**I need your input to get this passed Peter. DO YOU SUPPORT LEGISLATION TO STOP IMMIGRATION FUNCTIONS UNTIL DHS CAN ENSURE THAT ZERO INDIVIDUALS ON THE TERRORIST WATCHLIST ARE ABLE TO ENTER? | | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: Unwavering
body:
Unwavering support for Israel's right to defend itself. | Peter, I am proud to announce that the House of Representatives has recently passed H.R. 6126, the Israel Security Supplemental Appropriations Act, a critical measure...
[](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xyddjjl-dytjdljkkt-r/) Peter, I am proud to announce that the House of Representatives has recently passed H.R. 6126, the Israel Security Supplemental Appropriations Act, a critical measure that I co-sponsored.This landmark legislation provides $14.3 billion in military assistance to Israel, reinforcing our commitment to this key ally amid ongoing existential threats. **Notably, a portion of these funds, specifically $4 billion, is allocated to replenish Israel's Iron Dome and David's Sling missile defense systems.** These systems are vital for the nation's defense against threats like the Iranian-backed Hamas terrorists. **This financial commitment underscores the United States' unwavering support for Israel's right to defend itself.** [HELP ME FIGHT ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xyddjjl-dytjdljkkt-y/) This emergency package is fully offset by other budgetary adjustments, ensuring fiscal responsibility while maintaining our dedication to global security.**As your representative, I believe it is crucial to support our allies and uphold the values of democracy and peace.** The passage of H.R. 6126 is a significant step in this direction, and it was made possible by bipartisan cooperation and a shared understanding of the importance of our relationship with Israel.**To continue our advocacy and support for Israel, I need your help.****[Chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or ANY AMOUNT to support our ongoing efforts to maintain peace and security in the Middle East and around the world.](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xyddjjl-dytjdljkkt-j/)** [CHIP IN $10 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xyddjjl-dytjdljkkt-i/) [CHIP IN $25 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xyddjjl-dytjdljkkt-d/) [CHIP IN $50 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xyddjjl-dytjdljkkt-h/) [CHIP IN $100 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xyddjjl-dytjdljkkt-k/) [CHIP IN $250 ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xyddjjl-dytjdljkkt-u/) [ANY AMOUNT ->](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xyddjjl-dytjdljkkt-o/) Your contributions enable me to keep fighting for policies that strengthen our international alliances and promote global stability.Thank You,
Anthony | | [Unsubscribe](https://despositoforcongress.cmail19.com/t/y-u-xyddjjl-dytjdljkkt-b/)

clean_body: Unwavering support for Israel's right to defend itself. | Peter, I am proud to announce that the House of Representatives has recently passed H.R. 6126, the Israel Security Supplemental Appropriations Act, a critical measure... Peter, I am proud to announce that the House of Representatives has recently passed H.R. 6126, the Israel Security Supplemental Appropriations Act, a critical measure that I co-sponsored.This landmark legislation provides $14.3 billion in military assistance to Israel, reinforcing our commitment to this key ally amid ongoing existential threats. Notably, a portion of these funds, specifically $4 billion, is allocated to replenish Israel's Iron Dome and David's Sling missile defense systems. These systems are vital for the nation's defense against threats like the Iranian-backed Hamas terrorists. This financial commitment underscores the United States' unwavering support for Israel's right to defend itself. This emergency package is fully offset by other budgetary adjustments, ensuring fiscal responsibility while maintaining our dedication to global security.As your representative, I believe it is crucial to support our allies and uphold the values of democracy and peace. The passage of H.R. 6126 is a significant step in this direction, and it was made possible by bipartisan cooperation and a shared understanding of the importance of our relationship with Israel.To continue our advocacy and support for Israel, I need your help. Your contributions enable me to keep fighting for policies that strengthen our international alliances and promote global stability.Thank You, Anthony | |

body:
don’t let this happen ever again...

---
**WE TOLD YOU:** a new poll shows Sherrod Brown within the margin of error of losing his seat to any of his three potential Republican challengers.

**WE TOLD YOU:** Brown’s seat is expected to be one of the closest, most important races in 2024!

**WE TOLD YOU:** We missed our end-of-month ‘Battleground Senate Fund” by almost $1,500.
_We CANNOT let mess-ups like these become our new normal, not when we’re fighting to save our razor-thin Senate majority!_

**It’s time to step it up, because our country, our democracy, and Democratic heroes like Sherrod Brown are depending on it:[_Rush $7 now to our Battleground Senate Fund so we can finish the week strong! »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57289?t=8&akid=11836%2E878179%2EY3qTi_)**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfa19ga35akvbtib2vv524ne5kifgr951o5k39e8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjg66ob6cdh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z06g990qtbd6l3ijsqtobe6uggj0h75m46bm5sr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjg66ob6cdh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsdjn60g3fm37itv9gcorl1bhfuahtu2ukdfam48_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjg66ob6cdh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zge8ficmagos246o68btvu2ndbnv3rpon1dn7lgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjg66ob6cdh2bs)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Urgent: Your American Dream is at Stake
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
But there is hope.

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36931%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tWuaDMt%2bpSjgwyofI%2bTiFg&sysid=1)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

As you know, our nation is experiencing a time of great turbulence. The fundamental American values that have undergirded our society since its founding are being challenged and, sadly, eroded. These values--faith, liberty, community, and life--are the cornerstones that have made our country not just good, but great, the greatest the world has ever seen.

As individuals, we hold dear to these principles. Collectively, they make up the American Dream--a shared belief that liberty and prosperity are within every person's reach through hard work and resolve. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36932%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y2A%2fH3jgGaGvfJal6XSI6w&sysid=1) I fear, however, that this dream is being threatened. Ideologies that directly oppose these time-honored values are gaining traction, driven by a prevailing political climate that seems to value uniformity over diversity of thought.

**But there is hope.**

I believe that together, we can challenge this dangerous trajectory and restore our foundational values. I have penned a petition--a statement of belief--affirming faith, liberty, community, and life. But I cannot do it alone. **Your voice is needed.**

[Join me, and sign this petition today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36933%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IyVaNDoJ4QBP43OZ4YPkWQ&sysid=1)

This is a critical moment for each of us individually, and for our country as a whole. Let's secure the American dream for ourselves, our children, and generations to come.

Thank you in advance for your willingness to stand with me.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Your America News
---

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36934%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lW4%2b4FaDrMx%2fGpCVOPKTBw&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36945%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Kdgt5NHGJ9fG3SHbChtpPA&sysid=1)_

name: American Defense News
subject: One of the Left's most powerful tools
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhj1d6uh1j8nmgsdgtv93nhrpf9km0k0doet0k4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuoitg835kg5qld18ao30ctsalsckpn1edcg9f2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")

## There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment.
[AGREE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1rb3l990ldv2cnm2msm9uai5lrj51a7qogc70k0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs) [DISAGREE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7acmooviqdiog1oik226krobf5ipq9225g256rg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs) [NOT SURE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlehs4aorro850h6hlggcsgn34a7ktmdkp7eobd8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs)
Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkrkbrrdc6u5as3t1p7do52k47cuiu80p79469fo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi94p40thtv4vpc584uan4nnd59ru6uat67l1u08_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs)
---

American Defense News

"" There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv8c07br9qpqijio0vitluoundb8uiktfo6a7850_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvipp6cq1ckb2f21gei8qo0mlr4vb2dpkcccgjt8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdo007nkbdj4t2c82jimc2d2c4gi1c9o938n6nf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh1c2vsfkldh4s8sttoc6avnjo5ii790fs1okpto_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o35c5h2bs)

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpngdh8jah9rae94kqlaldpli18olr53amgsusa8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o31c1h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh15hpvntrlgbih0f177jva8jng183bvt9d4hpgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o31c1h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbc399c78ouh3gucdq15glp7vkcev6imklogkrgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o31c1h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjos02k1e1qianlhh1cv5cht94avdh5tsd7q8pag_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji60o31c1h2bs)

body:
Your response will help the GOP WIN back the Senate majority in 2024.

Friend,

With the 2024 election year less than two months away, we're gathering feedback from America's most dedicated Republican patriots to ensure _**[VICTORY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjdjm670qks9d5q78ipdbut571hnuv39nvr2bs7g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs)**_ next November.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm1vpkj6klrg75pnc9mqi10fsp5kitf5uj12njmg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor0cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3hpgporfsudb3e2b1mcruhqlutn8l3op5ggvpg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor0cdh2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z26ml14akvmqaigplmo6mu0bkj8fl333u70hjgto_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor0cdh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsl3sdpj38vev53o7arvc2pu58gatf82j9b5guk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor0cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkdjjc5a7ce2f1oviqfvddrhmlctfm8g1upogpa8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5a0cnlcg2eqnpjl974tfftv2o5u7hsijj4lqep8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ptj21akvtug51194gcsni8k1hsi81g03igu4ag_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk24kfi88fc4eufqkkav6uohog202c5n7c9ik2f8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: GOP Presidential
subject: This is essential to preserve freedom
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution

This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z82euh179oft9jhn4onppvebm9q6mm1numg2al60_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn53es9tvv1ngrrbh75l0uf7i7vmnj8od5d5mofo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")

## There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment.
[AGREE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmoo7ihjk5g3m7ce3o1mim3hq6latr9uvaneelog_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs) [DISAGREE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcqhpf4lp8u00fiilc7ddtbpvq8d8tpgglmjar9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs) [NOT SURE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze35bgptflv8elgd1gd51mhb9isjlk0bb79p23oo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs)
Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z64bis6lqna1ei906iop5ivuu8p0t8d9r0sbg0g0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv3go33uq4q879eri3cjkdacur1nqvg0uhab46sg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs)
---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z60j2c57omm5ikif2kci948m2ucvvhpbtiuset88_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32c1j68ob7c8gq48bi4bh28pr0c1ie8pj3chie49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuef2cbuedrcvlbptlchtpn1vmv968dp4pfu6rng_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6cor4cjh2bs)_

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd6eobveptm6acm6laktu0l3mf9qhhkos7kfte5o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0c1ie8pj3chie49fg)

name: Congressman Paul Broun
subject: Sign the petition to ban transgender child mutilation
body:
Ban Child Mutilation Nationwide

Dear Concerned American,

Should so-called doctors be allowed to
sexually mutilate or chemically sterilize children - even
children as young as 8 years for girls and 10 years for boys?

Should publicly-funded schools be permitted
to promote this radical trans-sexual abuse, often behind the
backs of parents?

I hope you say ABSOLUTELY NOT!

Yet it is happening every day in America. In
fact, an insider report from a horrified worker at a Missouri
Children's Hospital revealed that the number of children sent for
"gender transition" has increased by more than 400% in the last
five years.

That's why I'm emailing you today asking you
to sign your petition to your U.S. Representative and Senators
demanding they take immediate action to ban the transgender child
sexual mutilation and chemical castration procedures.

I am former U.S. Congressman Paul Broun, and
I'm more determined than ever to stop the worldwide tide of
Leftism I see targeting our children and grandchildren.

CitizenGO represents millions of members and
supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT
ideology that has swept through our schools, media, and
entertainment, mercilessly attacking the relationships between
children and their parents and destroying family morality and
faith.

Will you join with millions of pro-family
Citizens to defend our children from transgender child sexual
mutilation?

Click here to sign the petition to Congress
demanding they ban all gender transition procedures for minors
immediately!

Puberty blockers, hormone supplements, and
drastic sexual organ surgery are all procedures with horrific
side effects that children cannot fully grasp. And in a sea of
lies and misinformation, few adults understand the true horror.

Make no mistake, the transgender lobby wants
them confused and isolated from any dissenting voices.

*** I've seen an entire generation of youth
come out of their schools confused and assaulted by the
transgender ideology attacking gender and their sense of self,
persuading them to seek poisonous and severely harmful procedures
to change their bodies to "fit in" with the transgender world.

*** I've seen families torn to pieces as the
newest generation of children, who are fed radical transgender
values with their cereal, clash with bewildered parents over a
child's so-called" gender identity."

*** In a growing number of States, children
are encouraged to hide their planned mutilations or chemical
castrations from their parents by teachers and counselors.

*** Meanwhile, the transgender lobby rabidly
shuts down or "cancels" any dissenting voices or studies on the
harmful effects of child sexual mutilation.

*** They even more rabidly suppress any study
of the massive number of children who abandon gender transition
after the fact...

... and are left with bitter regrets, twisted
bodies and awful consequences.
The best way to put a stop to it all is by
passing a flat-out Federal ban on administering these procedures
to minors.

Our children, the most vulnerable members of
our society, are being conned into irreversible procedures that
alter their bodies and lives forever.

This is not a matter of choice or identity -
it's a matter of safety and common sense. Minors are not equipped
with the life experience or emotional maturity to make such
grave, scarring, and often irreversible decisions about their
bodies and their futures.

Sign your petition today demanding Congress
step in and protect our children from transgender mutilation.

14 states have already passed bans on
transgender child sexual mutilation, though 2 are being
challenged in court.

But states like California and New York will
not follow suit willingly, and the transgender lobby is howling
for blood at the restrictions being placed on them.

That's why, once you've signed, I ask you to
chip in with a modest contribution to help CitizenGO bring other
Americans into the fight against child sexual mutilation. Even a
gift of $10 or $25 will be a big boost.

The success of this campaign relies on the
power of Citizens standing together to make our voices heard, and
every extra dollar counts when we're fighting to counter the
transgender lobby's pervasive ideology.

So please, sign your petition, share, and
chip in with a quick $10 or $25 contribution to help CitizenGO
recruit more signers and win the fight.

In addition to recruiting more petition
signers to increase the impact of our campaign, your contribution
will help fund:

Hard-hitting advertisements to highlight
and draw attention to the horrible practices of transgender
centers.
Targeted petition deliveries to key
elected officials demanding they take action to defend children.
Phone calls to likely supporters to raise
awareness and recruit new members.
Radio and TV ads exposing everything the
transgender ideology is inflicting on our children, should funds
permit.

So once you have signed, I ask that you
make a contribution of $10 or $25 to CitizenGO, or perhaps an
even more generous gift of $50 or $100, to help expand their
recruitment and to fund all of these plans in CitizenGO's fight
to stop child sexual mutilation.

So please sign your petition, share, and chip
in with a generous contribution of $10 or $25, or perhaps an even
more generous gift of $50 or $100 today.

Thank you for standing with us in this
crucial fight for our children's future.

Sincerely,

Paul C. Broun (MD)
U.S. Congressman Georgia 10 Ret.

P.S. I'm more determined than ever to stop
the worldwide tide of Leftism I see targeting our children and
grandchildren.

CitizenGO represents millions of members and
supporters fighting back against the radical anti-family LGBT
ideology, and I want every pro-sanity American to band together
to put a stop to child sexual mutilation and chemical castration.

The best way to do that is with a Federal ban
on performing Transgender procedures on minors, and CitizenGO is
launching a campaign to do just that. But it will take people
power to succeed.

That's why I'm counting on you to sign your
petition, and then go on to add a modest $10 or $25
contribution, or perhaps an even more generous gift of $50 or
$100, to help CitizenGO fight to ban child sexual mutilation.

In addition to signing your petition and
donating, I need you to share it with your friends and family who
share our values so they can have the opportunity to sign as
well. CitizenGO's petition page makes it super easy to share in a
way you prefer.

CitizenGO is a community of
active citizens that works to ensure that human life, the family
and our freedoms are respected worldwide. CitizenGO members live
in every nation of the world. Our team is spread across 16
countries on 5 continents and operates in 12 languages. Learn
about CitizenGO here or follow us on Facebook or Twitter.

Not produced or emailed at
taxpayer expense.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: ICYMI News
subject: Take the Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zknokjssfdrf2mcp4bc4rmufq6e4e1s4mg6fuiog_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6eoj5c5h2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zerq6lihemn81tnfgn201p6fnaa5kf4j05bjmd7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6eoj5c5h2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")

## There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment.
[AGREE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp1sli2fcsank00knvfg6hnuassa75dmi2huf14o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6eoj5c5h2bs) [DISAGREE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2f7udthom5e5m3dh2pp91bi5nf9r7eaku4d7s60_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6eoj5c5h2bs) [NOT SURE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zivtgrusip5679bppaf9lehcm3fc3ctooh9doiko_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6eoj5c5h2bs)
Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8gomjh261adluifiphmd14141jt5qjiflomucu8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6eoj5c5h2bs) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg6v3ivfitj12in5kcriaimltqbfkbvlrq6o4dv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cji6eoj5c5h2bs)
---

name: Casey HQ
subject: When we say this, we mean it

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1215%2E552475%2Es9NjB0)
Peter,
When we say reaching our $100,000 end-of-month goal will affect whether or not we can win Pennsylvania's battleground Senate race, _we mean it._
Our team is working overtime to keep Bob Casey in the Senate. Pennsylvania is critical to holding our Senate majority, so the stakes are too high to leave anything to chance.
This could be the most expensive battleground in the country, and we can't afford to fall short of our fundraising goals. We're relying on our grassroots supporters to fuel our campaign.
**[Senate control is on the line, so we're asking you to pitch in your first contribution today to reach our $100,000 goal by midnight on November 30. Can we count on your support?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231125-2?refcode=em20231125-2&refcode2=1215_552475_s9NjB0&akid=1215%2E552475%2Es9NjB0)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231125-2?refcode=em20231125-2&refcode2=1215_552475_s9NjB0&akid=1215%2E552475%2Es9NjB0)**
Pennsylvania is going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country -- that's why we need to be prepared for everything the GOP and our mega-millionaire opponent will throw our way.
Most campaigns experience slower fundraising during holiday weekends, but it is critical we pick up the pace before our end-of-month deadline.
**[We're humbly asking if you'll help us meet our fundraising goal by making a contribution today. We're relying on your support, Peter.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231125-2?refcode=em20231125-2&refcode2=1215_552475_s9NjB0&akid=1215%2E552475%2Es9NjB0)**

Team Casey

name: American Update
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685531%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2kjOQEJq1SGarb4BAXewbA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685532%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fG%2bAKr5AUh4O%2fvIRD1wCqw&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685533%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D1%2bEiDBnxCyE3WNTw2DFJg&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685534%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CBSJ9Hxde0U0QikayzVRvA&sysid=1)

body:
Come out Dec 14th - 6:30 PM for a Family-Style Italian Dinner.
| | | | Sheriff Jonathan M. Sammons, Commissioner Chris Konawel, and Commissioner Nick DeSilvio cordially invite you to their 1st Annual Family & Friends Style Italian Dinner!
All food will be made by your Elected Officials! Come spend some time with likeminded folks right before Christmas. We hope to see you there!
🗓️ December 14, 2023 ⏰ 6:30 PM 📍 Sons of Italy Lodge 2580 (525 W Broad St, Paulsboro) 🎟️ $40 with a donation of a toy/food/blanket for the Gloucester County Animal Shelter $60 without a donation

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7887a52ecddb4ff0e9417803adb6e7b784ed23589a73c9868db6f2ec09e3dcb6588e3ab2e2e8bc9cfdf1af9454df5cc2837769cc2bf2dfef4da05cb8f8b9a0b9

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7887a52ecddb4ff0e9417803adb6e7b784ed23589a73c9868db6f2ec09e3dcb6588e3ab2e2e8bc9cfdf1af9454df5cc2837769cc2bf2dfef4da05cb8f8b9a0b9

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: Nikki Haley
subject: I have the solutions.
body:
It’s time we elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track. Will you join me?

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36075%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ht2hWgDzMcPdmMVmtsxFfA&sysid=1)
---

Friend,

During my last debate, I reminded voters across America why I’m in this race and why I am the BEST candidate for the job.

_Will you take a look at the message I had to share?_

**[After you finish reading this, please consider giving a donation of $20.24 to help me WIN the fight for our future.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36076%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4XtX7Nw0lBvFf3FzQsIixA&sysid=1 "After you finish reading
this, please consider giving a donation of $20.24 to help me WIN the fight for our
future.")**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36075%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ht2hWgDzMcPdmMVmtsxFfA&sysid=1)
---

**If you look at the facts ...**

_We are almost $34 trillion dollars in debt.

60% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. 50% of American families can’t afford diapers, and 1 in 6 American families can’t pay their utility bills.

Parents are worrying about what their children are being taught in the classrooms.

We have antisemitism all over college campuses and students feel unsafe.

We’ve got an open border where terrorists can come through, and there are dangers all around us._

**That’s not us. That’s not America. **

We’ve got to stop focusing on the past and start focusing on what’s going to make America **STRONG** and **PROUD** , which is exactly what I’m doing.

**[It’s time we elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track. Will you join me?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36077%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6kP1CLMjCsF95oNQO6hi1Q&sysid=1 "It’s time we elect a
president who can WIN and get America back on track. Will you join me?")**
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36078%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tcRQgNlDOk6BF0m2fNwsZw&sysid=1)
---
_**As president, we will restore our economy.** If 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards!_

Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America, let’s go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist.

We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels.

**We will put transparency back in our classrooms.** As a mom, I know what that means. Parents should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what’s happening!

_**We will secure our border,**_ and _**we will get crime down**_ because families should feel safe wherever they go.

It's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals.

And as the wife of a combat veteran, **we will make sure the military knows we have their back.**

We have the solutions. But I need your help to win and make America strong and proud again!

**[If you’d like to join me in the fight to save our country, please consider chipping in a contribution to my campaign today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36079%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y9NekLQ2z6BE8kdK7q%2bU0A&sysid=1 "If you’d like to join me
in the fight to save our country, please consider chipping in a contribution to my
campaign today. ")**

Let’s win this!

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36078%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tcRQgNlDOk6BF0m2fNwsZw&sysid=1)
---

My very best,
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36075%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ht2hWgDzMcPdmMVmtsxFfA&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36070%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BdLQWr8NkSTb5ocQX9retg&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36071%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Wkg%2bXNbKQvYNImffCYrXYQ&sysid=1 "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36072%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wZrsabyTIMxD7JDjzm5MPg&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36073%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wflOiOLruySVhmQA4zWwLw&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36074%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ViQa9bI%2fP5al%2f3lsfrXKhg&sysid=1 "DONATE")
---
| Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36085%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sdjnkj56LYVrO46SWyuXDw&sysid=1)
---

Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Terms and conditions](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36086%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gna0%2br2WUR0DKMbEVB90Jg&sysid=1).

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will You Stand for the American Dream?
body:
Imagine a world where our children and grandchildren no longer know the value of hard work, personal freedom, and respect for life.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
|
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QlLato7iCohd5DASVW0qmw~~/AARclAA~)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I am Dr. Ben Carson, the founder and chairman of the American Cornerstone Institute. I write to you today because I believe that we share a profound bond. This bond is our love for the United States of America and our belief in its foundational principles: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QlLato7iCohd5DASVW0qmw~~/AARclAA~) Today, these principles are under attack. Radical ideologies that feed off division, undermine our liberties, and threaten community cohesion are being propagated. Each day goes by, we risk losing the essence of the American Dream if we choose to remain silent and inactive.

Imagine a world where our children and grandchildren no longer know the value of hard work, personal freedom, and respect for life. That's a future we cannot consign them to. Together, we can prevent this. I am asking for your help to fight back against these challenges.

I have started a petition that serves as a beacon of resistance against these harmful ideologies and a call to action for all Americans who believe in our shared values. This is far more than a petition. It's our stand against forces that want to dismantle the principles that have upheld our great nation.

The American Cornerstone Institute is committed to promoting conservative, commonsense solutions to the issues we face. But we cannot do this without your help. **Your voice matters.**

I ask you to [add your name to the petition](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QlLato7iCohd5DASVW0qmw~~/AARclAA~) today and stand up for the values underpinning our great nation. The future of our American Dream depends on each individual's commitment--on your commitment.

Thank you for standing with us. Together, we will ensure that the United States remains a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come.

God bless you, and God bless America.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Freedom Report
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
