subject: Black Friday Sale - $7 for game-changing research
body:
What would you do for a shot at a 35,988% gain?

| Dear Reader, What would you do for a shot at a 35,988% gain? Or what about a 555,455% gain? How would that affect your retirement? Because that's exactly why I'm reaching out to you today... Anyone who got in on the ground floor of SpaceX had a chance to pocket a whopping 555,455% gain... enough to turn $10,000 into over $5.5 million. Same thing with Tesla, which revolutionized the auto industry. Anyone who bought shares of Tesla at the IPO had a chance to pocket a gain of 35,988%. Investing legend Teeka Tiwari has found a way for you to get in on the ground floor of Elon Musk's next venture. And he's confident anyone who gets in with his research will have a chance to make massive gains. Access to Teeka's research will tell you everything you need to know about it. [This Black Friday](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/UHswM9O51xze6Goyumh7rw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRG5AP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucGFsbWJlYWNoZ3JvdXAuY29tLz9jaWQ9TUtUNzc3MjU0JmVpZD1NS1Q3NzkzMjcmYWZmX2NsaWNrX2lkPVJNLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNVcDc3BjQgplX6rCYWVzLo09UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~), Teeka Tiwari is offering a way to get his financial research service - practically for free. For just $7, you can get one full year of Teeka Tiwari's monthly advisory _The_ _Palm Beach Letter..._ That will bring you the best income-generating ideas to give you the chance to consistently and reliably boost your bottom line, regardless of market conditions. (And now it's just $7. That's 96% off our regular retail price of $199 - all part of our Black Friday sale.) **[Click here to watch the video and take advantage of this incredible sale...](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/UHswM9O51xze6Goyumh7rw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRG5AP0RbaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucGFsbWJlYWNoZ3JvdXAuY29tLz9jaWQ9TUtUNzc3MjU0JmVpZD1NS1Q3NzkzMjcmYWZmX2NsaWNrX2lkPVJNLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNVcDc3BjQgplX6rCYWVzLo09UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** And be on your way to achieving those dreams, whatever they may be. Sr. Client Services, _Palm Beach Research Group_

name: Cecile Richards
subject: Peter, I need to be blunt with you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
This is important:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11ee0412-574a-478d-b278-9eaaab42aeb3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d8c860e-0f79-4968-837b-ef71c2b1ccd7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, During my time as president of Planned Parenthood, I watched Republicans attempt to pass horrific laws to control women's bodies. But now, with Roe v. Wade no longer the law of the land, I need to be blunt with you: Anti-choice extremists are attacking abortion access like never before. In states across this country, Republicans are doing everything in their power to restrict reproductive freedom – and Mitch McConnell and his allies have threatened to pass a national abortion ban if they take back Senate control. Political analysts say that the future of the Senate could all come down to Nevada – just like it did last year – which is why I’m reaching out today: My friend, Sen. Jacky Rosen, is running for reelection. I’m working hard to help her win this fight, and I’m asking you to join me. The GOP knows the importance of Nevada, so they’re zeroing in on Jacky as a top target for defeat. She’s facing an uphill climb and won’t be able to defend her seat without grassroots support from people like you. [So please, Peter, I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $10 – split between Jacky’s campaign and Blue Amp Action’s – to keep Nevada blue, defend the Senate, and restore reproductive freedom nationwide?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ed58caf-42d0-4ce2-a8fd-7573ac64403b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99e47943-d10a-4f51-937d-5e03d23559fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T767258dd-afa5-4571-a1f5-0c52904093a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3d6e2f1-c745-452f-a6ae-2792719eddb2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01d9b7a8-dfce-4325-8c98-3d61c6901572/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | | Last year, the GOP flooded Nevada’s Senate race with a staggering $55 million – and their handpicked candidate came within less than 8,000 votes of winning. That’s a SLIM margin. There’s no question that Jacky’s race will be just as close – and likely even more expensive. That’s why she urgently needs grassroots resources as early in the election cycle as possible. So please, Peter, can I count on you to join me in supporting Jacky today? [Donate $10 now – or however much you can spare – to keep both Nevada and the Senate blue. This race couldn’t be more pivotal in the fight to protect reproductive freedom in America.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b806b8f-223d-44c8-bfd0-b088ae1e4fc9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Cecile Richards
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcebe32fd-8a27-4f5f-9369-3c4301d5ca93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_em_fr_90do_rosen_richards230827copy1-n_copy1_copy1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T323c9c9c-dab3-4b8d-b6f8-86a2fee4695b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=f7772a18-6d90-40b7-a710-fb94a81b5b4b&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=f7772a18-6d90-40b7-a710-fb94a81b5b4b&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s an honor
body:
I want to make myself crystal clear: I work for you, the American People.

| |
---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

**It is an honor to be your Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.**

I want to make myself crystal clear from day one:

**[I work for you, the American People.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21e148c729f541b18834cc6844ea40b0&_e=9lFqhyDE2ld8iHWM6iyzNJRUiHSTwXoiXm46RJeZkqcxflozpHGbtkK5DgiPDPq6mh2fBwLK2GkWp8hb2EwltpZaNF6kTGb31ECA7OFz_bFMhzRpZrv-1UXc2iCzYtjY67MYWimDoSAKbn5Y_udAwXocymZxjD4dnl4EjktPqfuM9MJJAArFIUMA2T5vf5n3jrKflu81IjF_YQSwI44NYaPX26MbH91NxpivHu15SEL73_sq1P1T0qsHS9aESeKAgZrxqGq1hINM4-Nvuzx5hnCUBmtVAx7ZTzJhDYp-6DGm0DGF5qkhnDHldZdU5nYcyjf38va3jjc1xrhK3kzWIaWQoBqAlVOvvJ3Irc0j_HkKAIfDaxvYvBtsx0EFMb8dy1cPRC3DtVlRj2Ix42zUkZISfH95EwXA2KCW6ecEq-xjUuvVyWDevnKEgezRw2dyRnEftA_xq-yi9st5oUUpUw%3D%3D "I work for you, the American People.")**

My first order of business is speaking with YOU. I want to know about your priorities as we close out the year and what you'd like to see us do next. Working together is our best chance to defeat the Radical Left.

I just launched my **[NEW SPEAKER SURVEY](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21e148c729f541b18834cc6844ea40b0&_e=9lFqhyDE2ld8iHWM6iyzNJRUiHSTwXoiXm46RJeZkqcxflozpHGbtkK5DgiPDPq6mh2fBwLK2GkWp8hb2EwltpZaNF6kTGb31ECA7OFz_bFMhzRpZrv-1UXc2iCzYtjY67MYWimDoSAKbn5Y_udAwXocymZxjD4dnl4EjktPqfuM9MJJAArFIUMA2T5vf5n3jrKflu81IjF_YQSwI44NYaPX26MbH91NxpivHu15SEL73_sq1P1T0qsHS9aESeKAgZrxqGq1hINM4-Nvuzx5hnCUBmtVAx7ZTzJhDYp-6DGm0DGF5qkhnDHldZdU5nYc8B-x12hagZWmt4ZT9vYpxCFVfg9e98ILI49eqVFtj5QWqXozLYt2VDT9Ji2PowWllWJIJhI1wNibjkQzCdl1nI97RtZotpha6xfti7rz4ollseB-A5zsL47NjmlBQIkQiRCyX_YrnaLPLVrFNA60kw%3D%3D "NEW SPEAKER SURVEY")** - this gives you a chance to communicate directly with me. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share. This is very important to me.

_The only thing I ask is for you to respond as soon as you get this. I know you 're busy... but things are changing by the minute so I'd like your feedback right away. _
---
**[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21e148c729f541b18834cc6844ea40b0&_e=9lFqhyDE2ld8iHWM6iyzNJRUiHSTwXoiXm46RJeZkqcxflozpHGbtkK5DgiPDPq6mh2fBwLK2GkWp8hb2EwltpZaNF6kTGb31ECA7OFz_bFMhzRpZrv-1UXc2iCzYtjY67MYWimDoSAKbn5Y_udAwXocymZxjD4dnl4EjktPqfuM9MJJAArFIUMA2T5vf5n3jrKflu81IjF_YQSwI44NYaPX26MbH91NxpivHu15SEL73_sq1P1T0qsHS9aESeKAgZrxqGq1hINM4-Nvuzx5hnCUBmtVAx7ZTzJhDYp-6DGm0DGF5qkhnDHldZdU5nYciNbGUCPVze8-tL5VWjhe8SS77-uuCL3wWpic9WvEsAJ-gn_VwcBNr6__VEqeVFIXVzE-ULPLl6UnspRijDmlWZiTl1J1w4F1SHg85EL9BqCrvSG1Ssg9tDv7h9BRwo6ecErL9VqQVVOYzStIysG4HQ%3D%3D)[**TAKE MY NEW SPEAKER SURVEY**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21e148c729f541b18834cc6844ea40b0&_e=9lFqhyDE2ld8iHWM6iyzNJRUiHSTwXoiXm46RJeZkqcxflozpHGbtkK5DgiPDPq6mh2fBwLK2GkWp8hb2EwltpZaNF6kTGb31ECA7OFz_bFMhzRpZrv-1UXc2iCzYtjY67MYWimDoSAKbn5Y_udAwXocymZxjD4dnl4EjktPqfuM9MJJAArFIUMA2T5vf5n3jrKflu81IjF_YQSwI44NYaPX26MbH91NxpivHu15SEL73_sq1P1T0qsHS9aESeKAgZrxqGq1hINM4-Nvuzx5hnCUBmtVAx7ZTzJhDYp-6DGm0DGF5qkhnDHldZdU5nYcL5plgX_qEPyU5A5qinLj5nVJStpLKkXJ6STL7NLL69zTcsCOYVRH_qEyICJ66mcdfMuvkzCeQJZAtOeOQDq8lyqNpY_auXryNjEKzpRHd2QGawdsw10hfMCJKe6RqTYcc0BI9TD5vCPXLFx-12efeA%3D%3D) _**
---
I will be blunt with you.

The challenges facing our country will take courage and determination to overcome. Not just from me, but from you too. This will not be easy. We need your best effort and giving up is simply NOT an option - not if we want to save this great country.

The power to bring our country roaring back is in your hands. We just have to rise to the occasion - and that starts with having an open and honest dialogue. Don't spare my feelings. Be honest. I want to know exactly how you feel.

**[That's why I respectfully ask you for a few minutes to guide your House Majority where YOU want it to go.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21e148c729f541b18834cc6844ea40b0&_e=9lFqhyDE2ld8iHWM6iyzNJRUiHSTwXoiXm46RJeZkqcxflozpHGbtkK5DgiPDPq6mh2fBwLK2GkWp8hb2EwltpZaNF6kTGb31ECA7OFz_bFMhzRpZrv-1UXc2iCzYtjY67MYWimDoSAKbn5Y_udAwXocymZxjD4dnl4EjktPqfuM9MJJAArFIUMA2T5vf5n3jrKflu81IjF_YQSwI44NYaPX26MbH91NxpivHu15SEL73_sq1P1T0qsHS9aESeKAgZrxqGq1hINM4-Nvuzx5hnCUBmtVAx7ZTzJhDYp-6DGm0DGF5qkhnDHldZdU5nYcrCuIn8PxzKiU2YdwjyvIPiC0tK3tmftxmh-29VI77YDbSOkGdKcpxRChKTAFsqMbCWVpX-V0ISEvHNvF7lmGlkCsLamNTQa-g6kixHBZu398FBqIhRvNjoya0-48JA1DBMTkAb4MEm9B2-xY6mXYwg%3D%3D "That’s why I respectfully ask you for a few minutes to guide your House Majority where YOU want it to go.")**

More from me soon,

**Mike Johnson**
Speaker of the House

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell Congress to OPPOSE gutting bedrock environmental protections
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2142741?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | Do you know what’s giving you a say in whether ExxonMobil can roll up to your neighborhood and build an oil refinery? What’s allowing you to provide input on Chevron’s plan to run a pipeline through your community’s drinking water source? It’s a law called the **National Environmental Policy Act** – and **YOU can help stop the efforts in Congress to gut this bedrock legislation.** Also called NEPA, the National Environmental Policy Act gives you and me a say in what polluting projects big companies try to put in our communities. It requires thorough assessment and time for community input – but new bills in Congress could _**fast-track polluting projects and revoke your right to say NO**_ to dirty energy projects.[**Please, Friend, tell your Congressmembers to OPPOSE any attempts to gut our bedrock environmental protections! **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2142742?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2142743?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
If NEPA is weakened, more **babies could be breathing toxins** from fossil fuel plants. More communities could suffer from **contaminated drinking water.** In some cases, these are literally **life-or-death** consequences, Friend. Fossil fuel pollution has been linked to **respiratory illnesses, splitting headaches, and even increased cancer rates!**
You have a right to determine what happens in your own neighborhood. Don’t let Congress take that away from you and give greedy fossil fuel companies the ability to steamroll community input. [**Will you send a message to Congress and help us meet our goal of 112 more signatures from your area before 11:59pm TONIGHT? Preserve your right to say NO to fossil fuels!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2142744?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2142745?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

Hallie Templeton

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | Do you know what’s giving you a say in whether ExxonMobil can roll up to your neighborhood and build an oil refinery? What’s allowing you to provide input on Chevron’s plan to run a pipeline through your community’s drinking water source? It’s a law called the National Environmental Policy Act – and YOU can help stop the efforts in Congress to gut this bedrock legislation. Also called NEPA, the National Environmental Policy Act gives you and me a say in what polluting projects big companies try to put in our communities. It requires thorough assessment and time for community input – but new bills in Congress could fast-track polluting projects and revoke your right to say NO to dirty energy projects.== | == If NEPA is weakened, more babies could be breathing toxins from fossil fuel plants. More communities could suffer from contaminated drinking water. In some cases, these are literally life-or-death consequences, Friend. Fossil fuel pollution has been linked to respiratory illnesses, splitting headaches, and even increased cancer rates! You have a right to determine what happens in your own neighborhood. Don’t let Congress take that away from you and give greedy fossil fuel companies the ability to steamroll community input. == == Standing with you, Hallie Templeton Legal Director & Senior Campaigner, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

Hamas has released 24 hostages held in Gaza, and Israel released 39 Palestinian prisoners.
The storm has been downgraded to a Category 1 hurricane, but it still poses a level of threat rarely seen in places like Bangor, Maine.

# Saturday, November 25th, 2023
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend!** On this date in 1905, Scientific American published the first ad for a home "wireless telegraph," which we would call a radio set. The kit included a spark coil, strap key, and sender for $8.50, close to $300 in today's money. ([See Ad](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQANCvgS3W3QEhDAxdvKVrR4vG5_gqHCJ8TeW_r9S5P_Ck93GdrkWqPO7vZeOsS5vKTeXFE-KJwonc5O2cF2ZiZzljBEgEl-jsmiOVwulSPgumEF3yBB59cp4vyS-BrGQCcogUEELyNESPlGaIvAR0kM7GA8-irQ9fTR668lKP9uI-3Npma15Vn7txb4ZGQyOXXo9eZmmr7Nr6MXzvhkZMEJSrDKtutuf5-SO1yn6OxsN9K1L_MP3_9hsAAP__KdBOlw)) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuszAQAOCnsbeg853BePDwSxHTT9eOyIIzXGtwRNxUffuq6tjs3_S9jtMYJcuxvsSdQ01linOVB0_GXLC9IE1WLyExI5PmYByAR-gd6S2kiAwL2oSewBtHiVPPM6SuBwc-aQkISMZga6D1FhtnDfoFHKfWEPhOWeBFajmbtyJH3Tjlr_Lgs5nLrnPYar3dFf1TOCgc_hKFwxhXmf_L8f5jaGBF1-X2KTnLvXPKwrpHyb-2-6i7oqsFfYbnRtfnA98BAAD__yAnWtU). ## Israel, Hamas Swap Hostages & Prisoners
Hamas has [released 24 hostages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGO6yAQheGnMR0WDGDiguI26XLbLa2RGcKscIgAxbtvv8rW256vONL_cdtuyIUf9_94UBipbrgPftGmtQQnwWxWxJCIgIygoL1SK6iLNyIHMg6U9x6ttYszXps9ag2YLmlZY_KCAygwWoPTyq0WZm81rFF5Sk4btS6TVRR51DZ_Vn6MTKl81xe1ea-HKCGP8eyT-TfBdYLreZ5zql8POvvb30ttJU5wzXhgl40KYacuuTekwnJkZJlrH3inLvc3ysSNZK4ldtFCfJ5cCvfFT1bdD-Tyezz-7vATAAD__61lX5I) held in Gaza, and Israel released 39 Palestinian prisoners. It was the first round of an agreement that involves the release of 50 hostages from Hamas and 150 prisoners from Israel, and it came in the quiet of the first ceasefire since the war in Gaza began. The temporary cessation will end after four days, although the Israelis have offered to [extend the ceasefire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOnDAURuGnge4i-xovUFCkodu0KdEF_4A3Bo9sz0zI00dJnfo0R9-Pz_lTfPDX_l1OjGWLs6zFvzBrTWyJzdzWbtwAhqkx6k6pgVXfmfoYmRfT96pfumUAt70T6N7KajUEHaP2Iys2WrPVyg4tN12reXCqw2a1UcNH1So4X2JqvqK_yoEt3PGF1KzxrMN4lPLIlflW8VTxdOGdm_zz_hsrnnKJ6a548jkJAh1ySqa3JDpjAh0xF9mRaY3P4GgBJQRIhqMtxZN2-S0kmb4iaPEOF2W5MyVIoPWQawXFjfCr4HJwVNJzBWmjtLXa1Gl0j7cPweePrmrVfooP_57L_wn_BAAA___vOnQu) by one day for every ten additional hostages released. Israel had made it clear that it intends to resume its military operations after [the ceasefire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL8Gd1iwxnEoKF7jLq-90trAEu8JmwhQUP7-lKuvG2mKkebrtt2QE5-P_3iQazFv6Bu_aNNawixh2swQXCQCmgZyelHKgrou07A7RGOCx6jsBQ0saKOO1xC0ih5smK8DO1AwaQ2zVrM1MC5Ggw1qoTjrSdmLMIoCt1zG78xn2ymmd35RGX0-huT21p5VTP8ErALW3vvo7_WkXj9ewPpBAWuj45kLlrf0hJVk5ELyTg8-q-RakJLc8cAqOxYB61BceHZOietlEUY9DuT0W2x_D_gJAAD__9wHXWQ), and it's warning residents not to return to northern Gaza--the site of Israel's ground offensive.
## Derek Chauvin Stabbed in Prison
Derek Chauvin, the former Minneapolis police officer convicted of murdering George Floyd, [has been stabbed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGyoyAUgOGn0Q4HDhhiQbGNXbbd0kE4xJNFcADj5u137q1v_Tf_fH8ey8NSpPT8bXc0LeTFukZvXIRgMDKQi-q9CYiAskcjNOcT8LuW_WaUG52UqDTctFfauTWs9xXu3Dp0oxQ9GeAghYBR8HFSMGglYPJcYxiF5NOtUxw9tVyGV6bUNgzxk99YBpf3PpqttaN28lcHcwfzdV1DyP8SXvWrdzCftYPZY8G_zG32fFNitdl1Rc8o7bYhC-ix2MiOQjUnVrFQPmv8MEqvs6BnBY9cWl-MPy6KkepNd4o_d0vxe6L9bPI_AAD__1DuZYs) in prison. According to a report, Chauvin was stabbed by an inmate and suffered serious injuries. The prison has not commented on his condition, although a source said that a different inmate was transported to a hospital after the incident. The [attack happened](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD9zhCAUxD8Nds-BJ_4rLNLYXdqUDsJDyXngAKd33z5j0qbd_c3O7n7dpptym_PLp3rQkG2YlM7uoEkIwBqwmmRhBkuEVBU0iJbzHnnXVsU6zJXqlJE1ztp2xhJXVrRYN3XTaU1SFm5AjpUQWAte9xLLVgrsDW_J1qLifcMkJ-NyiOV3cD6vZLd3OCiWOjyKbVhz3hOrPhiODMfzPEs9J09nunyGY6aXSgzHS2I40guCtU5TBEOR7qBX9TycBx384XQmA87DQiEuBHYLb5Pg7rZrPaSs5vkP2KNLwYPaIYVn1ARJva_4Ig5mPy8-NS2TfHkot_02zf8f9xMAAP__HMlyXw) at the Federal Correctional Institution in Tuscon, AZ--a facility with staffing shortages and recent security issues.
## What to Watch This Weekend
Looking for something to stream this weekend to wind down from the Thanksgiving rush? It may not be relaxing, but Christopher Nolan's _Oppenheimer_ --the story of an enigmatic American scientist who helped develop the atomic bomb--is now available to rent or buy at home. If you're in the mood for something light, check out Adam Sandler's voice performance in _Leo --_an animated film about a caged lizard plotting its escape. Want something else? Check out the [full list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2vozAQAH8NdI7WaxubwsU16XLtlcgfC-zFQIR9RPfvn_LqV46mGc2fx_QIXHhffoeNfJuPKaTGF01SCjQC1aT77GciJNWTlxZgRHBW9asPURo7pDxETAYdJq1jyJAjSCfB5p49Aiop0Ugwo8ab1RLHDJZmIxWMQ6eBMrfjvP09eG8rzeX_cdF5S8fWF7-29qqd-tXhvcN7eO30rh_1gbNxKtThvbaTwia2f5WTaJfYjoupiraG_VkXvnhfxJvoKWJGGJyKYUzOWmejDtokqUaSQENw_enz682lcB1sp2HZApfvkvbzmK8AAAD__x8AYx4).

The storm has been downgraded to a Category 1 hurricane, but it still poses a level of threat rarely seen in places like Bangor, Maine. | | | | | | Saturday, November 25th, 2023 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this date in 1905, Scientific American published the first ad for a home "wireless telegraph," which we would call a radio set. The kit included a spark coil, strap key, and sender for $8.50, close to $300 in today's money. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Ever wanted to learn a new language? Now is the time! Check out today's sponsor, . Editor's note: Today's edition is shortened due to the Thanksgiving holiday. We'll be back to our regular edition on Monday. | Israel, Hamas Swap Hostages & Prisoners Hamas has held in Gaza, and Israel released 39 Palestinian prisoners. It was the first round of an agreement that involves the release of 50 hostages from Hamas and 150 prisoners from Israel, and it came in the quiet of the first ceasefire since the war in Gaza began. The temporary cessation will end after four days, although the Israelis have offered to by one day for every ten additional hostages released. Israel had made it clear that it intends to resume its military operations after , and it's warning residents not to return to northern Gaza--the site of Israel's ground offensive. Derek Chauvin Stabbed in Prison Derek Chauvin, the former Minneapolis police officer convicted of murdering George Floyd, in prison. According to a report, Chauvin was stabbed by an inmate and suffered serious injuries. The prison has not commented on his condition, although a source said that a different inmate was transported to a hospital after the incident. The at the Federal Correctional Institution in Tuscon, AZ--a facility with staffing shortages and recent security issues. What to Watch This Weekend Looking for something to stream this weekend to wind down from the Thanksgiving rush? It may not be relaxing, but Christopher Nolan's Oppenheimer --the story of an enigmatic American scientist who helped develop the atomic bomb--is now available to rent or buy at home. If you're in the mood for something light, check out Adam Sandler's voice performance in Leo --an animated film about a caged lizard plotting its escape. Want something else? Check out the . name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: This is essential to preserve freedom
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a51adf4d112e4994902b629096f946e4&_e=woB8aJAoxnROVFuZdwiedsqgLJZ9M0SrFXW7WBMSZvZMhyJxl6BzHYghls40OuDjB6ByOyewws6_hVIWVYM_OFEFVRkLzVjLGHbLewbZd1kEVyA3J94qFRqyaLyg8NWPYV1Is2wNhE7kEy45bYOBsJLf1p-ZjbRg8IarayFCRcyGjcvRcBGs5tDpSigYVbM3YUpf-8D0H0tpYdDSupqJxBGGk_ZqCHSCDAGmXbXa5mtFI8LccafYKp-5AQOzjZPD7PoIdLUOWJiGPHOQ6Chr7BnsGcgmaWG03wzBFapXCnmfrAsJmLtzYUd5iBmpBQnJmdzGfYqkWDBfxkuO7mpbArg8TVKbmGigjqizQPrfO1CHw_069yEsK4SMA1trrpkv) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's **Second Amendment Survey** because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? ## There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a51adf4d112e4994902b629096f946e4&_e=woB8aJAoxnROVFuZdwiedsqgLJZ9M0SrFXW7WBMSZvZMhyJxl6BzHYghls40OuDjB6ByOyewws6_hVIWVYM_OFEFVRkLzVjLGHbLewbZd1kEVyA3J94qFRqyaLyg8NWPYV1Is2wNhE7kEy45bYOBsJLf1p-ZjbRg8IarayFCRcyGjcvRcBGs5tDpSigYVbM3YUpf-8D0H0tpYdDSupqJxBGGk_ZqCHSCDAGmXbXa5mvEyn4TFtXSM-vwVs2WAFFD0oATUjLeeUciaij0rBjfWbtwI4SF0UI_Xj-kqG_flwVORihY3iK-h0Tf0cDaqk1VA3QbknJxZy0f1ltecVSekw1EpJgSf2LJrk6usgfakPh7vgJdyaDE-w9tnXvcoyj0) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: This is essential to preserve freedom
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iTfP9xPp3ik1nzGHSIZ8WA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRIpCP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1LzJhLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NzNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTJhX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyMzExMjVXA3NwY0IKZV_e3mFlay34sFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iTfP9xPp3ik1nzGHSIZ8WA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRIpCP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1LzJhLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NzNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTJhX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyMzExMjVXA3NwY0IKZV_e3mFlay34sFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")

## There is a coordinated effort underway to undermine the Constitution, including the Second Amendment.
[AGREE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iTfP9xPp3ik1nzGHSIZ8WA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRIpCP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1LzJhLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NzNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTJhX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyMzExMjVXA3NwY0IKZV_e3mFlay34sFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) [DISAGREE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iTfP9xPp3ik1nzGHSIZ8WA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRIpCP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1LzJhLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NzNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTJhX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyMzExMjVXA3NwY0IKZV_e3mFlay34sFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) [NOT SURE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iTfP9xPp3ik1nzGHSIZ8WA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRIpCP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1LzJhLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NzNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTJhX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyMzExMjVXA3NwY0IKZV_e3mFlay34sFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iTfP9xPp3ik1nzGHSIZ8WA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRIpCP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1LzJhLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NzNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTJhX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyMzExMjVXA3NwY0IKZV_e3mFlay34sFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iTfP9xPp3ik1nzGHSIZ8WA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRIpCP0SbaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1LzJhLXN1cnZleS8_c2M9MDA1NzNOMDI0MkwwQURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTJhX3N1cnZleSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1ZRVNOT19QQS1ST04tMjAyMzExMjVXA3NwY0IKZV_e3mFlay34sFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it 's more important to DO something about it.** That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: For the holidays
body:
something to consider | | | | | |
---
[](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=fc22029545&e=b2e0e42b55)
|
---
Peter,
I’ve mentioned to you that I own a bag company. We’ve raised [tens of thousands for veterans](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=5d2054cd22&e=b2e0e42b55) and are committed to our products being American Made. We also have licenses with all NFL teams and dozens of college teams. Today, I wanted to let you know we’re offering [25% off all products](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=662c9c542a&e=b2e0e42b55) for the holiday season. Please support American-made products this Christmas season. You can see every team and bag we have by clicking the [image below](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=888a5158ff&e=b2e0e42b55):
[](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=2b7f89d07d&e=b2e0e42b55)
You can also still buy our [Flag Bag collection](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=daf3b80868&e=b2e0e42b55) by [clicking here](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=e35dce2a74&e=b2e0e42b55) for the patriot in your life. These bags have been featured on [Fox News](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=ec236fd230&e=b2e0e42b55), and they’ve helped veterans’ physical and mental health.
This Christmas season, I hope you’ll consider [buying one of these heirlooms](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=b9a8db18e5&e=b2e0e42b55) that last a lifetime. Always American made, always timeless, and based in Minnesota. Support a local company that is doing things the right way. Thank you for your consideration. Give this [gift to someone](https://mattbirk.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ce1d8ace27817bbd55d7ad20&id=c5e5d9f1e1&e=b2e0e42b55) who has everything this Christmas season.

In Freedom,
Matt Birk

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: With gratitude, a humble request:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Polls are dropping in Arizona regularly, showing how competitive this race is going to be.
#

Peter:
I’ve got a humble request for you, and I want to get it to you early this morning so you can enjoy the rest of your day.
I need to ask you to make a donation to help us defeat Kari Lake in Arizona. But before I ask, I want to tell you just how grateful I am for everything you’ve done to get us to this point.
When I launched this campaign we had a historic number of donations. That’s helped us build a campaign that can go the distance and win next November. And when Kari Lake jumped in this race, thousands and thousands more of you came in and had my back. It’s extremely humbling, and I can’t express how thankful I am for that.
But now, the real work starts.
Polls are dropping in Arizona regularly, showing how competitive this race is going to be. Our margins in the Senate are paper thin with Joe Manchin no longer seeking re-election. And the NRSC just released their first attack ad of the cycle against me, with more sure to follow.
If Kari Lake were just some run-of-the-mill Republican, the stakes might not be quite so high. But she is extremely dangerous... a threat to our democracy itself.
We have to do everything we can to take Arizona’s seat back, everything we can to keep Kari Lake out of the Senate. To do it, we’re setting a 15,000 donation goal to raise the resources we need before the end of the month.
So please, with gratitude, I’m humbly asking:
[**If you can, make your first donation to my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself. With thousands of people joining you, it adds up really quickly.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-nov23.azuTO_&refcode=em231125-1-f&t=1&akid=1481%2E734936%2ERtOy4-)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-nov23.aZOhHW&refcode=em231125-1-f&t=20&akid=1481%2E734936%2ERtOy4-)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-nov23.Qbnb2l&refcode=em231125-1-f&t=21&akid=1481%2E734936%2ERtOy4-)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-nov23.vL6Lqu&refcode=em231125-1-f&t=22&akid=1481%2E734936%2ERtOy4-)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-nov23.Vx4UJF&refcode=em231125-1-f&t=23&akid=1481%2E734936%2ERtOy4-)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-nov23.qoudqp&refcode=em231125-1-f&t=24&akid=1481%2E734936%2ERtOy4-)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-nov23.eTtrZ1&refcode=em231125-1-f&t=25&akid=1481%2E734936%2ERtOy4-)**
---
****
I’m going to check back in over the next several days to see our progress towards that goal. I’ll be sure to let you know how we’re doing, too.
Proud to be with you in this, Peter.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

name: LCV Clean Transportation Team
subject: We need to ramp up the pressure to demand cleaner cars. Send a message to President Biden TODAY.
body:
|
---
| | **
Urge President Biden: Protect the Climate and
Our Health from Deadly Tailpipe Emissions**
Tailpipe emissions from cars, SUVs, and heavy trucks are the leading cause of climate change in the United States. Each year, this pollution also cuts short tens of thousands of lives and leaves even more people with respiratory diseases like asthma.

[Take action today: tell the BIden administration to adopt stronger clean car and truck standards. Help us reach 8,000 signatures.](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
---
**[**TAKE ACTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

** **
|
The Biden administration is currently finalizing stronger tailpipe emissions standards from cars, SUVs, and heavy trucks. Our movement has delivered _thousands_ of letters to federal agencies supporting cleaner cars, but we need to keep the momentum going to make it a reality.

This is a critical time, Peter -- these emissions are the leading cause of climate change in the United States and cut short tens of thousands of lives each year. Because this is so important, _President Biden needs to hear from us directly_.

**Environmentalists like you have a _real chance_ to weigh in and convince the White House to go big for the sake of our climate and our health.** If we don't speak out right now, corporate polluters will weaken the tailpipe standards, keeping our communities at risk.****

[Please take action right now. Tell President Biden to adopt stronger tailpipe emissions standards. It only takes a few seconds to add your name and bring us closer to our goal to deliver 8,000 letters supporting stronger protections.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Here's the problem: many of the largest corporations on the planet are fighting against improvements to the EPA's emissions standards. They are pulling out all the stops, lobbying the Biden administration and Congress to maintain the status quo or go much too slow.

This pollution harms everyone, especially communities living near highways, ports, freight hubs, and anywhere with lots of traffic. Low-wealth communities and communities of color are often hit hardest. By strengthening emissions standards, the EPA would protect us from tailpipe emissions while accelerating clean vehicle adoption and other clean energy investments.

The Biden administration can and must go further and faster to address the urgent public health and climate crises. To do that, **the EPA must adopt the strongest possible standards that get us close to 100% clean vehicles sold by 2035.**

This is a really important moment, Peter. **We may never have a better opportunity to combat the leading cause of climate change** in the U.S. while protecting vulnerable communities from harmful emissions.

[That's why we're asking: take a moment to add your name. Join thousands of LCV supporters who are urging President Biden to adopt stronger tailpipe emissions standards. You'll help tackle the climate crisis and bring us closer to our goal.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thank you for everything you do, Peter. We'll be in touch soon with more updates on our campaign.

Onward,

LCV Clean Transportation Team |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10263275&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDQ2MDg3MQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDQ2MDg3MQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10263275&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDQ2MDg3MQS2&spReportId=MTg2MDQ2MDg3MQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Conservatives and the next generation
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571401?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**When Hamas launched horrific attacks on Israel, anti-Israel protests swept college campuses across America.** Before Israel had had time to bury her dead, leftist students and academics oozed anti-Israeli hatred.

**‘Woke’ ideas on college campus clearly have real world consequences.** Forty years after Allan Bloom wrote _The Closing of the American Mind_ , everything he warned about has come to pass – and then some.

**Abandoning the Western canon has not widened horizons for young Americans. It has narrowed them.** Ignoring classical thought and key figures in Western philosophy has not better equipped America to deal with the wider world. It has made it far harder.

**As American academia has embraced moral and cultural relativism, it has often produced academics with little of value to teach anyone. **Everything of worth and beauty is seen through the sterile prism of identity. (Incidentally, have you ever met a ‘woke’ person that was happy?)

Instead of lamenting this, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy has done something about it. **Two years ago, we launched the Mississippi Leadership Academy designed to give young Mississippians the mind-set they need to be agents for change in their state.**

We give participants practical insights, with lessons on how laws are made, the role of the Governor or the State Auditor. We also give them insights into some of the building blocks of conservative thought; How do free markets work? Why did the Founding Fathers manage to produce such a successful republic? Why is the West so much more innovative than the rest?

**This year, for the first time, we have started to record each of the course sessions and put them online.** Although we have about 20 students sitting in on each class, I am delighted to say that over the past couple of weeks several hundred have watched the sessions online.

You can watch some of our sessions here:
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7265e3c6e0&e=5703353baa)
---
Click above to watch some of our sessions:
| **Our Leadership Academy is the antidote to woke. It is also a lot of fun.** Last year, about a third of our graduates either worked or interned for state leaders.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=8a8c7acd89&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=b091b6c384) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=b091b6c384).

_Copyright © 2023 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

since last Thanksgiving, according to data published by the U.S.
Treasury. That works out to approximately $7,304.03 for every one of
the 335,765,877 persons in the United States, as per the Census
Bureau’s current population estimate.

Israel-Hamas Conflict Increases Risk Of Islamist Terrorist Attacks In
Europe, Officials Say

The risk of terrorist attacks in Europe by Islamists radicalized by
the Israel-Hamas conflict is on the rise, European security officials
told Reuters. Intelligence and police officials in several European
countries, including Germany, France and Britain, said that they are
increasing their surveillance of Islamist militants, according to
Reuters.

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VdCrvxL75jkObz5idFxUPA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRKZiP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNVcDc3BjQgplX-n6YWW-NWzHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VdCrvxL75jkObz5idFxUPA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRKZiP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNVcDc3BjQgplX-n6YWW-NWzHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VdCrvxL75jkObz5idFxUPA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRKZiP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNVcDc3BjQgplX-n6YWW-NWzHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VdCrvxL75jkObz5idFxUPA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRKZiP0THaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtY3MtbGV3aXMtY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5LWR2ZD9zYz0wMDIyM04wMjQyTDE1RE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y3NfbGV3aXNfY2hyaXN0aWFuaXR5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNVcDc3BjQgplX-n6YWW-NWzHUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: This judge is ensuring that President Trump does not receive a fair trial.
body:
Judge Engoron must be removed from Trump’s case in NY if we want justice to be upheld...
| Friend, I am urgently reaching out to my top supporters to update you on the status of the politically motivated show trial against President Trump in New York. name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=280eee4b20474180a2733675f851096f&_e=VR1hyt99h14Ie5tSWZNWbxW36tVXynMQXf-TPIZRH54ZZA7qv6W1S7TQF6UmiIz8dhK9r3ycymznE0kYPq02kgpKB6ASYh9R15i80gH7r0Tj4oHAH9WIkO_orwUr76fOzUEj4ABKIbC9lba1dmaBTHqjcE7ggBDvJKhyH-KatZ0iOLoKhXRQ3mxzumM-bs0FNmTVEhg8c0XRz3rvniRH2L5OV85QnZ4umsDu8-Dy8L5PUBwc00jAoba9Xv6MODk16wmJ78B6-ic3vCZDDn_ZVKZ5Cg1jqsPwmxTqZ6d7MLY-Z3jE7tK2DhcWJz4Cbz_jX_0KideM-vP7VRNoqbsAQx9HYKEf9JIjmwvQSsF80BOLfr5_kR5Q0scqfX0hAvu8cl1pttZTLQY8JPPCSDoQ1TYVmqfGAtpez-X6KO2q4J_vcEFU7c8yi_VpDhopmDJe)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=280eee4b20474180a2733675f851096f&_e=VR1hyt99h14Ie5tSWZNWbxW36tVXynMQXf-TPIZRH54ZZA7qv6W1S7TQF6UmiIz8dhK9r3ycymznE0kYPq02kgpKB6ASYh9R15i80gH7r0Tj4oHAH9WIkO_orwUr76fOzUEj4ABKIbC9lba1dmaBTHqjcE7ggBDvJKhyH-KatZ0iOLoKhXRQ3mxzumM-bs0FNmTVEhg8c0XRz3rvniRH2L5OV85QnZ4umsDu8-Dy8L5PUBwc00jAoba9Xv6MODk16wmJ78B6-ic3vCZDDn_ZVGXx-MrQpf9U7LX_ezw6-FRikBm1uHu14DYNkvkChFRyi9iSlQDron_FEncLycuLLFwTnlHMvt2l7wl4dmzWy82Kc667WyeFvLJI_DuHUS0vCMZoEm-ZZ0ygGs7XPrGS-Y2loo-eTaqIirfk6p4sXqBfzcP7zrK2whDm86VT-72o)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=280eee4b20474180a2733675f851096f&_e=VR1hyt99h14Ie5tSWZNWbxW36tVXynMQXf-TPIZRH54ZZA7qv6W1S7TQF6UmiIz8dhK9r3ycymznE0kYPq02kgpKB6ASYh9R15i80gH7r0Tj4oHAH9WIkO_orwUr76fOzUEj4ABKIbC9lba1dmaBTHqjcE7ggBDvJKhyH-KatZ0iOLoKhXRQ3mxzumM-bs0FNmTVEhg8c0XRz3rvniRH2L5OV85QnZ4umsDu8-Dy8L5PUBwc00jAoba9Xv6MODk16wmJ78B6-ic3vCZDDn_ZVDxwgA3GUviNZvW0DGoDvK4iqAUa-5Cp0nH7T88yL0pNIHcpLbObqswXyOfwV3FVg26O6aDT9e7bfwUSEfhsy6u8AKUq9tJtCzfkZEC6Zp8LVzgiDF7ozc2IGFQeNXouP-t-aBqC3T9toXuRRh8qE4-Z0nXSSxaogGozocoJ7EVR)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=280eee4b20474180a2733675f851096f&_e=VR1hyt99h14Ie5tSWZNWbxW36tVXynMQXf-TPIZRH54ZZA7qv6W1S7TQF6UmiIz8dhK9r3ycymznE0kYPq02kgpKB6ASYh9R15i80gH7r0Tj4oHAH9WIkO_orwUr76fOzUEj4ABKIbC9lba1dmaBTHqjcE7ggBDvJKhyH-KatZ0iOLoKhXRQ3mxzumM-bs0FNmTVEhg8c0XRz3rvniRH2L5OV85QnZ4umsDu8-Dy8L5PUBwc00jAoba9Xv6MODk16wmJ78B6-ic3vCZDDn_ZVG3CbrbW2orDR1sKFam8_XEY9LtItjvak1j72aLv2dfsOoSHzA_3jg4HRQiFS38jlrFl27e7en65vtBbMeRVl1HqXMj_eEXe8CNjgSLXPaxQuJjniwuYHp0SDrYvNVNgsDDsKkpt1uwodl63JlZF0Dpxp93ghHoLduLzkcCgF5L0).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=280eee4b20474180a2733675f851096f&_t=Y-1RGudW2paBwGFfXNwMw_aeojSSV_Ynbb7xzxCR7Irv_4dioCjzsH8PrhHLBld30rAitc1HjHze9HtoDDz_ZyzZ5j6mrbUrfQ37Lfktxr6eKTRdJaw3bYJVoTJ5uPfJyuM9DEiZngZXrZbhb5B1gZMQ3NHKfufte5TJtcQ7dms%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=280eee4b20474180a2733675f851096f&_e=UQPgADW8OvZ5x5Z5PM69U-XLdfjGaIVMqBUrdIkwmN9vMmELY01DrK88g3ddXY9HaejTggX1khgCwPYdAF_AIAxqTT-mFwxDFtDWqVPb9qcY3JMmkRcz_IWm_4V1HmNlyJpPzDT1tuHpz4Bnm6Ekcc4RdyzOf5oPT709AF-DWyrQ0aWf6xI0GrjCBv1JwmcUfNDaXZpJ5tREL00EDjAPqpeJG64qQnhRY1vHvJxQ28WrgCwdK4sBLKP26ubTld4wjs5keWWUVZxClwW-3R5qbg%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=280eee4b20474180a2733675f851096f&_e=VR1hyt99h14Ie5tSWZNWb-IfY1vLGbWHqleOakCO_TtCvDh8MTmGnASP0kZgbJEogMEdylRKewIwwsZqW8hJkFG1y4QJAmn5PFvPoPFRwno9cU72IlV5UFwQQSFxMyAFkjN7WauEFaD9g6fMboxMeyd56VSwfXSV2ggFzZNAG-eIsW_klX-DZBI9d5-x0f-Ssn-nHkUL2t3gyLXugbUHy56sipnNepHyhxMazvEVHM0%3D)_

This is the momentum we need!! We’re so close to flipping the House and regaining a gun violence prevention majority.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Emailing for just $8
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=844%2E135344%2Evd9nLw)

Hey there -- we're writing to ask you to make an $8 donation today to support Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate in Michigan.
Why $8? Because that’s the cost of a 6-pack of Michigan’s famous Vernors Ginger Ale -- one of the most quintessential Michigan staples known to all residents of our great state. We drink it at barbecues, at the game, and when our kids have a stomach ache.
The truth is that as strange as it sounds, these small dollar donations really do matter. It takes a village to elect a leader like Elissa to the Senate, and it’s so important that we maintain a steady pace of support.
Last month, we had our first serious Republican opponent, Mike Rogers, enter the race. His latest FEC report was filled with donations from a bunch of members of Betsy DeVos's family -- contributions totaling $46,200 all made on one single day. And there are plenty of other deep-pocketed Republican donors who are backing his campaign because they know that their path to control the Senate runs right through Michigan.
With public polling showing our race in a dead heat, we have to be prepared to match our Republican opponent dollar-for-dollar so we can defend this open seat and protect our slim Democratic Senate majority.
We know that $8 may not sound like a lot on its own. But trust us that we wouldn’t keep asking if it didn’t add up when there are hundreds of people chipping in and showing their support. It’s how we’ve won our past campaigns and it’s how we plan to keep up the momentum to win this race too.
[**If you are able, will you make an $8 contribution to our campaign for Senate today? It’s not as much about how much you give, but how many people are coming together to show their support for Elissa and this campaign.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231125-1-tt&t=2&akid=844%2E135344%2Evd9nLw)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $8](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1405?c0=ebs-em-nov23.MIa2th&refcode=em231125-1-tt&t=3&akid=844%2E135344%2Evd9nLw)**
Thank you,
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=844%2E135344%2Evd9nLw).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=844%2E135344%2Evd9nLw)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

| I'm catching up on my 'Honey Do" list before I bag a RINO in the Spring.
We can do better than Good. Bob Good has a history of helping Democrats.
1\. He betrayed Trump.
2\. Bob continues to support a 3 time Democrat in Louisa County who continues to raise taxes. #DemocratDuane
3\. Bob cost us the House & the Senate by ousting the Speaker with no plan. This also prevented us from timely helping Israel.
4\. Bob bullies fellow Republicans including Senior Citizens. I have heard several people say "that's just Bob." Those who keep giving him a pass for this wrongful behavior are complicit.
"I got mine, the heck with the team". While everyone was fighting across Virginia to help fellow Republicans win the House and the Senate, Bob was helping Bob. Everyone knows I align with Speaker Mike Johnson, but Bob Good should have waited until after November 7 for the speaker fight. Due to this lack of discipline and foresight, the Democrats are going to advance terrible amendments to the Virginia Constitution. Bob Good and his cronies refuse to discuss how Bob Good betrayed Trump first in 2016 and now in 2023. Instead they pivot and lamely try to connect me to McCarthy. I have never had a conversation with McCarthy. But you know who has taken a ton of money from McCarthy? Bob Good.
To learn more, [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m7E25jXdr5MWiydK-DQpg5dO69-OI3fSyMKiSRqOjne7Bf_8Xl0khsFe9SRP5SBy3K55Ln4Xl7_V9JMX_ZKZ3BgleJ7dF30b03-NO06zGVPAr8yWskXx4DnGhYCZCQSN-ujvB41G7A1tp3RiKgvIYQ==&c=FBGVoIEG6JGh_V1UWcTcjUmwodpVaZ6zq8RzczmLqlB8U80TIFpn2g==&ch=zZ84NQMk-s6JkT9Sc1VcPlk5ihYBayIEki4sppSkvVHU0aQtTxjZEw==)

Here is some of what has been on my mind and some of what I have been up to:

| Happy Thanksgiving! Thank you to our first responders including our dispatchers who work every day, regardless of the circumstance! We would not have a country without you. Many give up their holiday with family so we can spend the day with ours! During my time as a Navy SEAL, my team and I missed many holidays with our families while deployed. So this Thanksgiving I visited and thanked our first responders and dispatchers in all 24 localities in the 5th Congressional District. I made many new friends and learned new ways we can work together to improve Virginia. Thank you!
FYI, I get 600 miles on a full tank of gas and I filled my truck up twice in just one day!

Congressman Bob Good abandoned our President Trump and endorsed a different candidate. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the fifth Congressional District loves the America First Agenda!
I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | How To Bag A RINO | == | I'm catching up on my 'Honey Do" list before I bag a RINO in the Spring. We can do better than Good. Bob Good has a history of helping Democrats. 1\. He betrayed Trump. 2\. Bob continues to support a 3 time Democrat in Louisa County who continues to raise taxes. #DemocratDuane 3\. Bob cost us the House & the Senate by ousting the Speaker with no plan. This also prevented us from timely helping Israel. 4\. Bob bullies fellow Republicans including Senior Citizens. I have heard several people say "that's just Bob." Those who keep giving him a pass for this wrongful behavior are complicit. "I got mine, the heck with the team". While everyone was fighting across Virginia to help fellow Republicans win the House and the Senate, Bob was helping Bob. Everyone knows I align with Speaker Mike Johnson, but Bob Good should have waited until after November 7 for the speaker fight. Due to this lack of discipline and foresight, the Democrats are going to advance terrible amendments to the Virginia Constitution. Bob Good and his cronies refuse to discuss how Bob Good betrayed Trump first in 2016 and now in 2023. Instead they pivot and lamely try to connect me to McCarthy. I have never had a conversation with McCarthy. But you know who has taken a ton of money from McCarthy? Bob Good. To learn more, == | Legislation | I have been submitting legislation this week to make life better for fellow Virginians. The first bill I submitted for draft last week for the upcoming General Assembly session was Sage's Law, also known as the Child Protection Act. If you have ideas for legislation, please send them. Here is some of what has been on my mind and some of what I have been up to: | Thank You to Our First Responders | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Happy Thanksgiving! Thank you to our first responders including our dispatchers who work every day, regardless of the circumstance! We would not have a country without you. Many give up their holiday with family so we can spend the day with ours! During my time as a Navy SEAL, my team and I missed many holidays with our families while deployed. So this Thanksgiving I visited and thanked our first responders and dispatchers in all 24 localities in the 5th Congressional District. I made many new friends and learned new ways we can work together to improve Virginia. Thank you! FYI, I get 600 miles on a full tank of gas and I filled my truck up twice in just one day! | More America Last Policies | | Democrat policies across the country continue to put fellow Americans last. We need Trump and America First policies back! | I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving! Our best days are still ahead of us. I'm running for Congress to help Trump Save America from radical Marxist policies that put America last. Congressman Bob Good abandoned our President Trump and endorsed a different candidate. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the fifth Congressional District loves the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! VA 5 Counties: Albemarle County (partial) Lynchburg City Pittsylvania County Campbell County Charlottesville City Louisa County Danville City Halifax County Powhatan County Bedford County (partial) Mecklenburg County Amherst County Goochland County Fluvanna County Hanover County (partial) Prince Edward County Appomattox County Nelson County Buckingham County Amelia County Nottoway County Charlotte County Lunenburg County Cumberland County == | == | | | | == | | | | For God and Country, Delegate John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun == The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA New Email: john@mcguireva.com New Website: www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

body:
Get all the info you need right here.

| Dear Reader, [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf55a1d1d67e42efa020bdc2bd38f36b&_e=QYblhNKRezbaBPU3PgiZxGqOemxpeM-Lpr2OZSC0LyJkObhS-21KG1S0B2EyVv9CLDIwWdQOsT5MpElgidoDgycVZ1ygTgacJaKZC84u18_hwCTPJhYAwqWtTvhvC2t0pywF1zE4SQiubzK9k5YsMD1VAdpcCedDeIhrwINURDLmj6WDIf2esue_Ok08ugYd0pbQBHlW25n839isIswBWMcsdtC9ETFuqkLlYAClxL0dpQY8x03vDPL9bQgfQF0CdEWUek4oEN4EsCOWH6GlqOa8s145JSIa7yt22nSkfXs%3D) My name is Teeka Tiwari. When I was 20 years old, I became the youngest Vice President at Shearson Lehman, which was one of the largest investment-banking firms in the U.S. After working on Wall Street across three separate decades and even running my own hedge fund... I left and joined one of the largest publishers of independent financial research in the world. Today, we publish our ideas to more than 1.3 million everyday folks just like you. As a former money manager who lived and profited from the computer revolution, the dot com boom, and the crypto boom... I can tell you from personal experience that getting in on the ground floor of a tech breakthrough is the quickest way to build wealth. That's why I started covering artificial intelligence (AI) 8 years ago when most people thought it was just science fiction Fast-forward to today... My research has identified one company that could reward early investors with a windfall. (Hint: It's the company powering Elon Musk's latest AI venture.) And on Black Friday, you can get it all for just $7. That's $192 off the regular price of $199 for a full year of my financial research publication, The Palm Beach Letter. While most people spend money on Black Friday... Wouldn't it be nice to make some with a stake in Elon Musk's new AI project? **[Get all the info you need right here.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bf55a1d1d67e42efa020bdc2bd38f36b&_e=QYblhNKRezbaBPU3PgiZxGqOemxpeM-Lpr2OZSC0LyJkObhS-21KG1S0B2EyVv9CLDIwWdQOsT5MpElgidoDgycVZ1ygTgacJaKZC84u18_hwCTPJhYAwqWtTvhvC2t0pywF1zE4SQiubzK9k5YsMFRmiRJvaFM_ixGeQtljD49n81tLyR4gw6xuQAh5x9mrPw5V_pWQn-QHBnhQF9Ark6ClVSDgvEq0T4GllTp_EJM_g6_TBrhe8FaL85r3rbNMRH-Xsg59wmn5lfaLQJx36s7Y92map98bQ_CyhlasevY%3D)** Let the game come to you, Regards, |
---
Teeka Tiwari
Editor, Palm Beach Research Group

Defend the Constitution

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=65ddbd0c77a479ed5f57eaf8f542ba8aeb7a851e5b1ceda6e97b516e3a38219c119cac43b98f33ebdb728a228155c48976d31b91ca73593b7c38680e5f0f075e

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=65ddbd0c77a479ed5f57eaf8f542ba8aeb7a851e5b1ceda6e97b516e3a38219c119cac43b98f33ebdb728a228155c48976d31b91ca73593b7c38680e5f0f075e

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.
