name: Ted Cruz
subject: Chapter One: A Look at Our Nation’s Universities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, My new book is now available and the response has been tremendous. I’m truly grateful.

**This is an important read for every liberty-loving conservative patriot who wants to be part of the movement to _DEFEAT WOKE NONSENSE_ and restore America’s greatness!**

If you don’t have a copy yet, you can order _Unwoke: How to Defeat Cultural Marxism_ **[here](http://trk.tedcruz.-FNPKQjIxngQ_YTOw)** :
---
[**GET YOUR COPY**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
This book does two things: It walks through how anti-American Marxists have systematically worked to undermine our founding principles and destroy our nation, and even more importantly it lays out specific steps for how we stop the woke-left assault.

In Chapter One, I take a deep dive into how our nation’s institutions of higher education have been nearly completely overtaken by the left, as an early part of a deliberate “slow march through the institutions” by cultural Marxists bent on indoctrinating our youth.

**This opening chapter’s name – “The Universities: The Wuhan Labs of the Woke Virus” – is absolutely fitting.**

Here’s a key excerpt from Chapter One of **_[_Unwoke_](http://trk.tedcruz.-a874Th3BA)_** on how things once were:
---
“Encountering ideas you disagree with, even passionately, used to be an integral part of education. It certainly was when I was in college. Though I suspect many people would never guess it, I always respected the left-wing radicals I attended school with – at least the ones who appeared to have thought through their arguments in a serious way and to have considered the real-world implications of their ideas. In fact, two of my closest friends at Princeton were the successive heads of the liberal Whig party, even though we disagreed on just about every major issue of the day.

“At the time, of course, the phenomenon known as ‘political correctness’ was still in its infancy. The ideology had not yet made its way from Harvard and Yale down to campuses across the nation. That is, students who called themselves ‘liberal’ at the time were still somewhat tethered to reality. They could reliably define basic terms such as ‘woman’ if called upon to do so, and you didn’t have to be hauled into the dean’s office for messing up their they/them pronouns during a debate. It might surprise some people to learn that liberals in the late ’80s could debate without breaking down in tears or resorting to accusations that their opponents were ‘mansplaining,’ committing ‘microaggression,’ or ‘enacting White supremacy’ by disagreeing with them too vigorously.”
---
**[Order your copy of _Unwoke_ today to read more >>>](http://trk.tedcruz.-e-AGUo-plkTX5imKx6A)**

If you already have a copy, THANK YOU so much for your support and **[please consider pitching in a special contribution](http://trk.tedcruz.)** to fuel our fight at Team Cruz.

For Liberty,

clean_body: | | | Fellow Conservative, My new book is now available and the response has been tremendous. I’m truly grateful. This is an important read for every liberty-loving conservative patriot who wants to be part of the movement to DEFEAT WOKE NONSENSE and restore America’s greatness! If you don’t have a copy yet, you can order Unwoke: How to Defeat Cultural Marxism : This book does two things: It walks through how anti-American Marxists have systematically worked to undermine our founding principles and destroy our nation, and even more importantly it lays out specific steps for how we stop the woke-left assault. In Chapter One, I take a deep dive into how our nation’s institutions of higher education have been nearly completely overtaken by the left, as an early part of a deliberate “slow march through the institutions” by cultural Marxists bent on indoctrinating our youth. This opening chapter’s name – “The Universities: The Wuhan Labs of the Woke Virus” – is absolutely fitting. Here’s a key excerpt from Chapter One of on how things once were: “Encountering ideas you disagree with, even passionately, used to be an integral part of education. It certainly was when I was in college. Though I suspect many people would never guess it, I always respected the left-wing radicals I attended school with – at least the ones who appeared to have thought through their arguments in a serious way and to have considered the real-world implications of their ideas. In fact, two of my closest friends at Princeton were the successive heads of the liberal Whig party, even though we disagreed on just about every major issue of the day. “At the time, of course, the phenomenon known as ‘political correctness’ was still in its infancy. The ideology had not yet made its way from Harvard and Yale down to campuses across the nation. That is, students who called themselves ‘liberal’ at the time were still somewhat tethered to reality. They could reliably define basic terms such as ‘woman’ if called upon to do so, and you didn’t have to be hauled into the dean’s office for messing up their they/them pronouns during a debate. It might surprise some people to learn that liberals in the late ’80s could debate without breaking down in tears or resorting to accusations that their opponents were ‘mansplaining,’ committing ‘microaggression,’ or ‘enacting White supremacy’ by disagreeing with them too vigorously.” If you already have a copy, THANK YOU so much for your support and to fuel our fight at Team Cruz. body:
| | | Peter, It’s been a busy November, with voters for hundreds of our endorsed candidates going to the polls, and our activists and members continuing to boldly organize for the changes our country needs. There’s a lot to catch up on since our last roundup, so let's get to it!
* * *
**_WFP CHAMPIONS WIN RACES ACROSS THE COUNTRY_** On Election Day, voters from coast to coast turned out for WFP champions and powered some historic victories. In **Philadelphia,** WFP’s Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke won both minority party seats on the City Council — seats that before Kendra’s 2019 win had only ever gone to Republicans. The message was clear: Philadelphia is now a two-party town: Democrats, and the Working Families Party. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUAA_ZsDHEjuNkLQioRtAsoxklIwousTvispj8vj0mUf6Q9xZ4MBExHd0xt1bxRRdFP1aziFeCYvo8ll0b4H-8zVxZqxGUtFzi_9dLm2CClhQyUZ657jN3tjYa_f7-v0JtrAnWxI8obOy8o0JXIGF6JsWr9C6bMErL5RoZ4kfH2J4kgwObk7TG6Qxx1kmYVZ4RAZ6AbdZUEm5oJID9-dH8YJ4qCpX8pL9LZXkC5mmg78y-YzsKv-N4TZvZsY_7vLYOR7NP8twnVqkizKHay0bwpjxxUuL9_l4nrJmRAfSHLNe4alrYuLq2kNC0pOHbvckSmZjHa95XlZcNwkwel-44MVT14Acm2vfvPgQngndSmkGsTPSdWgTRBgd25TYXy7t_/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h0/E56BQQ8B_AijYXrJS2PCgGdpRjH8_yB40VztGNBHJFg) While elsewhere in **Pennsylvania,** climate champion Sara Innamorato toppled the party machine and became the first woman to be elected as Allegheny County Executive, and Dan McCaffery was elected to the PA Supreme Court, bolstering the pro-democracy majority ahead of the 2024 presidential election. In **Virginia,** we helped flip the House from Republican control and kept the Democratic majority in the state Senate, putting a stop to Gov. Glenn Youngkin’s entire right-wing, anti-abortion agenda. Our work included electing WFP-endorsed State Senators Danica Roem, Aaron Rouse and Stella Pekarsky, and Delegates Nadarius Clarke, Josh Thomas, Josh Cole, Michael Feggins, and Kelly Fowler. In **Ohio,** we threw down and helped push Issue 1 — which guaranteed the right to an abortion in the state constitution — across the finish line in a resounding win. In **New York** and **Connecticut,** hundreds of our champions won key mayoral and local races, including new mayors in New Rochelle and Ithaca, NY, our entire NYC City Council Slate, and two members of the Hartford City Council on the WFP ballot line. And we won more victories for WFP candidates in **Georgia, Colorado, New Jersey, California, North Carolina, Arizona, Washington, Texas, New Mexico, and more** — effectively growing our movement across the country and building strong infrastructure ahead of the 2024 elections. These wins and more could not be possible without members like you, who **sent 6 million texts, knocked on 600,000 doors, called 540,000 voters,** and **sent 30,000 postcards** to help elect WFP champions and win victories that will resonate now and for years to come — and which will make a real difference in the lives of working people.
* * *
**_CONTINUING THE PUSH FOR A PERMANENT CEASEFIRE IN GAZA_** A four-day truce is not enough. We’re continuing to build powerful momentum in the effort to achieve a real and lasting ceasefire in Gaza — **with 47 members of Congress now officially calling for an end to the violence.[Check our tracker here for up-to-date information on which congress members have joined the ceasefire movement.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMdk0Xc5F3XT7oWSkA6eoLnp5NdFj7WvclYQ3u4wqSHm9eS2HAEQY3Y8m-gY-Wx3Nb_QzsQMo1W-c3xOiLzwc_Bvdd2tSghC-qUkm2cq2sT1jTJxXRUY0t8w6tESHJce8wKpuZQWX0YtKcRIGbX5cLSMic0_BRohMRN0ahzFOfGBtDpwTzsIwowwlreAveYTuSSkl_TjhwJOVDVl-ChKYrVx5moxQ9pRB5F-h1uzo_ScJl2cvqu8TaRAgkzJjX8OEXycE8wUrYYuonSIGovHiKFtn8KiiXRnOpuItTXSC3ew/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h1/a0dJGhkwvUL96SEcJ3Q0_UJOe9T7-wZLs8NsC4BxRr8)** This is thanks in part to our fellow WFP members, who have **sent more than 8000 emails to their representatives, completed more than 2000 calls to their offices, and finished nearly 500 shifts at one of our Ceasefire Now phone banks.** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5bxrMh6DpGopZ2QuEF3QSjxgFjnZkTlKuevgZGzwTncKET1nqgy_6Ew0y5LsY3EHzXFViFhBjcCSRveOnAu8r4h4Tb43Lp2aeLCdPHygkjzoK0muwaR4ESNJ6c835TpMfUsX0d7SLQxPZ5tJoa9GRhrGG3UAb3XlD2Wah1u05r5zDfohdPv42cJDeBQ44A7qtMbX2AwPsVMLZ_2qYK1FQrB2wVGIiknL7pllsZSnoP_Sdx57wftoOnsDeipC-dnMRZ7ANVcbSwh991RwnuqyehFvwCq9-NDER9VXHIj8zV3Q/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h2/vWpfNLgKxCmsG_KDhf8c82SBRMPGQLzLjNeiUsnF8as) We can’t let up the pressure now. If you haven’t contacted your representatives yet, **[join the letter campaign to send an email to your congress member here,](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXdJUvH8Ygu3R43gD0WUPlZ5bxrMh6DpGopZ2QuEF3QSjxgFjnZkTlKuevgZGzwTncKET1nqgy_6Ew0y5LsY3EHzXFViFhBjcCSRveOnAu8r4h4Tb43Lp2aeLCdPHygkjzj7-F4dM33EuQ2WvU0aAK9UqQKHe8R4cvkBLzCPFIfPtQNTflcTyaDVRGGM6oI5C-iaopw0uPTESMxOmafnV5ZTGF6hrnE0MAop8bNwbkWdfJa-48abzwyAdiAGceYhQ27Y4p2Evf35mUjiZ2wxsJnx1KlKJ4pkNh2TP9DeIpR41ynPTG_xVWZ9VexzfuSRc9g/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h3/cwMetPavE4ikNGcu12gw5iagosaquNEN8KCiPVI-Et0)** then **text CEASEFIRE to 30403 to call their office.**
* * *
**_FREE HOLIDAY POSTCARDS FOR YOUR LOVED ONES_** This holiday season, our sibling organization Working Families Power is launching a new project to let you **deliver delight and democracy to the people in your life by mailing them a free, personalized new year’s postcard!** Your holiday postcards will feature your photo, a wish for a happy new year, and a call to action in 2024. [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-ehKmLPD3QmsBrW3I5u3erGtWWmG3_qKqh6B1I5AkdpNc7O40PKP7IPYZP2LdqU72IQaFA4m2b-BoBXcGovpQM4EO3bmKtaH__tLuHdg0fAMGu9xGmjaSyQa9ve7zwe-vLOwN9hBuBgH8QasIyo9WEuBOVPnbaqxfvAt7CWQBayAmqPMsl1ZwYflygbbS1w7KH2iNtFv6hdUaVR6QVenpKna3Vq2z8fAP5F4v4hDY7vuER4DSPg_V74L3boBa3u8q8/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h4/PDfzmlZ2GA1hqqulY_2do3rLbRoavjBJaoao0aqeoiQ) **The best part?** Your postcards are completely free and so simple to make — just upload a photo and make a list of your friends and family in an easy app, and Working Families Power will handle the rest! To get your holiday postcards, you can **[sign up for an upcoming virtual postcard event,](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-dUWhsnbr2g4JfJ9z4mUNpcCyU9NMFawsYRi-siBdF1cFv_PiU_kKpHuUGYM-_P3_zCXumS8JIIB8UNTWQIrKqpxm2G7OIxr9MCmHy632F12RECa6HtF5xR4aJLZBij3d-JhknNheW-HG5vZqU6plr4nyszFdG2TTSu0lB0EfJK8Ws6Lo5JJrU1PKUA5pQutItDOlRLKBtLfpMTk-SIKL1hOLWRHF5Yg4CQTM-X1Lva_Cgc1PSOBXD4JsxXmYb8Z6A/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h5/yipGdWe0TurQlVWb_LwbgFfHXfHIvyx3hYkuTHNWnl0) [host an in-person postcard party,](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-e1yB8Me0SvIE5rcCchDl2H9TTrJQkIRwIK7jzDIzU47K3p1FB8OUWDjUrN4fmryBjEJZRJM5GGXSKFh1MC09XLqeWGjLW7ZQrE1RSZckKa-Ka8nBz6SFJtWtPTJOOqVKOrFDVj7W-vzPUbnGVzbpn9zdS3QI1JnE3X2h-vcwz9F3dMc7Fm1SS-DNXJzOiwPE7fXFg7trmzISlPqtOR4Eu_ha5n9nv6Glfya6gnoq-0rjs29_KUsN_D27p8TpqzZWaqHYkwXdPmqAr4ellPzk-AJnKmvOozrQs7jE20QHAvtA/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h6/FtZnK2iG5-Kk5lJGp2kFxUdeG2LtoskIxfPLxpSkZr0)** or **[get instructions to send on your own schedule!](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-ehKmLPD3QmsBrW3I5u3erGtWWmG3_qKqh6B1I5AkdpNc7O40PKP7IPYZP2LdqU72IW5cTg8V4OzTrMErcoC_zlkBwLTjmN3VksJfaTl8KAe8jquHMnP7sF2_bozJpATzW0EBBJUYIP_tiMSuV8-pXvRcxOYadXDtcazmd3KoYMQ9Khjg9xhRiBJBzbDAgQQjo0SaMXra_rEVOx6XuYdS6XcUpKG9crPWkMCJ7W4aMRDUWdDFeq3vw2bFSLbYU2_rM/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h7/znA1eeDcq6Sh4P55F3Hpch4QPsoy3F9H8NHgXzyekAc)**
* * *
**_WGA, UAW, and SAG-AFTRA UNIONS WIN MASSIVE VICTORIES_** Following a Hot Labor Summer, we’ve firmly entered Find Out Fall, when some of the nation’s largest corporations are discovering that **when organized workers stand together against unfair treatment, these corporations have no choice but to finally negotiate contracts that treat workers with respect.** Last month, the **Writers Guild of America** ratified their contract with the Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers, winning livable wages, increased job security, protections against replacement by AI, and more. This ended a strike of 148 days — a duration that was only possible because of the solidarity shown by union workers and supporters. Their strike was joined in July by the union actors at **SAG-AFTRA,** whose members began voting on a new contract last week. This $1 billion-plus contract would increase residual payments (which were often only pennies at a time), fairly count performance on streaming platforms, and enact new protections against digital likenesses of actors being used and manipulated without consent. Lastly, the **United Auto Workers** ratified new contracts with the Big Three automotive companies (Ford, Stellantis, and GM) earlier this week. UAW workers won pay raises and cost-of-living adjustments, the elimination of wage tiers, and commitments to create thousands of jobs building electric vehicles and batteries. Unions have transformed our country for the better for over a hundred years — from these recent victories to the creation of the weekend. **[If you’re interested in bringing this worker power to your job, check out our guide on how to create a union here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7TbAaF8ETHwDmaArOPp0lXS58ScjwkcJtEnDpfVVXoKTJH-6bH1ms9ZSeROeJwr1ZbnaKAEMFdkOi-UsGDAmzG2qst92jiWAuSwUaPAx-_8F36oQfD1bEi4C_sKND_Hi8853vyGKbGeSD0BXulQvzV8-OBTota9c2YUqRp6Q_FFTDHgcYuTQpqyBfvkAVviiRRWY5B8iJ1agk9OvZOIWWUMasIzWfcraNWWtLJE044oeWUdgSS6eQSrV37SrLpgF1DNTDVBWE9rWq0MgNz7diBiRQjLdaRss-lpv9N2SwbNbYuf8rTHXDNUNnJrseCreog/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h8/b6uMTvS5H-cbWs8nuxQunz9eh0jcOyxmRJ4Ubj3hIv0)**
* * *
**_KICKING OFF THE 2024 CYCLE WITH CONGRESSIONAL CHAMPIONS_** **Following huge victories in 2023, we’re kicking off the 2024 election cycle by re-endorsing some of our most boldly progressive leaders in Congress, including Summer Lee and Cori Bush.** **Summer Lee** overcame millions of dollars in right-wing PAC money in 2022 to become the first Black woman elected to Congress from Pennsylvania — and has since proven herself as one of the most progressive members of Congress to ever serve her state. She has led with a commitment to fighting for people over corporations and communities over special interests. **Cori Bush** has put the working families of St. Louis and the entire country front and center. She’s a relentless advocate for racial, social, health care, and environmental justice — as well as one of the first leaders to courageously stand up and call for a ceasefire in Israel and Palestine in order to save lives. Now, both Summer and Cori are facing primary challengers as well as massive spending from the American Israel Public Affairs Committee, a lobbying group funded by Republican megadonors who will do everything they can to attack our champions and elect people who put their donors’ interests before the people they’re elected to represent. **[If you can, split a donation of $10 or any amount now between Summer Lee and Cori Bush’s campaigns as they prepare for the fight ahead.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU4ssA6oEhC13O7Mm0vsVbyBQyPCNt9OwFB9mb05jyMNx3qk3YGXa3hzKpiLjEzZ0KFT91EVvVrHB_XAfFAJgVILCGWLbAFsK9Ho1EUN2quWxl9bDowX8tLhjJXN3dpESfvs_xwhh3s8jkXb5Mfz9NExHmaQFzXZi2qZHcJMoJsWtKogSY9SDZtk8sPZvJZA5ipKJho-j77bOdvaq14Wg5-YN9GlhEh8U9MC-icgVQXM5fSPyBw76tH1rayw5_YAGELXXU4Ad3k5MyyJe2xtHNwwqgHbxRf8VII_sYdN5DW8zqU1x-ExD4Smt6PUHxRlFQftK-eIXGI9wj-Mc3BowMRgvN67qx3j0bVJ93HfyLHr9rPP-uccToxZSKksMXUtUU/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h9/LexuO_1oRcD3N1qGdome4IyVbqavx6X0-HYcQXwza-s)** **[Support Summer and Cori](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU4ssA6oEhC13O7Mm0vsVbyBQyPCNt9OwFB9mb05jyMNx3qk3YGXa3hzKpiLjEzZ0KlLJHE36YpXZ6R776nzm3bXeeIcuQ2JaMaAyQEDiyhcVhxl89pvUqhKpWVLUCBbEybpBLHlNT3AT-Hu_tww_yMnXs9U85_aVepjuRciVnHyOlxJOEOfERD9A95YsyoQcZsWZV59UPAzJ-uwY3MglOPcujp8nivdU39fnkxCPyvyc1KsZrGm2ijLXxMnEeB0B_VPCAp2qI8D7yWhXDhqFImJDTvAqn86PT3c9-QhvQINjJjInTD0_hz4Bo8htpk8SybkA8Nb4d0xNmQ-YjxcWDCTmzrNBP3sMdtDbwyBsg3HjxeREaJZljUB_LATABBCJi/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h10/lT_rhDxPrrMzhibk2m63Tylhcfu0c2CYoAkT03OS2Kg)**
* * *
**_SPOTLIGHT ON WFP MEMBER MARISA SALAS_** My name is Marisa Salas. I have been an organizer for more than 18 years. Organizing is my passion because when people come together to change things that one cannot change alone, the power of our voices resonates strongly and changes occur. I had the opportunity to collaborate at WFP talking to voters and listening to their problems and concerns and it was a very inspiring experience. And even more so that we talk about people like Nic and Kendra who care about the problems of our working class.
* * *
**_UPCOMING EVENTS_** **Deliver Delight and Democracy Postcard Parties:** You can join Working Families Power’s next Deliver Delight and Democracy Postcard Party on Thursday, November 30 at 3 PM ET/12 PM PT or 6 PM ET/3 PM PT! At the party, organizers will guide you through how to use the easy app to build your list of card recipients and upload a picture to feature. **[Check out the full list of upcoming virtual postcard parties here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDN_AKdF4M0u5pGQ87M_sP-dUWhsnbr2g4JfJ9z4mUNpcCyU9NMFawsYRi-siBdF1cFv_PiU_kKpHuUGYM-_P3_yZVu2SfWEG_-U_4DldesqXR5Oz2eRr87t_oKPwRgUcQ2P-tuWidrVUfx9HrLNacUXMbQa03TLVYHoRjCV0Kal1YckRu2zNN4jki9hccV5qOHnr74Ci3tDP1A7BuiFhCTImmuof70kHF3m4dRmpd5ZoyMDISihGzwZ7Pc7DyPanLAfoP-VG3OyeDi6ZMg7suL0/41l/_yIrPi2_Q-KX1066cJYIFA/h11/Cacd4N7IdN2pnkg3_An9pfwPKq2TmyRLToEenojJbvQ)** clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s been a busy November, with voters for hundreds of our endorsed candidates going to the polls, and our activists and members continuing to boldly organize for the changes our country needs. There’s a lot to catch up on since our last roundup, so let's get to it! WFP CHAMPIONS WIN RACES ACROSS THE COUNTRY On Election Day, voters from coast to coast turned out for WFP champions and powered some historic victories. In Philadelphia, WFP’s Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke won both minority party seats on the City Council — seats that before Kendra’s 2019 win had only ever gone to Republicans. The message was clear: Philadelphia is now a two-party town: Democrats, and the Working Families Party. While elsewhere in Pennsylvania, climate champion Sara Innamorato toppled the party machine and became the first woman to be elected as Allegheny County Executive, and Dan McCaffery was elected to the PA Supreme Court, bolstering the pro-democracy majority ahead of the 2024 presidential election. In Virginia, we helped flip the House from Republican control and kept the Democratic majority in the state Senate, putting a stop to Gov. Glenn Youngkin’s entire right-wing, anti-abortion agenda. Our work included electing WFP-endorsed State Senators Danica Roem, Aaron Rouse and Stella Pekarsky, and Delegates Nadarius Clarke, Josh Thomas, Josh Cole, Michael Feggins, and Kelly Fowler. In Ohio, we threw down and helped push Issue 1 — which guaranteed the right to an abortion in the state constitution — across the finish line in a resounding win. In New York and Connecticut, hundreds of our champions won key mayoral and local races, including new mayors in New Rochelle and Ithaca, NY, our entire NYC City Council Slate, and two members of the Hartford City Council on the WFP ballot line. And we won more victories for WFP candidates in Georgia, Colorado, New Jersey, California, North Carolina, Arizona, Washington, Texas, New Mexico, and more — effectively growing our movement across the country and building strong infrastructure ahead of the 2024 elections. These wins and more could not be possible without members like you, who sent 6 million texts, knocked on 600,000 doors, called 540,000 voters, and sent 30,000 postcards to help elect WFP champions and win victories that will resonate now and for years to come — and which will make a real difference in the lives of working people. CONTINUING THE PUSH FOR A PERMANENT CEASEFIRE IN GAZA A four-day truce is not enough. We’re continuing to build powerful momentum in the effort to achieve a real and lasting ceasefire in Gaza — with 47 members of Congress now officially calling for an end to the violence. This is thanks in part to our fellow WFP members, who have sent more than 8000 emails to their representatives, completed more than 2000 calls to their offices, and finished nearly 500 shifts at one of our Ceasefire Now phone banks. We can’t let up the pressure now. If you haven’t contacted your representatives yet, then text CEASEFIRE to 30403 to call their office. FREE HOLIDAY POSTCARDS FOR YOUR LOVED ONES This holiday season, our sibling organization Working Families Power is launching a new project to let you deliver delight and democracy to the people in your life by mailing them a free, personalized new year’s postcard! Your holiday postcards will feature your photo, a wish for a happy new year, and a call to action in 2024. The best part? Your postcards are completely free and so simple to make — just upload a photo and make a list of your friends and family in an easy app, and Working Families Power will handle the rest! To get your holiday postcards, you can or WGA, UAW, and SAG-AFTRA UNIONS WIN MASSIVE VICTORIES Following a Hot Labor Summer, we’ve firmly entered Find Out Fall, when some of the nation’s largest corporations are discovering that when organized workers stand together against unfair treatment, these corporations have no choice but to finally negotiate contracts that treat workers with respect. Last month, the Writers Guild of America ratified their contract with the Alliance of Motion Picture and Television Producers, winning livable wages, increased job security, protections against replacement by AI, and more. This ended a strike of 148 days — a duration that was only possible because of the solidarity shown by union workers and supporters. Their strike was joined in July by the union actors at SAG-AFTRA, whose members began voting on a new contract last week. This $1 billion-plus contract would increase residual payments (which were often only pennies at a time), fairly count performance on streaming platforms, and enact new protections against digital likenesses of actors being used and manipulated without consent. Lastly, the United Auto Workers ratified new contracts with the Big Three automotive companies (Ford, Stellantis, and GM) earlier this week. UAW workers won pay raises and cost-of-living adjustments, the elimination of wage tiers, and commitments to create thousands of jobs building electric vehicles and batteries. Unions have transformed our country for the better for over a hundred years — from these recent victories to the creation of the weekend. KICKING OFF THE 2024 CYCLE WITH CONGRESSIONAL CHAMPIONS Following huge victories in 2023, we’re kicking off the 2024 election cycle by re-endorsing some of our most boldly progressive leaders in Congress, including Summer Lee and Cori Bush. Summer Lee overcame millions of dollars in right-wing PAC money in 2022 to become the first Black woman elected to Congress from Pennsylvania — and has since proven herself as one of the most progressive members of Congress to ever serve her state. She has led with a commitment to fighting for people over corporations and communities over special interests. Cori Bush has put the working families of St. Louis and the entire country front and center. She’s a relentless advocate for racial, social, health care, and environmental justice — as well as one of the first leaders to courageously stand up and call for a ceasefire in Israel and Palestine in order to save lives. Now, both Summer and Cori are facing primary challengers as well as massive spending from the American Israel Public Affairs Committee, a lobbying group funded by Republican megadonors who will do everything they can to attack our champions and elect people who put their donors’ interests before the people they’re elected to represent. SPOTLIGHT ON WFP MEMBER MARISA SALAS My name is Marisa Salas. I have been an organizer for more than 18 years. Organizing is my passion because when people come together to change things that one cannot change alone, the power of our voices resonates strongly and changes occur. I had the opportunity to collaborate at WFP talking to voters and listening to their problems and concerns and it was a very inspiring experience. And even more so that we talk about people like Nic and Kendra who care about the problems of our working class. UPCOMING EVENTS Deliver Delight and Democracy Postcard Parties: You can join Working Families Power’s next Deliver Delight and Democracy Postcard Party on Thursday, November 30 at 3 PM ET/12 PM PT or 6 PM ET/3 PM PT! At the party, organizers will guide you through how to use the easy app to build your list of card recipients and upload a picture to feature. Or, WFP Study Group: Reading for the Revolution: On Tuesday, December 12 at 7 PM ET/4 PM PT, the WFP Study Group returns to discuss How the South Won the Civil War by Heather Cox Richardson — one of The Washington Post’s 50 Notable Works of Nonfiction in 2020. In the book, Heather Cox Richardson explores how the system that had sustained the South continued to weave itself into our nation’s fabric and identity. WFP Welcome Gathering: Our next WFP Welcome Gathering will be Thursday, December 14 at 7 PM ET/4 PM PT! As we celebrate our victories and spend time with our loved ones, we’re always looking ahead to the next big fights to build a country for the many, not the few. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

name: Wes Moore for Maryland
subject: What we learned from Virginia’s elections
body:
Friend,

It’s clear Republicans will stop at nothing to pass their extreme agenda to impose bans and restrictions on a person’s right to choose after the fall of Roe v. Wade.

That’s why earlier this month, many of you chipped in to help Wes and thousands of other leaders, activists, and organizers get out the vote in Virginia’s elections and protect abortion rights.

It paid off. Pro-choice Democrats won across the Commonwealth and took back the General Assembly.
Now we need to ensure we can continue to lead the way in protecting reproductive rights right here in Maryland.

Earlier this year, Wes signed a historic bill to protect the rights of all Marylanders and expand abortion access — and he will continue to fight to enshrine those rights into our state constitution.

With Wes as governor, Marylanders’ health, rights, and wellbeing will always come first. Make a contribution today to support Wes’ leadership. With the right to choose under fire in many states, we must continue to secure Maryland as a safe haven for reproductive freedom. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231125-1?refcode=em20231125]

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: A lot of moving pieces
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Folks, To run for election here in Illinois, you must prove that you have support from voters in your district by gathering the required signatures to get your name on the ballot. So, over the last few weeks, our campaign has been traveling through the district to do just that. As I’m sure you can imagine, this is a big undertaking that involves recruiting a team of grassroots volunteers to build out our campaign staff to ensure we can connect with voters from every corner of our district. There are a lot of moving pieces, but we’re in the final stretch of the signature gathering, so we'll be drinking a lot of coffee and tea as we connect with voters one conversation at a time. If you’re looking for ways to help out, one option is to support our work by making a grassroots contribution ahead of Thursday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline. clean_body: | Folks, To run for election here in Illinois, you must prove that you have support from voters in your district by gathering the required signatures to get your name on the ballot. So, over the last few weeks, our campaign has been traveling through the district to do just that. As I’m sure you can imagine, this is a big undertaking that involves recruiting a team of grassroots volunteers to build out our campaign staff to ensure we can connect with voters from every corner of our district. There are a lot of moving pieces, but we’re in the final stretch of the signature gathering, so we'll be drinking a lot of coffee and tea as we connect with voters one conversation at a time. If you’re looking for ways to help out, one option is to support our work by making a grassroots contribution ahead of Thursday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline. It might not seem like much, but every dollar we receive makes a huge difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ** = | = = | = = Thank you for powering our efforts to protect my seat and keep me fighting in Washington for the hardworking families across Central and Southern Illinois. — Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Your views on gun violence prevention:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I need to know you’re with me on this.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73946643/440160329/823540626?refcode=ea.760a148a-a78b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.760a148a-a78b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBhMTQ4YS1hNzhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SxU3aOGA2CurZQhPwNcR7SM2aEXZoHEIh_nDVkncf1s=&emci=b0ad3670-4089-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=760a148a-a78b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Hello Peter, As a basic duty, a government created by and for the people must _protect_ the people. **But in our country, we’ve systematically failed to protect our communities from the terror of gun violence.** Democratic lawmakers have proposed gun violence prevention measures over and over again, here in North Carolina and nationally. I’ve told our legislature I would sign them into law. We know these measures can work because _none_ of our peer countries with similar laws see the same epidemic of violence. **But far-right legislators in allegiance to the gun lobby have blocked any real action.** It’s long past time for our leaders to set aside partisanship and do what’s right. Until Republicans agree to come to the table, we can only keep raising our voices to demand change. **[Peter, I want to make sure your voice is heard. If you have a minute or two, consider sharing your thoughts with me about the gun violence epidemic and solutions to the crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73946645/440160330/-1147966004?refcode=ea.760a148a-a78b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.760a148a-a78b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBhMTQ4YS1hNzhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SxU3aOGA2CurZQhPwNcR7SM2aEXZoHEIh_nDVkncf1s=&emci=b0ad3670-4089-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=760a148a-a78b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73946649/440160332/-1147966004?refcode=ea.760a148a-a78b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.760a148a-a78b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBhMTQ4YS1hNzhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SxU3aOGA2CurZQhPwNcR7SM2aEXZoHEIh_nDVkncf1s=&emci=b0ad3670-4089-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=760a148a-a78b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jkFvozAQhX_NcAPBjInh4MPuRuypx6THyjDjYMUOyJhW_PsqUdXre5_e-2xcg3eHAf0XEGfPGyAC_QHEPdPVXi5v6SjpXcr_7RVvzxL_AWI-Vvklf0YqidaHZ6rPBRuFtnFTIabRdd3jiTosZmN1z6qzpGXs2p5bOo2iOuyZ2DrHXeEN1khNg23TEra60thRT6TYTaPqkUDVr6PKJZE8-8ddElsfjmpaYhHMnPO6vcQGwGGTaU9S2Yfwkp8E4LDcRZxEYW9vadlXwCHYseTkP6WMY7lEoGHP8SNLikBnlxmLZHj98iH47aRB1beXwrTE7wAAAP__KgJi_g)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jkFvozAQhX_NcAPBjInh4MPuRuypx6THyjDjYMUOyJhW_PsqUdXre5_e-2xcg3eHAf0XEGfPGyAC_QHEPdPVXi5v6SjpXcr_7RVvzxL_AWI-Vvklf0YqidaHZ6rPBRuFtnFTIabRdd3jiTosZmN1z6qzpGXs2p5bOo2iOuyZ2DrHXeEN1khNg23TEra60thRT6TYTaPqkUDVr6PKJZE8-8ddElsfjmpaYhHMnPO6vcQGwGGTaU9S2Yfwkp8E4LDcRZxEYW9vadlXwCHYseTkP6WMY7lEoGHP8SNLikBnlxmLZHj98iH47aRB1beXwrTE7wAAAP__KgJi_g) Friend,

Our undercover journalists have exposed something terrifying that could impact the health of everyone in America . . . **if not the world.**

Before we release this one, we have mounting costs from coast-to-coast travel to covering our bases with legal reviews of our content.

Before midnight tonight, I have to raise $46,300 to break even and cover our operational costs.

**[Will you pitch in and help us today?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jkFvozAQhX_NcAPBjInh4MPuRuypx6THyjDjYMUOyJhW_PsqUdXre5_e-2xcg3eHAf0XEGfPGyAC_QHEPdPVXi5v6SjpXcr_7RVvzxL_AWI-Vvklf0YqidaHZ6rPBRuFtnFTIabRdd3jiTosZmN1z6qzpGXs2p5bOo2iOuyZ2DrHXeEN1khNg23TEra60thRT6TYTaPqkUDVr6PKJZE8-8ddElsfjmpaYhHMnPO6vcQGwGGTaU9S2Yfwkp8E4LDcRZxEYW9vadlXwCHYseTkP6WMY7lEoGHP8SNLikBnlxmLZHj98iH47aRB1beXwrTE7wAAAP__KgJi_g)**

There are a few reasons why newsrooms around the country have stopped doing investigative journalism. The first is the massive cost.

Most journalists today always stay in the comfort of their office. They gather reports from the Internet, make a few calls, and regurgitate news already cycling around the web.

It's lazy and serves no purpose other than clickbait for ad dollars for these big corporations who control the news.

At OMG, we're not doing that. Not even close.

We have teams of journalists deployed at nearly any given moment. The planning of our investigations is extraordinary. We will contact hundreds, if not thousands, of potential sources to find THE right one.

And then the filming starts!

The phone bill for our "swiping" campaign alone is thousands of dollars each month to maintain connections on arrays of phones we use to locate and communicate with sources.

The bills keep coming in, and we must be a team to keep going. **[You support OMG](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jkFvozAQhX_NcAPBjInh4MPuRuypx6THyjDjYMUOyJhW_PsqUdXre5_e-2xcg3eHAf0XEGfPGyAC_QHEPdPVXi5v6SjpXcr_7RVvzxL_AWI-Vvklf0YqidaHZ6rPBRuFtnFTIabRdd3jiTosZmN1z6qzpGXs2p5bOo2iOuyZ2DrHXeEN1khNg23TEra60thRT6TYTaPqkUDVr6PKJZE8-8ddElsfjmpaYhHMnPO6vcQGwGGTaU9S2Yfwkp8E4LDcRZxEYW9vadlXwCHYseTkP6WMY7lEoGHP8SNLikBnlxmLZHj98iH47aRB1beXwrTE7wAAAP__KgJi_g), and we produce for you to get the truth to the public.**

We're not beholden to advertisers or ANY interests that will silence or dilute our reporting.

Friend, I have an unspoken agreement between you and a small group of other Americans who support my work. It's simple: **you support our reporting and truth in our integrity, and we work tirelessly to expose the truth.**

**[Will you chip in today to help me reach my goal by midnight tonight?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8jkFvozAQhX_NcAPBjInh4MPuRuypx6THyjDjYMUOyJhW_PsqUdXre5_e-2xcg3eHAf0XEGfPGyAC_QHEPdPVXi5v6SjpXcr_7RVvzxL_AWI-Vvklf0YqidaHZ6rPBRuFtnFTIabRdd3jiTosZmN1z6qzpGXs2p5bOo2iOuyZ2DrHXeEN1khNg23TEra60thRT6TYTaPqkUDVr6PKJZE8-8ddElsfjmpaYhHMnPO6vcQGwGGTaU9S2Yfwkp8E4LDcRZxEYW9vadlXwCHYseTkP6WMY7lEoGHP8SNLikBnlxmLZHj98iH47aRB1beXwrTE7wAAAP__KgJi_g)**

After watching the undercover footage, OMG's latest report has sent shivers up my spine.

It's horrendous stuff going on behind the back of the public, outside of the law, and outside of human decency.

And I'm rushing to package it for the public perfectly so Americans are aware of what's going on behind closed doors.

And this has been an expensive report because of the massive impact.

So please donate as much as you can today so we can cover the costs of this investigation and keep going.

Thank you for your continued support.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

Hey Peter, it’s Carville.

I’ll tell you right now: we’ve gotta get serious about Pennsylvania’s Senate race.

David McCormick — a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can spend HUGE sums of his own money and self-fund this race — is trying to flip PA’s Senate seat red.

So the biggest mistake grassroots Democrats can make right now is to sit by and think that re-electing Bob Casey is a shoo-in.

As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, I’m telling ya — this is gonna be a close one, and we gotta act now.

[_**Please, Peter, will you split a donation of $5 or more between Bob Casey and Fight for Progress? We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mmxX6t_wjHq9Gxu26jqb9g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRKoEP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xODUmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBDMzFUMTEwMTIzX1JNLUFGUi0yMDIzMTEyNVcDc3BjQgplX7AWYmVPnXrjUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/mmxX6t_wjHq9Gxu26jqb9g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRKoEP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xODUmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBDMzFUMTEwMTIzX1JNLUFGUi0yMDIzMTEyNVcDc3BjQgplX7AWYmVPnXrjUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Exemption DENIED
body:
The radical Left wants you to forget.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZBKtKjCfeShxiKi0QLfTrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRKoEP0SYaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyNV9CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLVVTQ05XA3NwY0IKZV-wFmJlTxIwKFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
Fellow American,The radical Left wants you to forget.They want you to forget how wrong they were about COVID. They want you to forget that they lied to your face for over a year. They want you to forget that they let extremists riot in the streets while they told you to skip holidays with your loved ones and to “social distance.”They want you to forget how they closed our schools, our businesses, and our houses of worship. (Gavin Newsom even closed Orange County beaches). **And maybe most of all, they want you to forget that thousands of hardworking, competent people either lost their jobs or were forced to take a vaccine they didn’t want.****They want you to forget that...** _...And I hope you never do._ Because if you forget what they did, it’s only a matter of time before they do it again.It’s only a matter of time before they find a new reason to trample your rights and your freedoms for the so-called “greater good.”We can’t forget what the radical Left and its draconian policies did to us and to our families – and we can’t let them forget it either. **That’s why the Center for American Liberty is still putting their feet to the fire and holding them accountable.** But nothing we do is possible without the generosity of patriots like you. **[**Will you give us the funds we need to win this landmark case and make the Left pay for what it did?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZBKtKjCfeShxiKi0QLfTrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRKoEP0SYaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyNV9CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLVVTQ05XA3NwY0IKZV-wFmJlTxIwKFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** We filed a lawsuit against the North Carolina Symphony on behalf of three musicians fired for refusing to get the COVID-19 vaccine.And if we can win this critical lawsuit, we can put employers across the country on notice ahead of what some are calling a COVID resurgence.Dovid was the assistant concertmaster and first violinist, while Chris and Rachel both played the French Horn.They are some of the most talented musicians in the country in highly coveted and competitive positions._Each of them had been in the Symphony for over a decade._ When the Symphony introduced its vaccine mandate, it offered both religious and medical exemptions. Dovid, Chris and Rachel each hold sincere religious beliefs that prohibit them from taking the COVID vaccine.They all filed for religious exemptions and were willing to take other measures, like regularly testing, to prove they didn’t have COVID.But shortly after submitting their requestions for religious exemptions, the Symphony rejected their requests and put them on UNPAID LEAVE.These three musicians were Buddhist, Christian and Jewish.**It doesn’t matter who you are or what you believe – the radical Left doesn’t respect your right to practice your faith as you see fit.** In their eyes, your body doesn’t belong to you – it belongs to them.I’m deciding to take a stand – and I hope you will too. **[**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty to fund this lawsuit for religious freedom and set a precedent nationwide that puts these radicals on notice.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZBKtKjCfeShxiKi0QLfTrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRKoEP0SYaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyNV9CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLVVTQ05XA3NwY0IKZV-wFmJlTxIwKFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)** Even after lifting its vaccine mandate, the Symphony refused to give these musicians their jobs back.Because it was never about “science” or “health” – it was always about control.I hope I can count on your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZBKtKjCfeShxiKi0QLfTrA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRKoEP0SYaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvZDZiZTk1ZGUtZmNmOS00YjZmLWE3MTctMDkzN2NjMmU3MTJlP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDIzMTEyNV9CREdfQ0ZBTF9TWU1QUjJfUkVOX1BBLVVTQ05XA3NwY0IKZV-wFmJlTxIwKFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

name: JD Vance & Blake Masters
subject: We need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
|
Friend,

JD Vance and Blake Masters here.

_**We 're writing to tell you ONE thing: the MAGA movement is in danger. **_

Democrats are pouring millions of dollars into House races, Senate races, the Presidential election, and local races across the country. They're fired up and more determined than ever to eradicate the MAGA movement, and we cannot let that happen.

We both stand for America First values; for life, liberty, freedom, and democracy; for family, for safety, for law and order, and for PUTTING AMERICA FIRST. The Radical Left wants us to ABANDON these values and bend our knees to their lawless agenda. I'm sure you can guess - that WON'T be happening. **[So, we need to ask you a HUGE favor. Are you willing to fight with us until election day next year?](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=fcf9c3ecc7124d1e9592213c729c8fb9&_e=wEd1hiLTuEU7RKdwKZ6QXuN9hBKIspeYKIorAe_8bFOIHjnfByhGOUoJwocmM6Se3cxFI1XbE6j6yTj-dpK_Y7CWFyEFpoChkWJrI-1CQCxE7hS_EgsW1ZotUE6MTOfGCxTFH5tqgxCORPfmJoF2JoX_Zv7S_LjriES-WFqD3VgfUAmAggc_XidnEs8VikAE-iKnc0AuJbyPN4JhCW4e5VLF98RuQz5LcdA2aFmqX2oJC2UjLb9hF09P4FLAcMtGlYlPXBnbvYnQgM8XH7xwmqW9r3eUgr9w7BrIIcMgucgfBw-v9ufU_BjUYYuqPyOoHQ6mUMcs30t0s74U8hdYadvqBik-7kgljRjaAO72oBHd3lNFuLcW2glph2U0aUmMW95ojsSAm5WHoHMPI-TNkA%3D%3D)**

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: My family's coffee order
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

My wife and I have called Dallas home since 2010, choosing to plant our roots here and raise our family in this vibrant community. Today, I want to share a glimpse into our everyday lives, and I hope you'll take the time to read this email.

For years, we've frequented a coffee shop just down the road — a spot that holds the echoes of countless conversations and the growth of our family. From the days when our daughter was in preschool, we'd gather there to savor precious moments as a family.

**As the years have unfolded, so have the topics of conversation and the complexity of our orders.** Our daughter, once a fan of hot chocolate, now navigates the menu with confidence, opting for macchiatos and _very_ specific lattes. Our talks have evolved too — from animated discussions about the latest episode of Arthur to engaging conversations about world events and her _many_ accomplishments in school.

**What has made this place truly special is the sense of community that has enveloped us from the very beginning.** The workers there have become familiar faces, knowing our little family and sharing in our joys and challenges. Friendships have been forged over countless cups of coffee, and it's these connections that make this community our home.

**I'm running for TX-32 because this community means everything to me. I want to ensure that families like ours can not only thrive but continue to build a legacy here in Texas and across the United States. The people of this district are not just constituents; they are our neighbors and friends.**

**[Today, I'm reaching out with a personal request: Would you consider contributing $5.25 (the cost of my daughter's go-to latte) to our campaign to help us reach our $50,000 end-of-month goal? Small investments make a significant impact on our journey to build a brighter future for Today, I want to share a glimpse into our everyday lives, and I hope you'll take the time to read this email. For years, we've frequented a coffee shop just down the road — a spot that holds the echoes of countless conversations and the growth of our family. From the days when our daughter was in preschool, we'd gather there to savor precious moments as a family. As the years have unfolded, so have the topics of conversation and the complexity of our orders. Our daughter, once a fan of hot chocolate, now navigates the menu with confidence, opting for macchiatos and very specific lattes. Our talks have evolved too — from animated discussions about the latest episode of Arthur to engaging conversations about world events and her many accomplishments in school. What has made this place truly special is the sense of community that has enveloped us from the very beginning. The workers there have become familiar faces, knowing our little family and sharing in our joys and challenges. Friendships have been forged over countless cups of coffee, and it's these connections that make this community our home. I'm running for TX-32 because this community means everything to me. I want to ensure that families like ours can not only thrive but continue to build a legacy here in Texas and across the United States. name: Bob Casey
subject: This may not seem like much
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I’m reaching out with a simple question.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1220%2E552475%2EIlDl0g)
$5.
That's what I'm asking you to contribute to my campaign today, Peter.
It may not seem like much, but it makes all the difference.
People are surprised that just the price of water ice or a Hershey bar can be so powerful in our effort to stop the GOP from taking the Senate.
The truth is, it's not _just one_ $5 donation. Your $5, paired with $5 from another supporter, and then another $5, starts to add up.
If enough folks chip in a few bucks at a time, we can accomplish big things -- and Peter, we need all the help we can get.
Mitch McConnell made it clear that Pennsylvania is crucial to taking back the Senate majority. **Now that West Virginia isn't a factor, a lot of the funds from that race will be headed into Pennsylvania instead.**
Between the high stakes created by our razor-thin Senate majority, the 2024 presidential campaign, and our mega-millionaire Republican opponent who could self-fund his campaign, we're going to see unprecedented amounts of spending here next year.
**[That's why my team set a goal to raise $100,000 before the end of the month. If our team steps up today, we can hit this goal and be ready. Can you chip in $5 to our campaign? I'm facing my toughest race yet, and every dollar makes a difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231125-1?refcode=em20231125-1&refcode2=1220_552475_IlDl0g&akid=1220%2E552475%2EIlDl0g)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231125-1?refcode=em20231125-1&refcode2=1220_552475_IlDl0g&akid=1220%2E552475%2EIlDl0g)**
We're building a team of supporters across Pennsylvania, and I'm proud to have you by my side in this fight.
With gratitude,
Bob

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8e6KoPF77sJ6mNPuthljQ8K7Y3LB7oJc0_ukNCUx13YnYkiYyTO3TbCOJcvx5gJDg6BRZe5y6PmF4W3bH_Q9OTp4EPRH60nzaSkl6BzIYWR8xZ3Xh4zudDyvBMUfnVJnA01X3zFhaa77qvTdCOwfWWlKPisaAVkAA5S0YxpvnhM3Ydih_4a3TpNHboCe1MzEkX0n2u3aUprp2x7xKlWhjm1enGd68mqjSwGNimFcOEEc3d3_gWAtYXutDYFxh9TolDJ0zhG34sLuB3wxAT-jrzlZP_lcUt55V3rcR47SwxNh/41l/qhWXsL-IQSSSAU65mIHf6A/h0/y1TwxAciDwffsZwlsedcDQioH9NjZc0HDGgvtHg3jtc) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRhFtfpOsD9V3LZd3OS38jlflhAnTM7WM0JSOu23ESdIzB_QKSvCAGVAxFPh-HR6Y4R5HBFu4wBZXcELHkIcgQW0sj3oLCYpIZiVknaNJ6MmUDcRTC1emBB4_IbgJDITiTgbgD8uLjbKqqYedWj-16kf9jFhb0hoF0AS4L8aTED_yAw7CygmEuZL0v1a7reVknOfdNuVp3hf-_NnVdHkiwM-JBKNWE_ms9DWhUd6TjJZxPrwz-45jFz1r6cX0eLH65gONBicmG1u_vzmkUeQVu8Si3LMZro7ISE1v1g5z47n18p36KUnutmcpvO0iCj4ITx6IlchSg9aGrLWeRelTKz3xtkqbuHB4-iEVlZw6jP797NqqhhVLYJUlIqsT6hYMd0MTzJFEtUzi72ahqs6zDJ5RKBuGIlXPoKM0QumOUj83fNRZPgwiRbFYnXlABxlN5/41l/qhWXsL-IQSSSAU65mIHf6A/h1/hAY7nvYEZMqnlbrQZMDnH682tdXp3LFHomyT71tJ22g) Peter, this is the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867. The significance of this is not lost on me – 146 years later, I’m running to become the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware in the Senate.

**[I can’t make history without your help. Will you rush $10 or more to send another Black woman to the Senate, keep Delaware blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRDQS67SokfIfwGip_dOFJ6lzCEtIXEf3GfqKPes86i3LJMNyFmkB5kzeIz6zf2C8j1o3RgGjlvgCIOSRLD1FC8uBmfgBev-ekHpEPbzW03q48eaip1gx4KAesc317TExzJNMz-GKfi8AaH9n3fXThreQB_RJNcv0qmQtIgl_wXK2yWR2GWNPUt48Dv9hOS_mvxlnhxU1qDOrLx3cem4HAlCQKThQTXfJKOSkR8fdso9cDLDI9lOiBTQLjACPZy3Kte-pyS3WN6qNkMkicGJ_R9Alyk7VHftC6__4VHeDjJYXDljBvrahrtcp4UkzihzSAu9R_KVwn7t4mmzqc_b91pctAdNR9KqWQQASWm7lJxaVQ01Mtw31zLHwS7_ilm6-FN0PaiOkMbNGslvAAgsF5boZ5o1N8EYpyGVKveAawHwLe5lSPr6UUhYkRCRmd7kSw/41l/qhWXsL-IQSSSAU65mIHf6A/h2/-51a0CParcvtaZmWGYYImam3bi_3zR7mKgC69IfCX0c)** [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRDQS67SokfIfwGip_dOFJ6lzCEtIXEf3GfqKPes86i3LJMNyFmkB5kzeIz6zf2C8j1o3RgGjlvgCIOSRLD1FC8uBmfgBev-ekHpEPbzW03q48eaip1gx4KAesc317TExzJNMz-GKfi8AaH9n3fXThreQB_RJNcv0qmQtIgl_wXK2yWR2GWNPUt48Dv9hOS_mvxlnhxU1qDOrLx3cem4HAlCQKThQTXfJKOSkR8fdso9cDLDI9lOiBTQLjACPZy3KtCMLSbt-mX9EjqrMsyqM0yQZ3y-ueQwbDhsNEiobgK-Lvj8z_JgjFYv_31KWy8UspsrKudKnPnZbhC6MBrM1Z3d8guRdqAEv6Nb_l1FqIj97KzXwX1QXm7doodn-3ZLP9xeXoyoP8_9QV5tpehF74swhSATb8NpKhnLbiVz_DH59HPXH2LI3bSqzSZakopk1n/41l/qhWXsL-IQSSSAU65mIHf6A/h3/PzKRgJACzB2MQc5iGj4TdmbaAMMr-hqGBl9-zSrrHwc) I carry the story of my ancestors with me every day. It means so much to me that my sister Thea made it into a scarf.

**The day I was sworn-in, I carried that scarf.**

It was surreal — knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.

**I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection.** On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason.

**And I intend to carry that scarf when I’m sworn in to the Senate.**

[If you’re ready to join our movement, will you please chip in $10 to split between my Senate campaign and The Collective PAC? Every donation goes towards creating a more diverse and inclusive Congress and I sincerely hope you’ll get on board.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfzHF2EoEcnJ6z4SInIYZRhFtfpOsD9V3LZd3OS38jlflhAnTM7WM0JSOu23ESdIzB_QKSvCAGVAxFPh-HR6Y4R5HBFu4wBZXcELHkIcgQW0sj3oLCYpIZiVknaNJ6MmUDcRTC1emBB4_IbgJDITiTgbgD8uLjbKqqYedWj-16kf9jFhb0hoF0AS4L8aTED_yAw7CygmEuZL0v1a7reVknOfdNuVp3hf-_NnVdHkiwM-JBKNWE_ms9DWhUd6TjJZxPrwz-45jFz1r6cX0eLH65jwNK1hHgpMCLh0YTka5CEZswDD_OUFmbtWjN6imJfEcQvRMrqTACA6Vox181hlUMyc4vvfyBjZo1eqCXkUkiXZeKkZPvUTB38lP61JArtjYaIRQKEOjlIZ3HYGAVsSfJKpv_vzgNJmwLqeeZmNCcpQpOa0LuILZ5Wn_RPQqOLt0ZttWkwcB43OEvLqH--9x_/41l/qhWXsL-IQSSSAU65mIHf6A/h4/Tg8ci9CMpzaeQVd35R4ynj_KZzT-XSGr1o5Nls_yzm4) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Lisa Blunt Rochester and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, this is the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867. The significance of this is not lost on me – 146 years later, I’m running to become the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware in the Senate. I carry the story of my ancestors with me every day. It means so much to me that my sister Thea made it into a scarf. The day I was sworn-in, I carried that scarf. It was surreal — knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection. On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason. And I intend to carry that scarf when I’m sworn in to the Senate. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Lisa Blunt Rochester and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | All my best, Lisa Blunt Rochester The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . Peter, did you know that over 25,000 people have lost their lives to gun violence in the U.S. this year alone?

**Our nation’s bloody history of gun violence has proven time and time again that assault weapons are the weapon of choice for mass shooters – and yet we are _still_ fighting tooth and nail against the gun lobby and its favorite politicians to get these military-style weapons of war off the streets of America. **
**I refuse to back down from this fight, but I’m counting on fearless fighters like _you_**** __ to stand with me. That’s why I urgently need at least 10,000 supporters to recommit themselves to our fight against gun violence.**

So please, before this poll closes at midnight, will you respond to join the fight against gun violence and call on Congress to take action?

name: Diana
subject: re: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania... >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please don't delay
Hey team -- It’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

With the 2024 elections heating up and the battle for Senate control at a fever pitch, we need to stay on top of our strategy. That’s why James Carville reached out and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview.

**But he didn’t get an answer from you -- and now he's 15 responses short of what he needed in Pennsylvania!**

[**We NEED enough top Democrats like you to participate in this strategy interview to drive us to victory, but the deadline to respond is midnight tonight. Please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12647%2E9716520%2ECZ8Qwd)

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12647%2E9716520%2ECZ8Qwd)
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a crucial part of our team,

Diana, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: James Carville
Date: Nov 24, 2023
Subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania!
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12647%2E9716520%2ECZ8Qwd)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12647%2E9716520%2ECZ8Qwd)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewNovember/](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12647%2E9716520%2ECZ8Qwd)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231125-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=12647%2E9716520%2ECZ8Qwd)
---

Thank you

\- James

clean_body: Please don't delay Hey team -- It’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC. With the 2024 elections heating up and the battle for Senate control at a fever pitch, we need to stay on top of our strategy. That’s why James Carville reached out and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview. But he didn’t get an answer from you -- and now he's 15 responses short of what he needed in Pennsylvania! | | NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data Thank you for being a crucial part of our team, Diana, DSCC If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: James Carville Date: Nov 24, 2023 Subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania! | | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you. I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania -- | | I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one. If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning. All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate next year. That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from real voters like you \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate. I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview? | Thank you \- James Derivative of by JD Lasica. . | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: I don't want to be alone. Help me support local candidates and organizations.
body:
Movement for ceasefire starts locally. | | |
---
Friend, I created the Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to support families of all backgrounds, especially people who’ve been left out and marginalized. We build a better future by investing in grassroots organizations and progressive candidates who are truly rooted in their communities. Right now, the vast majority of Americans support a ceasefire, and they don't want to see their tax dollars go to more war. Many of our communities still don't have clean water, and most families are living paycheck to paycheck, deciding between paying medical bills or putting food on the table. Many are on the brink of homelessness. We need elected leaders who don’t take money from corporations, who represent their constituents as public servants, and who are not afraid to stand up to the unjust status quo. Our PAC also helps expand the reach of movement groups, many of which did not hesitate to support a ceasefire. **Starting now, we’re making investments in community-based groups that are lifting up those most in need, and supporting progressive candidates who are under relentless attack for pushing for the bold changes we deserve.** [**Donate to my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today to help dismantle the unjust status quo that persecutes marginalized people, and instead create communities where everyone feels safe and has their needs met.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yZ2F-pOqPuEPl4PAmVX5WQ_X8sHi1SC_DE9tZdwZpFii0L4zrJ_iXPtPC5mBcCAAFEQMUH0vqmp9wXE97XCNOwBR5oXAnHNykeUZVC63SEyOoRBfgqglv0DEu2pZ7cQbMy8Wfxk5aNQthZr0hdJROygpQjF5E2qqifUwUD_meJw-u5aoRwnP_d9kLkeMh02jUGSf2NYXi6E53otFmk0seFyNlKbs6sZlWMuQQLDYmPLP2NDi_aK3i-jUEyiwwY-MpoisYmY9N2XqEEKxg3o1Si1gWuIIzAS_a3RNjm1u6R2h1287PzANG8AzDnmvLejYEFcgRLsrFTV9KtYSJCYgR0F3gtmQqhRehwSmWkOIVp3DnNtwuOZoY6KIRvzRfh1vY1nyo39AMFOswaSvwt-D7DF9viNszoXd6425rWFO68110JqWC3VEkcFYwrywBKx2JBOHap_4nh81JtI_EM6YFM/41l/IEDxgTrCSOW4YpzhBjzIrw/h0/Ocx1-vE_fpGUH5zmOn59XYFNgd95yf5T4sxcNFIbZQM) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yZ2F-pOqPuEPl4PAmVX5WQ_X8sHi1SC_DE9tZdwZpFipLvxgnF_JQoCb6xZSOCEU1egvzmdmMzaazmNWdrfeGnT_o7Y6jUXi1T5PXujooahItfeaAkD663pB5bmuMEo1H6XWicbvhxgG6Qa8PSwKWBEfbIP7O_xNEHlqSkE3uEL3d8VnW4mbvET2uqIqvkE11Z92PopGf-tO7sHzr0gTmTp17B-3tn3DtsWW8_F9SasXIvS4-orSwXibEqCpVn2vfiwCYMEH0FRQY8B66CrNtDj-hgTHEgbPTtmqSH6GKSlVgTBzJKc2-TJYCTuLHZfntvitBfPbPlBy7Jpa4T8RSvX6slZ7l7anBVZPtXfYbu44pVzRndMDeqMkp0L1s-Wi76-ELWpXOVF8VouHLqXGCn2ixip5MohAPBobfbQiJv4qsoawsYIs7p4g4GKtUN0SJpk8AG9xM7zQPpzu04deoUMCMBv8uTEfSJpo3Z6WDESW2ERwNrRMdGCCJ6gln-bPU/41l/IEDxgTrCSOW4YpzhBjzIrw/h1/mj3AYoVWq7vvIRJ6WBh6H-fiuhhH635gfT-0SyZ6plc)

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Fri, Nov 24, 2023
Subject: I don't want to be alone. Help me support local candidates and organizations.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Our government continues to find billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars to fund war, while claiming there's not enough to meet Americans’ basic needs, including clean drinking water.
Amidst a rise in antisemitic, Islamophobic, and anti-Arab hate crimes, we also continue to see violence against Black people, Indigenous people, other people of color, and LGBTQ+ people.
So many local and state elected officials have supported our work on making water a human right, pushed back on “development” projects that push out our residents, taken on corporate polluters, and now back the demand for a ceasefire.
**Marginalized communities are feeling unheard and betrayed. There's still so much to do to build the true multiracial democracy we need, and to ensure our communities’ safety and well-being.**
Last year in Michigan, my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC supported dozens of candidates and grassroots organizations at the state and local level―donating more than $128,000 to build progressive political power and invest directly in our communities.
[**To help build a future where all of us can thrive and where we are truly represented by our political leaders, please donate to my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yZ2F-pOqPuEPl4PAmVX5WQ_X8sHi1SC_DE9tZdwZpFii0L4zrJ_iXPtPC5mBcCAAG7sMNFk9Fn-gbcuhQPOdFt0Bl3zTBNeCHgO4jp6CZBz3YilxiC00bqlIgClydU0agHJcaxwMr8yHifQJdvggTqRl5iDHktq5kMTt0uQW0tQZ7YCbYbPojMha1ydxfo1WY7Huz03tRi8OelaP6ZUZ4M36zvpIQFve1EidvFnkg5_VY985yEbGzXjFu0ZOBzpJ-mpjuvtUwOFGq_bplRivoYQZMR8xCVOKXCepTUMK-xHSVk5JDNpl7zdrhS2ZM9PnWHlnRMqu_HstudFN4VjPDaV56i9ihxPAMfayuhYDcZoTb7CnmM0pDsUVdV3VFO_Ae7JJsj9c8lhXX9LGvQuyRe_jPMdkR-p8GPFFrrKZPRB9JrE4BCrbzWY-7vU0fVDgydB_DCFRh00b9Yp4n2O5jP/41l/IEDxgTrCSOW4YpzhBjzIrw/h7/3ooYnB6YB8l9eFUVNIEwlYfFpwvIL6rd6SxTNLESwgg)

The Rooted in Community Leadership PAC helps us support causes throughout the district. It's also how we support progressive candidates who are rooted in and truly represent their communities.
Even though 80% of Democrats support a ceasefire, their representatives are not listening. This month, we learned that the anti-Palestinian group AIPAC is planning to spend at least $100 million in an attempt to defeat me and other progressive candidates who have had the courage to speak out and demand a ceasefire.

name: Jon Hamm
subject: Will you join me in supporting my friend Lucas Kunce?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Hey Peter, it’s Jon Hamm, born-and-raised Missourian.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $10 or whatever you can afford toward my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Missouri.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39380?refcode=em20231125-4237&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4237%2E614464%2ENg3g23) But first, please give me a moment to explain what my home state is up against in this election and why I’m supporting Lucas.**
**[CHIP IN TO SUPPORT LUCAS KUNCE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39380?refcode=em20231125-4237&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4237%2E614464%2ENg3g23)**
Most of my family is from a town called Ste. Genevieve. I’ve watched their community go downhill for years.
While corrupt politicians shipped jobs overseas and voted to give handouts to Wall Street and their corporate allies, everyday people just trying to survive in the place they call home ran out of money and opportunities.
**Our leaders abandoned them — and Josh Hawley is the perfect example.**
Instead of fighting for what would make the communities in my home state stronger, Josh Hawley has been busy engaging in out-of-touch culture wars and selling us his book all about “manhood” — telling the whole world that the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him.
Well... when I think about manhood, I think about courage. And that’s not something you can give speeches or write a book about.
Missouri is the Show Me State. Courage is something you have to show us.
**That’s why I’m supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.** As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to serve the community that took care of him growing up, Lucas has already shown us that he knows the true meaning of courage.
Lucas knows courage is about standing up to the powerful and working to rebuild our state. And he knows real leaders fight to empower everyday people and secure our future for generations to come — not for their own power or profit.
**So Peter, if you want to be told about manhood, some guy wrote a book about it.[But if you want someone to show you real courage, please join me in supporting Lucas Kunce’s campaign for U.S. Senate by chipping in $10 or whatever you can afford today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39380?refcode=em20231125-4237&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4237%2E614464%2ENg3g23)**

clean_body: Hey Peter, it’s Jon Hamm, born-and-raised Missourian. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to But first, please give me a moment to explain what my home state is up against in this election and why I’m supporting Lucas. Most of my family is from a town called Ste. Genevieve. I’ve watched their community go downhill for years. While corrupt politicians shipped jobs overseas and voted to give handouts to Wall Street and their corporate allies, everyday people just trying to survive in the place they call home ran out of money and opportunities. Our leaders abandoned them — and Josh Hawley is the perfect example. Instead of fighting for what would make the communities in my home state stronger, Josh Hawley has been busy engaging in out-of-touch culture wars and selling us his book all about “manhood” — telling the whole world that the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him. Well... when I think about manhood, I think about courage. And that’s not something you can give speeches or write a book about. Missouri is the Show Me State. Courage is something you have to show us. That’s why I’m supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to serve the community that took care of him growing up, Lucas has already shown us that he knows the true meaning of courage. Lucas knows courage is about standing up to the powerful and working to rebuild our state. And he knows real leaders fight to empower everyday people and secure our future for generations to come — not for their own power or profit. So Peter, if you want to be told about manhood, some guy wrote a book about it. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Lucas has been working hard to put Missouri’s Senate race on the map in 2024. From calling out Josh Hawley’s blatant corruption to building a coalition of working people, national organizations, and local leaders — he is Democrats’ best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat this election cycle. He’s building a truly grassroots campaign, without a cent from corporate PACs, to defeat Hawley and take back power for everyday working Missourians — just like my friends and family members all across the state. It has never been more important to elect a warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate. Thanks for standing with me, Jon Hamm | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
