[] We have zero idea where Democrats stand on the issue of lifetime appointments, so we’re asking: [] Should Supreme Court Justices have Lifetime Appointments? [] [] YES >> [] NO >> [] UNSURE >> [] Thanks for your input, CADEM HQ DONATE » [] Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. If this email was forwarded to you, please sign up for our email list here. name: Team Daniels
subject: Oops . . . Looks like we had a little too much turkey
body:
We hope you are having a wonderful holiday weekend with your family and friends. When we sent out Shamaine's Thanksgiving message, it looks like we had a little too much turkey, and missed a glaring typo in our email header . . . we mis-spelled Thanksgiving. We apologize for the bad proof-reading.
In case you missed it, you can check out Shamaine's Thanksgiving message below, this time with the error corrected.
Happy Thanksgiving, and thank you for your understanding,
Team Daniels
www.danielsforcongress.org [www.danielsforcongress.org]
Dear Friend,
Thanksgiving is one of my favorite holidays. It is a time to pause and contemplate all that we have to be thankful for. We also celebrate it by sharing our time and nurture with our loved ones; things that are incredibly valuable but that we may have lost the time to engage in recently.
These last few years have been difficult for many. This Thanksgiving I can’t help but feel that while I have much for which to be grateful, there is still much to be done. The truth is that there IS much to be done, and this Thanksgiving let’s turn our feelings of gratitude into action that improve the quality of life for every American.
As a Council woman for the City of Harrisburg I was lucky to attend the National League of Cities Summit this fall where I had the opportunity to hear Chef Jose Andres, founder of the World’s Central Kitchen. Most of the Conference discussed the gargantuan challenges we face, from a growing unhoused population, to unpredictable climate phenomena, but Chef Jose Andres was focused on how to be better to our fellow human being; that means empowering each other, giving each other hope by ensuring that we all have a role to play in times of crisis, and making sure that we recognize that we all have something to offer each other. This year, for example, he will be making a Turkey Paella fusing his American and Spanish cuisine.
So this Thanksgiving I wish you more than health, happiness and good company. I wish you the ability to rise to the occasion these times ask of us, doing everything in your power to ensure that the world becomes a peaceful one, and making room for those who are coming to the American table, because we know a Thanksgiving dinner is better the more dishes there are.
From my family to yours, happy Thanksgiving!
Shamaine
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73951613/440176733/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjRjY2ExNC1iMDhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L2wo9cxWd8NZt4_sur7SRhFuGXfWN-RLgfjSP1_JbkI=&emci=0ade430d-b08b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=4b4cca14-b08b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=10203249) **POLITICO: Federal appeals court ruling threatens enforcement of the Voting Rights Act** Team – it’s no secret far-right extremists are actively working to restrict the right to vote, but a new ruling in federal court could effectively gut the Voting Rights Act.

As Attorney General, I will protect voting rights and fight any attempts to disenfranchise the will of the people. We will not go backwards on the progress we’ve made to securing full voting rights for all Pennsylvanians!! [**This could be the most important fight we face in the coming years. During my time in the PA House, I worked to ensure our elections are free, fair, and secure – because our right to vote is non-negotiable.

As Auditor General, I worked with the Pennsylvania Department of State to improve voter registration.

But some folks on the right wanted to conduct sham “audits” of the 2020 election. Their claims of voter “fraud” and attempts to purge voter rolls were all about undermining the election, not preserving its integrity.

Listen, the right to vote shouldn't be a partisan issue – it is a pillar of American democracy. Voting is how we hold our leaders accountable and ensure government works for us.

As your next Attorney General, I will protect voting rights and fight any attempts to disenfranchise the will of the people – but I need your help to get the job done.

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: "Are we screwed?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
You are allowed to be scared. To grieve. To be angry. But you are also allowed to create good, to be soft, and enjoy the small reprieves.
#
It’s been a difficult few months. Innocent lives are being lost in the Middle East. The newest U.N. climate report warns that we have fallen far short of goals to mitigate climate change set in the 2015 Paris Climate Accords. Our Supreme Court has struck down affirmative action and student loan cancellation.
In moments like these, it can be easy to feel hopeless.
After the ruling to overturn Roe v. Wade was leaked, someone asked Alexandria on Instagram, “Are we screwed?” Here’s what she had to say:
What is important in moments like these is not to think in binaries. Good/bad, screwed/not screwed. There is no doubt that things are bad. Some things, really bad. And they may likely get worse.
But that does not preclude the fact that slowly but surely, some good can be growing as other things fall apart. This is not some syrupy sweet silver lining case for optimism. Rather, it is really about a choice all of us will have to make in life, either consciously or unconsciously: **will I be a person who is safe and creates good for others?**
Will I be a person who stands up? Will I be a person who primarily minds my business and serves myself or try to be part of something bigger? Or will I just be a passive, “neutral” observer of it all?
What I sometimes tell my staff is that **the world we are fighting for is already here**. It exists in small spaces, places, and communities. We don’t have to deal with the insurmountable burden of coming up with novel solutions to the world’s problems.
Much of our work is about scaling existing solutions, many created by small, committed groups of people, that others haven’t seen or don’t even know are around the corner. So while we can’t change the world in a day, we _can_ and _do_ have the power to make our own world within our own four walls, or on our own blocks.
We can grow from there with the faith that somewhere out there, everywhere, others are doing the same. **And we will come together.**
That’s why if you’re a parent, how you parent matters. If you’re a neighbor, how you are a neighbor matters. Many of our biggest problems are results of massively scaled up isolation from others. That means many of our solutions can be found in creating community.
Ultimately, we live in this world and in this time. We have no choice but to engage in it while we’re here. Even running away is a form of engagement. So will your engagement hurt or heal? Build or bring down?
There is no neutral choice, so we can at least do our best to make good ones and learn and do better the next day.
You are allowed to be scared. To grieve. To be angry. But you are also allowed to create good, to be soft, and enjoy the small reprieves. Struggle lasts as long as we do.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

Our movement for progress is entirely powered by grassroots support.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today to keep Alexandria's work for a better world going strong?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231125.3LxNR8&refcode=em20231125-5372-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5372%2E2526796%2Eq5Jeua)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231125.3LxNR8&refcode=em20231125-5372-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5372%2E2526796%2Eq5Jeua)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231125?refcode=em20231125-5372-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=5372_2526796_q5Jeua&akid=5372%2E2526796%2Eq5Jeua)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231125-5372-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=5372%2E2526796%2Eq5Jeua)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

But you are also allowed to create good, to be soft, and enjoy the small reprieves. Struggle lasts as long as we do. In solidarity, Team AOC Our movement for progress is entirely powered by grassroots support. | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Jon Tester
subject: We just launched our first TV ad but I need your help to get it running across Montana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Team,
I wanted to make sure you saw our new TV ad, but we need YOUR help to get it running across Montana.
Can you pitch in a split donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us keep it on the air? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Generations of my family have farmed the land I work on today just outside of Big Sandy.
I know the Montana that’s worth protecting because I’ve lived it every day.
Where we look out for each other, and our word is our bond.
But like so much of our state, things are changing. Things are too expensive, some folks are forced to sell their family farms, and we’re losing access to our public lands. Hell, even some of our favorite bars are closing.
The truth is folks back in Washington don’t care what’s happening out here, but I’m defending our way of life with everything I’ve got.
A big chunk of our advertising budget comes from emails like the one you’re reading–so we’re counting on you to chip in today and help us get our message out.
Click here split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us spread our message across Montana and win this thing >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
– Jon

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Let me hear from you today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you’re not on Team Johnson yet. We’re emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=c6ee1b8515b04562ba1ac901ccf30b9d&_t=ZGtsbZNzmf6OVr1agEpC3TbLZSGtEOFD18rb9mwaNoNtKQzfKEVvPUUrsGns765-xotS5zJ2VNWs-VwmBlg_XSnCxpyzGdjGDrtB8WKl57s%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=c6ee1b8515b04562ba1ac901ccf30b9d&_t=ZGtsbZNzmf6OVr1agEpC3TbLZSGtEOFD18rb9mwaNoNtKQzfKEVvPUUrsGns765-xotS5zJ2VNWs-VwmBlg_XSnCxpyzGdjGDrtB8WKl57s%3D)

Peter -

I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well.

Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give.

[**I’m reaching out today because I want to make sure that my team has the appropriate email, phone number, and mailing address on file for you.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6ee1b8515b04562ba1ac901ccf30b9d&_e=nGCm2EHA-IFcNXMBq7qRVGb3LRkvbqbl5pgUcL5InqSPYuc-BDL0MIIXIfwOyQQF8BCaftPaRrO5xTPRCcKAdPoljOwT5lMC8YDVd1qwzpSz51tWaPV_EVLzHFo9YGY4omGXIAT8gRC1lxDWPl0lseEcwRLF21UJAedlFPJPc8MiRej8xjCilLe6jO5AJ1Hlz5mqOGBzc17tiMb1cnshhjmCVie3CiwJgnjiAuaVVvQvb2xkEFtMxeoIP2Rag-rAxKuYRzF48CJxj0Uf7Tnv3_xXwR9nQD_0zpau0_xmEE994bsz7bBRQbBejHf9wz8b_Z2NzhzGaMRJMUSKdHjEAYu2ryKMxHYWrbqSXOSg_13TMOyQs69NSMOxIx3WmGdzJooK9ozWu7zRrZjlePZ2p_L5BtoqCFXzREEBuyyANrY%3D)
[** UPDATE OUR RECORDS **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6ee1b8515b04562ba1ac901ccf30b9d&_e=nGCm2EHA-IFcNXMBq7qRVGb3LRkvbqbl5pgUcL5InqSPYuc-BDL0MIIXIfwOyQQF8BCaftPaRrO5xTPRCcKAdPoljOwT5lMC8YDVd1qwzpSz51tWaPV_EVLzHFo9YGY4omGXIAT8gRC1lxDWPl0lseEcwRLF21UJAedlFPJPc8MiRej8xjCilLe6jO5AJ1Hlz5mqOGBzc17tiMb1cnshhjmCVie3CiwJgnjiAuaVVvQvb2xkEFtMxeoIP2Rag-rANjy3OpMcuPMdhVclhdRjdAieBVDx3I4ExDynazpNVBAM82hVlqVe6WKsq9ZGw5oz4c6UDs9X5BVbHksRnFIkWSEmHZQfDAruIoP3dY8t1Qrh4cNet_UXksehknOZ-VYRPlzeGhKbmrxFHaMQ9BGx9n8GYF1n794Ky_heELex6w8%3D)
Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. _But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed._

Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – [**but with you on our team, I know our chances will increase exponentially.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6ee1b8515b04562ba1ac901ccf30b9d&_e=nGCm2EHA-IFcNXMBq7qRVGb3LRkvbqbl5pgUcL5InqSPYuc-BDL0MIIXIfwOyQQF8BCaftPaRrO5xTPRCcKAdPoljOwT5lMC8YDVd1qwzpSz51tWaPV_EVLzHFo9YGY4omGXIAT8gRC1lxDWPl0lseEcwRLF21UJAedlFPJPc8MiRej8xjCilLe6jO5AJ1Hlz5mqOGBzc17tiMb1cnshhjmCVie3CiwJgnjiAuaVVvQvb2xkEFtMxeoIP2Rag-rAk7H4R2ACd1niAyJL1-XLC1_gU1qUsPoMjnp0X6yU1g10JhgNbGTUe1xR_3NsEwN8fM2Otl1Ns1vTfYoh_Dp1dwrbtSKvdUzUa6v27W4NNA9riGLRYaewJ-z4sJob7fwbwxAJngEk6611xBKA2Ovb_Fwl5pJey4ZIAfYzZQo__H4%3D)

I’ll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn’t have you on my mailing list. As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, _**I am going to need every patriot to step forward.**_ So please, [**let me hear from you today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6ee1b8515b04562ba1ac901ccf30b9d&_e=nGCm2EHA-IFcNXMBq7qRVGb3LRkvbqbl5pgUcL5InqSPYuc-BDL0MIIXIfwOyQQF8BCaftPaRrO5xTPRCcKAdPoljOwT5lMC8YDVd1qwzpSz51tWaPV_EVLzHFo9YGY4omGXIAT8gRC1lxDWPl0lseEcwRLF21UJAedlFPJPc8MiRej8xjCilLe6jO5AJ1Hlz5mqOGBzc17tiMb1cnshhjmCVie3CiwJgnjiAuaVVvQvb2xkEFtMxeoIP2Rag-rAfabawAifCrPKDGD2LRHujwBemcEcBUkpotwJJGwqYAJIa-rUq2-Q3IiQnwYXn0IQ_stNy5-q-k9ZKAYkR7O4b3cSzFQlRCgmAPXSOIk7xU-sunFIttxAAXXKAa6qqMia1mXZC2t8ttSN418hcOF4c5TBVa52njPVmvdiaB519hM%3D)

[**There are many more conservatives I haven’t reached yet.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6ee1b8515b04562ba1ac901ccf30b9d&_e=nGCm2EHA-IFcNXMBq7qRVGb3LRkvbqbl5pgUcL5InqSPYuc-BDL0MIIXIfwOyQQF8BCaftPaRrO5xTPRCcKAdPoljOwT5lMC8YDVd1qwzpSz51tWaPV_EVLzHFo9YGY4omGXIAT8gRC1lxDWPl0lseEcwRLF21UJAedlFPJPc8MiRej8xjCilLe6jO5AJ1Hlz5mqOGBzc17tiMb1cnshhjmCVie3CiwJgnjiAuaVVvQvb2xkEFtMxeoIP2Rag-rApS4YzhftbGuOWkwtvNsP4nmi6IQvHHN5iZdZdgDshxASlZbirJT-mJ6wLlWduOvWbIOexzWsdh5XiSWLcIQpsMu7DfEe2AzqkwOmleTF1BRTBGycfS8y0b00twKt0llxFAR4f2xPjjK2cgjEJFzkFjy1sXOlqiRukKsCf61FYn4%3D)

[** _RESPOND TO THE SPEAKER HERE_ **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6ee1b8515b04562ba1ac901ccf30b9d&_e=nGCm2EHA-IFcNXMBq7qRVGb3LRkvbqbl5pgUcL5InqSPYuc-BDL0MIIXIfwOyQQF8BCaftPaRrO5xTPRCcKAdPoljOwT5lMC8YDVd1qwzpSz51tWaPV_EVLzHFo9YGY4omGXIAT8gRC1lxDWPl0lseEcwRLF21UJAedlFPJPc8MiRej8xjCilLe6jO5AJ1Hlz5mqOGBzc17tiMb1cnshhjmCVie3CiwJgnjiAuaVVvQvb2xkEFtMxeoIP2Rag-rASo8D5a6axYu2gXLGp8ZLtc3cbAo4EtWTfFensExhqcmfsjYF6vjZ-mHfMUappgQUVRTP2Rx0YE5_JnyJX5v6pSBNfLFE7QJZ_yZ4sKJfl2eGgeXsbuQq11QQ9ynjdO3pa89SwRdd38EB7R_9rviMPgfxJarTMbiIM3O-qc41luU%3D)
With respect,

[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c6ee1b8515b04562ba1ac901ccf30b9d&_e=nGCm2EHA-IFcNXMBq7qRVGb3LRkvbqbl5pgUcL5InqSPYuc-BDL0MIIXIfwOyQQF8BCaftPaRrO5xTPRCcKAdPoljOwT5lMC8YDVd1qwzpSz51tWaPV_EVLzHFo9YGY4omGXIAT8gRC1lxDWPl0lseEcwRLF21UJAedlFPJPc8MiRej8xjCilLe6jO5AJ1Hlz5mqOGBzc17tiMb1cnshhjmCVie3CiwJgnjiAuaVVvQvb2xkEFtMxeoIP2Rag-rAXdEBdM3J4RcosHO5PqGsHbtfKQquxPHYymUKe1TcCc_p9neg2GUT7ORaKbRZHq1BzlHxZRAQg19-nTmGesncM_z5eWdweh_154Kk3_HsXigGAjErNE2NO1L7nDNfWdP_cECvVKE_1M0QZF5PB1xvqrb8bIc4dhJWYerufqCc--8%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

clean_body: It’s been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you’re not on Team Johnson yet. We’re emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you. | | Peter - I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well. Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give. Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed. Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – I’ll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn’t have you on my mailing list. As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, I am going to need every patriot to step forward. So please, With respect, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? body:
what matters most to grassroots activists like you, friend?
| | |
---
Hi, friend — it's Emily, Debbie's digital director, here with a quick ask:
Right now, I'm conducting an exclusive focus group to gauge the issues top of mind for Debbie's most engaged online supporters. And when I checked, you were one of the first on our list!
**A little under a year out from Election Day, your feedback will be a key factor in how we ramp up our work to retire Rick Scott —[so, friend, will you please take a moment to complete our November Focus Group? It expires at midnight tonight so be sure to lock in your responses now! >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73953872/440183504/-438023059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk333-su-nd&refcode=jtk333-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UzYWVkY2YtYjQ4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YEVE5MmKMoE2d60OOK7Pv_0dGIef21no2Q7WoUcSbkc=&emci=6ec14cc7-3d86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=3e3aedcf-b48b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=3969733)**

A few weeks ago, we saw Democrats sweep elections nationwide. If there's anything we learned, it's that a well-funded, passionate grassroots team has what it takes to beat the odds and defeat _any_ opponent. _That's exactly why I am 100% confident that we can defeat Rick Scott next November._
Polling shows we've already pulled one point ahead. Now, it's just a matter of building on that momentum to flip Florida blue, send Debbie to the Senate, and defend our Senate majority.

**The simplest way to accomplish that is by keeping up with what matters most to grassroots activists who have their finger on the pulse **— _activists like you, friend._
**Nothing we've accomplished so far would have happened without your support, which is why I'm asking for your help one more time in preparation for Democrats' best pickup opportunity this cycle:[Please, will you take Team Debbie's exclusive November Focus group before the link expires at midnight? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73953874/440183506/-438023059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk333-su-nd&refcode=jtk333-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UzYWVkY2YtYjQ4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YEVE5MmKMoE2d60OOK7Pv_0dGIef21no2Q7WoUcSbkc=&emci=6ec14cc7-3d86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=3e3aedcf-b48b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Join the Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73953875/440183507/-438023059?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk333-su-nd&refcode=jtk333-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2UzYWVkY2YtYjQ4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YEVE5MmKMoE2d60OOK7Pv_0dGIef21no2Q7WoUcSbkc=&emci=6ec14cc7-3d86-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=3e3aedcf-b48b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=3969733)

_I'm reviewing responses first thing tomorrow morning, so please be sure to get yours in ASAP!_

Thanks so much again — I'll be back in touch soon.

Emily W.

Digital Director, Team Debbie

name: Casey4Congress
subject: A message from Mike Casey
body:
Hmong New Years
| | | |
---
| A message from your Candidate for U.S. Congress (MN-4), Mike Casey:
---
| Today was a remarkable day, having celebrated the Hmong New Year in St. Paul. Engaging with prominent Hmong community leaders and immersing in their rich, vibrant culture was an extraordinary experience. I am committed to collaborating closely with the Hmong community leadership to catalyze meaningful change in Minnesota's Congressional District 4. My focus is on advocating for policies that honor the sacrifices of Hmong veterans, ensuring they receive the recognition and benefits they rightfully deserve. Additionally, I am dedicated to fostering policies that support and nurture the growth of small businesses, the vital pillars of America's economy. Together, we stand united in our mission to preserve and propel the American dream. Wishing you a wonderful, safe weekend and happy holidays.
Sincerely,
---

body:
The true power of our campaign comes from contributions made by grassroots supporters like you.
#
**Peter, our finance team has been poring over the donor record of every Team Pramila supporter in ActBlue, and here’s what we found for you:**
**Peter's Official Team Pramila Record**
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Donor: No — not yet!**
**Suggested donation: $3[Donate $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231125.3nly9M&refcode=em20231125-3202&t=1&akid=3202%2E420207%2EYhFpQv)

[**Peter, if you can, please make a $3 contribution right now to fuel our people-powered campaign and help us keep pace with our campaign plans through the end of the year!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231125.3nly9M&refcode=em20231125-3202&t=2&akid=3202%2E420207%2EYhFpQv)

Thanks for all you do,
Team Pramila

name: Sam Brown
subject: My soul was saved that day
body:
It started in 2008, while serving in Afghanistan, when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle. | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=facf898858ea4e06b867e22a5fba0f1f&_t=UboBJsCK4q2LAYGZ2z4pThTjFNM7c6IW9wzaUIjmbF_wt2bxfAtyWD-PBpA_oCmaAdl00nPtDU1AIo9GeCnAHUsBPYkCX7ZrBCTTj-G898Y%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=facf898858ea4e06b867e22a5fba0f1f&_t=UboBJsCK4q2LAYGZ2z4pThTjFNM7c6IW9wzaUIjmbF_wt2bxfAtyWD-PBpA_oCmaAdl00nPtDU1AIo9GeCnAHUsBPYkCX7ZrBCTTj-G898Y%3D)

|
Friend,

It started in 2008, while serving in Afghanistan, when a roadside bomb detonated under the gas tank of my vehicle.

I was certain my time on this earth was over.

Until I faintly heard the words "I've got you" from my fellow soldier as the flames on my body were extinguished.

That experience taught me this: Service to the American people is the greatest honor imaginable.

But it didn't take a near-death experience for me to know with every fiber of my being that serving this country was all in accordance with God's plan for me.

**[That's why I'm counting on your help in my campaign for U.S. Senate.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=facf898858ea4e06b867e22a5fba0f1f&_e=QmL8ej28CNhnbZrPE6h6ZGzfCgtpIETSqVBho-9PZGi47h1HbzCqM8ZqOYylZPJT9IFsSssIiwYrnJsxDn6QoEoAhfPMenHgyXR8gCTpQvomkUuMKifQjR4NQktOrUzXVkRNkCukGNKxoMy4dQyeKeiBzAa8skr69ygurntxwOYYt1GHzp4zQ_PRDJXMacHycZnRS70mi6qgxNIk-lMq27caFlw33jfh6GcogEQ2PdY05TVW5SSF2sNIQe5o29Xkt_e1_Xak6OIcrdzTsL496dEBzd87uFJzfaH-OzohxMDv9Wy06U7mBOOozKjpoMflVnwT4GDEdaZLg1NNGkMsmQ%3D%3D "That’s why I’m counting on your help in my campaign for U.S. Senate. ")**

I don't have decades of political experience under my belt.

I don't have wealthy coastal elites bankrolling my campaign.

But what I do have is a love for this country that is unmatched and the understanding that we can't afford to let our nation slip away any further than it already has.

**[Today, my heart is filled with a passion to save this country before we lose it forever. And I know yours is too, Friend!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=facf898858ea4e06b867e22a5fba0f1f&_e=QmL8ej28CNhnbZrPE6h6ZGzfCgtpIETSqVBho-9PZGi47h1HbzCqM8ZqOYylZPJT9IFsSssIiwYrnJsxDn6QoEoAhfPMenHgyXR8gCTpQvomkUuMKifQjR4NQktOrUzXVkRNkCukGNKxoMy4dQyeKeiBzAa8skr69ygurntxwOYYt1GHzp4zQ_PRDJXMacHyRVtS23Jd2Aa4McIFsHtsvLfLUQIvSAJp0YB9imxRxMHpECYBTOhdBc4wIrlFHqpNoRQ07P7bd4zCS-nzTgAMx7Wjv6LDqLA1D7kCUzjwTIOLb2TFqrcBBajhfViL6E98KqcMRyRXhVdxTw5oCzF0qA%3D%3D "Today, my heart is filled with a passion to save this country before we lose it forever. And I know yours is too, Friend!")**

I always knew it wouldn't be easy.

The radical left is targeting my race because they know I won't play their games. They've already raised $30+ MILLION to try to end my campaign..

Since that day in 2008, I've met the woman of my dreams. I've had 3 beautiful children. I started a business working to get veterans the critical medications they need every day. And my dedication to making this country better for my family and every American has never been stronger.

That's why when everything is on the line, I'll never stop fighting for you.

**[It's truly up to us to ensure our children and grandchildren inherit a patriotic, safe and sane country.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=facf898858ea4e06b867e22a5fba0f1f&_e=QmL8ej28CNhnbZrPE6h6ZGzfCgtpIETSqVBho-9PZGi47h1HbzCqM8ZqOYylZPJT9IFsSssIiwYrnJsxDn6QoEoAhfPMenHgyXR8gCTpQvomkUuMKifQjR4NQktOrUzXVkRNkCukGNKxoMy4dQyeKeiBzAa8skr69ygurntxwOYYt1GHzp4zQ_PRDJXMacHysfbQKalzHPLT7l-bD9mLmKWJF03PmIIwElyhAcXLSmf5O8H826pX--poyiCRorOIW49CP8gj3POX6IgtN9ksXkcXBSDAhX-A64dD1A07g6DX55WsMy_J4NT_AxvrAoWB1MeNs1MOnYJSByvHWtiHAQ%3D%3D "It’s truly up to us to ensure our children and grandchildren inherit a patriotic, safe and sane country. ")**

So from one fighter to another, would you take 2 minutes to support a conservative combat veteran get to Washington?

---
| | [SUPPORT SAM](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=facf898858ea4e06b867e22a5fba0f1f&_e=QmL8ej28CNhnbZrPE6h6ZGzfCgtpIETSqVBho-9PZGi47h1HbzCqM8ZqOYylZPJT9IFsSssIiwYrnJsxDn6QoEoAhfPMenHgyXR8gCTpQvomkUuMKifQjR4NQktOrUzXVkRNkCukGNKxoMy4dQyeKeiBzAa8skr69ygurntxwOYYt1GHzp4zQ_PRDJXMacHyIgP-s2Lw3t3N_hYd4k0w9oZ89oYhlb8cfxwK-hvSVvWpiid_D4xsslWjkAXveJb5TUMQTAtE7JY1E9SMf_PG_MEIbui-kM9F92zlA668_eOrig4zwlZS4QbG3zJV-LGrCiZrWcwFtGHGe31V0IFcxg%3D%3D)
---

Duty First,

CPT Sam Brown, USA, Ret.

---
|
---
| Paid for Sam Brown for Nevada
---

Las Vegas, NV 89136

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: lessons from my teenage self
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73954444/440185525/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQzODc1MzQtYjY4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfqLSd7sIhI_HXckhw1KbPUNhpQYyKDTMmE3pyNPAO4=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73954445/440185526/417269932?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20231125_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQzODc1MzQtYjY4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfqLSd7sIhI_HXckhw1KbPUNhpQYyKDTMmE3pyNPAO4=) Folks,

Have I ever told you how I got into public service?

**I grew up the son of hardworking farmworkers.** My family lived in a small trailer in rural California where my brother and I shared a bed that in the daytime converted into a kitchen table.

When I was a teenager, I walked in the desert heat to different businesses asking them to invest in our community by investing in me and my dreams of a college education. I made them a promise that I would come back to the Coachella Valley to serve our community as a physician in return for their trust in me.

I not only returned to serve as an emergency physician, but eventually was elected to serve my community in Congress. For more than a decade, I’ve fought every day for my family, friends, and neighbors who dream the same dream my parents had for me.

**Those memories have come flooding back lately.** Because I’ve spent weeks listening to the MAGA circus go round after round, attacking each other, blaming Democrats, and doing everything they can _EXCEPT_ serving the American people.

**And that’s part and parcel for the extreme MAGA caucus.** Instead of doing the hard work of reaching across the aisle to build consensus, they grind our government to a halt to play partisan games.

Instead of building progress and promise for the next generation of Americans, they desperately scratch and claw their way to their own power, everyone else be damned. **They’re not public servants – they only serve themselves, and I’m sick of it.**

**They need to get their house in order. They need to end the chaos. They need to do their jobs. But I’m not waiting around for them, team, I’m taking action.**

[**I’m taking a lesson from my teenage self here – together we can defeat the MAGA chaos caucus and win back control of the House. But I can’t do it alone. So I’m counting on you here, friend. Can you pitch in $10 (or anything you can afford) toward our 1,000 donation goal today and help us take back our House Majority and end the MAGA chaos? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73954446/440185527/417269932?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20231125_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQzODc1MzQtYjY4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfqLSd7sIhI_HXckhw1KbPUNhpQYyKDTMmE3pyNPAO4=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73954476/440185561/417269932?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RRFC_20231125_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQzODc1MzQtYjY4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfqLSd7sIhI_HXckhw1KbPUNhpQYyKDTMmE3pyNPAO4=)

clean_body: | = = Folks, Have I ever told you how I got into public service? I grew up the son of hardworking farmworkers. My family lived in a small trailer in rural California where my brother and I shared a bed that in the daytime converted into a kitchen table. When I was a teenager, I walked in the desert heat to different businesses asking them to invest in our community by investing in me and my dreams of a college education. I made them a promise that I would come back to the Coachella Valley to serve our community as a physician in return for their trust in me. I not only returned to serve as an emergency physician, but eventually was elected to serve my community in Congress. For more than a decade, I’ve fought every day for my family, friends, and neighbors who dream the same dream my parents had for me. Those memories have come flooding back lately. Because I’ve spent weeks listening to the MAGA circus go round after round, attacking each other, blaming Democrats, and doing everything they can EXCEPT serving the American people. And that’s part and parcel for the extreme MAGA caucus. Instead of doing the hard work of reaching across the aisle to build consensus, they grind our government to a halt to play partisan games. Instead of building progress and promise for the next generation of Americans, they desperately scratch and claw their way to their own power, everyone else be damned. They’re not public servants – they only serve themselves, and I’m sick of it. They need to get their house in order. They need to end the chaos. They need to do their jobs. But I’m not waiting around for them, team, I’m taking action. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you for being with me in this fight, Dr. Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202 www.drraulruiz.com/ Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Five days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We at Justice Democrats are approaching our end-of-month fundraising
deadline in just five days, and with AIPAC planning to drop $100,000,000
to oust the Squad, we need to start preparing NOW.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231125.1El9Oo&refcode=em20231125-32025&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32025%2E1203867%2EkglflO ]Can you make a grassroots contribution of $3 or more
today to help us reach our goal by Thursday at midnight?

While the movement for a ceasefire is growing day by day, there’s a big
reason more Democrats aren’t joining our progressive bloc in standing on
the right side of history: they’re afraid of AIPAC.

As Slate noted in their recent report, AIPAC is “one of the most powerful,
best-funded influence operations in Washington,” and they’re looking to
make an example out of any Democratic member of Congress who crosses them.

The Slate article goes on to point out:

In the 2022 midterms, the Israel lobby became the largest single-issue
outside spender in Democratic primaries, pouring in nearly $30 million via
the super PAC the United Democracy Project, and millions more via the
Democratic Majority for Israel PAC. It was an astronomical amount of
money, mostly directed at knocking progressives out of the primaries,
largely in open and redrawn seats. Despite there being fewer vacancies in
2024, that money figure is expected to at least triple.

AIPAC is now threatening to spend $100 million to try and unseat
progressive incumbents Cori Bush, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, and other
Squad members who defy the status quo and stand up for the human rights of
Palestinians.

Justice Democrats is gearing up to defend the Squad next year, but since
we refuse to take money from corporate PACS, we face an uphill battle.
That’s exactly why your donations are so impactful.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231125.1El9Oo&refcode=em20231125-32025&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32025%2E1203867%2EkglflO ]With five days until our next deadline, please chip in whatever you can
afford to power our fight against AIPAC and re-elect our progressive
incumbents in 2024!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231125.1El9Oo&refcode=em20231125-32025&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=32025%2E1203867%2EkglflO ]Contribute $3

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=32025%2E1203867%2EkglflO ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=32025%2E1203867%2EkglflO ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231125-32025-footer&t=1024&refcode2=32025_1203867_kglflO&akid=32025%2E1203867%2EkglflO

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=32025%2E1203867%2EkglflO

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Lori Chavez-DeRemer
subject: Shop Small this Saturday!
body:
| | | |
---
---
---
Peter, today is Small Business Saturday!
---
---
Small businesses are the backbone of our communities, and they play a crucial role in shaping the unique character of our great state. This Saturday marks a day dedicated to celebrating and supporting the small businesses that make Oregon thrive.
I encourage you to join me in embracing the spirit of Small Business Saturday by shopping local and discovering the treasures that our small businesses have to offer. Whether it's a local coffee shop, a family-owned bookstore, or a charming boutique, your support directly contributes to the success of our local entrepreneurs and strengthens the economic vitality of our community.
From Portland to Pendleton, from Ashland to Astoria, incredible small businesses are waiting to welcome you with open arms.
Remember, when you choose to support small businesses, you are investing in the heart and soul of our community. Your decision to shop local has a lasting impact, creating jobs, fostering innovation, and ensuring a vibrant future for Oregon.
Thank you for being an integral part of our community and I hope you join me in celebrating our small businesses.
Thank you,
---
---
Lori Chavez-DeRemer
Congresswoman OR-05
---
---

clean_body: | | | | Peter, today is Small Business Saturday! Small businesses are the backbone of our communities, and they play a crucial role in shaping the unique character of our great state. This Saturday marks a day dedicated to celebrating and supporting the small businesses that make Oregon thrive. I encourage you to join me in embracing the spirit of Small Business Saturday by shopping local and discovering the treasures that our small businesses have to offer. Whether it's a local coffee shop, a family-owned bookstore, or a charming boutique, your support directly contributes to the success of our local entrepreneurs and strengthens the economic vitality of our community. From Portland to Pendleton, from Ashland to Astoria, incredible small businesses are waiting to welcome you with open arms. Remember, when you choose to support small businesses, you are investing in the heart and soul of our community. Your decision to shop local has a lasting impact, creating jobs, fostering innovation, and ensuring a vibrant future for Oregon. Thank you for being an integral part of our community and I hope you join me in celebrating our small businesses. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==

But what happened on Monday was truly special. The energy with Governor Sununu was palpable. And having former Rep. Charlie Bass's endorsement? Unreal. Here's the point. New Hampshire picks presidents. People are paying attention. We are rising in the polls. And I need your help to win. Or forward this email to your friends and family so that we can build our momentum at just the right time (that's NOW, in case I was unclear!). Special and important things are happening, and I'm so thankful for you helping me get the Truth out. I will be appearing on the following news programs tomorrow, Sunday, Nov 26th: with Dana Bash – 9 AM Eastern with Jonathan Karl – 10 AM Eastern (Check local listings) | | Simply put...we can do better... | | Holiday season is in full swing now, and it's time to bring out the best sweater you'll add to your closet this year. | | Instead of highlighting a news clip this week, I wanted to show you what the press thought of our town hall. Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=43dd91ffddee4e8d840394fbc389033d&_e=4QuxLLfqft1qBhzSt_42DPPQM-QaFB10FRBFEfk2ODNfzvWqdS6ZkkcGahw5mCRganKdTKgtcg-C3TfvK8z0dduWtS0ec8H9ZXF9307fF4mkYZ19Sr5_BMSRi6-Fi21Bnu2jmmwOmCt3IxmsX1vQXvHO9k-7vy1PX9WKPKAZTCQT0SSXdyOHqmouDS-XVpoKBDB2bKO80C237Ks22cKjhrPj9w1RGOEATl5jeiz0m2mV7k0zJymkc1GeihMfB4ZoXNEFkwlgBKygLRQni8rEeFctlwI7H1ywJRd2sYC1w9-ov8NN6YIwguSsGrKwf5hOmCJgRzSt5upl4p0C162w4DoOZIixljaw83Ry20BviO8%3D)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=43dd91ffddee4e8d840394fbc389033d&_e=4QuxLLfqft1qBhzSt_42DPPQM-QaFB10FRBFEfk2ODNfzvWqdS6ZkkcGahw5mCRganKdTKgtcg-C3TfvK8z0dduWtS0ec8H9ZXF9307fF4mkYZ19Sr5_BMSRi6-Fi21Bnu2jmmwOmCt3IxmsX1vQXvHO9k-7vy1PX9WKPKAZTCQT0SSXdyOHqmouDS-XVpoKBDB2bKO80C237Ks22cKjhnqZPQLbfhDVJOXQfILGJ7YEWpJMRVeCo19D0xbkekmwELXipaB3y3XVSsbyrx_5BHsIiZ0AfpC41RrKx2cxCWgwd1TkOv9UNd_jUvn7e-lgxP1YK1QRqa-6HiM0zimBzzrbQeo0QrgGvVjJLNnpsxg%3D)

I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **

Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $24,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Team Schiff
subject: Adam is counting on you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We can’t stand idly by while they continue their attacks, so we need to ensure we have the resources to resist.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4563%2E5257348%2EEgboBb)
Derek, Adam needs your support now more than ever. Here’s why:
**_First_** , Adam launched his campaign for the U.S. Senate just as Kevin McCarthy ousted him from his position as the leading Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee.
**_Then_** , Republicans increased their attacks and proposed a bill to prevent him from accessing classified information, and formally censured him in the House under the personal threat from Donald Trump to primary any Republican who refused to go along with their stunt.
**_Now_** , with early voting almost _10 weeks away_ , the attacks against Adam are only going to ramp up. We can’t stand idly by while they continue their attacks, so we need to ensure we have the resources to resist.
**Adam needs your support to stand up to these attacks, and grassroots support has been the key to our victories since he launched his campaign.** Adam is counting on supporters like you to help fight the far-right.

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: We can’t afford a slowdown.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Straight from our ActBlue dashboard
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33714%2E3422442%2EwPQUfZ)
Derek, since it’s Saturday, we’ll get right to the point here. We just set a goal of raising $675,000 before midnight on the 30th.
We have an incredibly strong campaign that is funded by thousands of people pitching in what they can. Since this is a grassroots campaign, we’re going to be transparent: **our fundraising took a dip this month.** Take a look at our ActBlue dashboard:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231125?refcode=EMAN25_1_EOM_20231125_V1_F&refcode2=33714_3422442_wPQUfZ&akid=33714%2E3422442%2EwPQUfZ)
It’s pretty normal for fundraising to slow down during holiday weeks. But with our competitive primary just around the corner on March 5, 2024, we can’t afford a slow-down if we’re going to start running ads and campaigning aggressively up and down the state.
**[Will you donate today to help us catch up here and reach our end of month fundraising goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231125?refcode=EMAN25_1_EOM_20231125_V1_F&refcode2=33714_3422442_wPQUfZ&akid=33714%2E3422442%2EwPQUfZ)**

Thanks for being on team Porter,
-KP HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN25_1_EOM_20231125_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=33714_3422442_wPQUfZ&akid=33714%2E3422442%2EwPQUfZ)**

It’s only been a couple months since I filed to run and already we’ve brought in $30,000 to this campaign... | | | | | [](https://harbickfororegon.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ed96bc27b78bb6b7e94ca23a&id=eda0f3ce59&e=3362c31595)
---
Peter,
I hope you had a great Thanksgiving with your loved ones.
I want to thank everyone who joined us at our Campaign Kickoff! It was so encouraging to see so many people join us in this effort.
It’s only been a couple months since I filed to run for office. Already we’ve brought in $30,000 to this campaign...and we’re just getting started! We won’t stop until we bring back conservative leadership to House District 12.
Coming up soon are three great Christmas parades that we will be participating in. We could use volunteers to help us for each of these. Please check out the options below and reply if you are able to help. We’ll then get you more details.
Thank you!
Darin

---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=23ec28c0e2734547aff347a4ec241d1d&_e=ESjI5WmoK3_88yok0zEckzRun8CCLhgg0XkwVbHu5IfnJZlojAaJCPQ6tmFUScSBDvo2FWh55OGpuY4iDJIlc7JifxEcl3cIIGD_N8UNGaDBNNXZOc1jXS4uvn3BAHXk-A5zkLEg83X7xyYu0crIKSzk-bgqzSmM3YjU1iVnOj4QyjNTN2IoeEOfze0HFURBVaJEs32R9nhEu6bZBsPAGeZYUb5mbx8ZL-002iskaCFfZBx6I7m9c5Zv-N9wHfkixob0xwHATr5JJq1CmIPprqJkuG7G_jaTluEmILlzexQtsHqqbG5ARK-j7-P-rHABRKb7FL2rNUQVWVHBzBwjoPX4_8XgCLDFrThxZ-NhtWmIbsaOYTOEVCRDJYpbuTDl5A_aR-qw6GDfV8EHLQTsoDbihvzmIWEOQ5xaMgUhyMEuh7hYoAfG6zr9EkKfnlwNf_AlPMMc7dVE6lW7Cwaigw%3D%3D)
---
**[<< Contribute to seal the left’s fate in the Senate next year and flip the Mountain State RED in 2024. >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=23ec28c0e2734547aff347a4ec241d1d&_e=ESjI5WmoK3_88yok0zEckzRun8CCLhgg0XkwVbHu5IfnJZlojAaJCPQ6tmFUScSBDvo2FWh55OGpuY4iDJIlc7JifxEcl3cIIGD_N8UNGaDBNNXZOc1jXS4uvn3BAHXk-A5zkLEg83X7xyYu0crIKSzk-bgqzSmM3YjU1iVnOj4QyjNTN2IoeEOfze0HFURBVaJEs32R9nhEu6bZBsPAGeZYUb5mbx8ZL-002iskaCFfZBx6I7m9c5Zv-N9wHfkixob0xwHATr5JJq1CmIPprqJkuG7G_jaTluEmILlzexQtsHqqbG5ARK-j7-P-rHABUHB0wLyG89FbMjrfeK1bgkQBRT-Mhi_VC9_A2EdAEvP83yX7OKTV-KOV-_MlW-PP7f5A0ATSusu7hPDL5lLgiOKP8wjeqZEbD8UWpAup_4rMYmvDmqwgv3ng6FveYc5MP7TVJIEOHlJfyfBAMMFFCQ%3D%3D)**
---
_For far too long, the people of West Virginia have been represented in our Senate by a faux “moderate” who has served as an unwavering rubber stamp for Joe Biden’s socialist agenda._ **[But that’s going to change in a big way on November 5, 2024 when I WIN the Senate seat currently held by Joe Manchin.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=23ec28c0e2734547aff347a4ec241d1d&_e=ESjI5WmoK3_88yok0zEckzRun8CCLhgg0XkwVbHu5IfnJZlojAaJCPQ6tmFUScSBDvo2FWh55OGpuY4iDJIlc7JifxEcl3cIIGD_N8UNGaDBNNXZOc1jXS4uvn3BAHXk-A5zkLEg83X7xyYu0crIKSzk-bgqzSmM3YjU1iVnOj4QyjNTN2IoeEOfze0HFURBVaJEs32R9nhEu6bZBsPAGeZYUb5mbx8ZL-002iskaCFfZBx6I7m9c5Zv-N9wHfkixob0xwHATr5JJq1CmIPprqJkuG7G_jaTluEmILlzexQtsHqqbG5ARK-j7-P-rHABZbmW9nGSYZNETtnXYAN2MiVjy8vw8qpexxBkN-3I_DIDS0SKZkAAIWKOncBOTn3WexMtDZdmC4Jo6zuTTLRs56R28afWQfmY2nj2ldqpRXaUbRoQ_NR90FjcYP7ZnKv-RUR74CC0KFip9maoOKV4XQ%3D%3D)** With your support, Peter, we’re going to make sure Kamala Harris is no longer the tie-breaking vote in our Senate by giving the GOP an extensive majority next year. **[So please contribute to help me beat whoever the Democrats pit against me next year and let’s flip West Virginia’s Senate seat RED in 2024.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=23ec28c0e2734547aff347a4ec241d1d&_e=ESjI5WmoK3_88yok0zEckzRun8CCLhgg0XkwVbHu5IfnJZlojAaJCPQ6tmFUScSBDvo2FWh55OGpuY4iDJIlc7JifxEcl3cIIGD_N8UNGaDBNNXZOc1jXS4uvn3BAHXk-A5zkLEg83X7xyYu0crIKSzk-bgqzSmM3YjU1iVnOj4QyjNTN2IoeEOfze0HFURBVaJEs32R9nhEu6bZBsPAGeZYUb5mbx8ZL-002iskaCFfZBx6I7m9c5Zv-N9wHfkixob0xwHATr5JJq1CmIPprqJkuG7G_jaTluEmILlzexQtsHqqbG5ARK-j7-P-rHAB-62C2lHNMVwkh3rzDa-AyDA2AUq6XlfpJPtLg13Vjop2bBE0IyPr-Bgb1WIJTtoxPXC9x8eZbdmj2EVcrDd7qwK1Na1OzN75qyGWhf_R6BNBZcYU8jj8D8eiMMr0z35tF-28wKmFcpKvJs7ZUFWsMQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Let’s turn West Virginia into the reddest state in the country next year.| | | Peter, Joe Biden and the Democrats are at the thought of next year’s U.S. Senate election in West Virginia after Joe Manchin announced his retirement earlier this month. For far too long, the people of West Virginia have been represented in our Senate by a faux “moderate” who has served as an unwavering rubber stamp for Joe Biden’s socialist agenda. With your support, Peter, we’re going to make sure Kamala Harris is no longer the tie-breaking vote in our Senate by giving the GOP an extensive majority next year. | | Peter, Tim Kaine has spent his entire career being a yes-man to whoever gives him the most fame, money, and, power.

As a big-wig DC lawyer, he served special interests lobbying to squeeze every dime he could out of the government.

As Hillary Clinton’s Vice Presidential pick, he did the dirty work for her schemes and hoaxes and obeyed every crooked order she gave him.

And now as Virginia’s Senator, he writes blank checks to Joe Biden and says “yes sir” every time the far socialist Left has a demand for him.

**It’s almost like Tim Kaine serves everyone but the people he was elected to represent. **
---
[**DEFEAT TIM KAINE**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=b5160a2fc6ca411b9622f1ec1f941d1c&_e=0sYUY7cqicc_DF72z7c4EmBS_fzSDygd_AgvtXHqPmvA8uHHrIJTjESKvLw2I1nTH8kgg3tuEqK8xmhaoQ8_-q319jTOSB19ORiqVSMdai3DgWNT7bXdFiB1-jdxUGzd7tDNGJgW13Y-_A_kM1G85_S-RMwUvKJndL3NnrGzQ3L0gHA1cfuzs3n-JdjuhGilGYGMaIiW3DzuEIWaaOk3Ai_HB20cuyKHbcTjS0o_q9qa96lxFw7WcQzXLNWctSCdCJO72jPYmLeTcy2oTt-QOrUPBiMk77llifYi1kVPOl2FLgrqcxbAVl1A9_OzjMbwaKfUpHARc_LhLkLkV4_jamqdWrtt3AC1_YVV3P2Wkdo%3D)
---
**My name is CAPT Hung Cao, and unlike Tim Kaine, I’ve spent my life serving only one purpose: America’s freedom.**

I served for 25-years as a Captain in the U.S. Navy. My service took me to Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia, where I performed deep dives up to 300 feet and dismantled bombs with seconds to spare.

I was never concerned about what was “in it for me.” My only purpose was to keep America safe.

**Now, I have a new call of duty, and I need your help on this high-priority mission.**

**I’m running for U.S. Senate in Virginia because I believe our Commonwealth and our country deserve better than Tim Kaine.**

**[Will you help me defeat this career politician today and bring a spirit of service back to Congress?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=b5160a2fc6ca411b9622f1ec1f941d1c&_e=0sYUY7cqicc_DF72z7c4EmBS_fzSDygd_AgvtXHqPmvA8uHHrIJTjESKvLw2I1nTH8kgg3tuEqK8xmhaoQ8_-q319jTOSB19ORiqVSMdai3DgWNT7bXdFiB1-jdxUGzd7tDNGJgW13Y-_A_kM1G85_S-RMwUvKJndL3NnrGzQ3L0gHA1cfuzs3n-JdjuhGilGYGMaIiW3DzuEIWaaOk3AuVSTMelT6b2TacQPxdROMUBunr6vEVaPVrwhU778X3CGz50VvFtBIbj_qpgXkIn_gWST92RwG4i6AJ18kZK1MIEyqcEKeSafbwopRAxfmnRnybSggUKtilAV4RnonidzrkDAlWyBwtyVo8EgQNWLus%3D)**

Fellow conservative, This is OUTRAGEOUS. Democrats in the House are calling on Joe Biden to let thousands of Palestinians into the United States. Yes, you read that right! Radical congressional Democrats wrote Biden a letter calling on him to "designate the Palestinian territories for Temporary Protected Status." In other words, giving Palestinians _special permission_ to res-settle in our country. I have a two-word response: **HELL. NO. ** This administration has already opened the floodgates to MILLIONS of illegal immigrants, including those on the FBI's terrorist watch list. Allowing THOUSANDS MORE migrants into our country is the last thing we need right now! **If you agree, please chip in today to fight back against the leftist Democrats' extreme open-borders agenda. **

body:
This time of year, it’s common for campaigns like ours to see a dip in fundraising.
Team—This time of year, it’s common for campaigns like ours to see a dip in fundraising, and unfortunately, that’s true for us too.

We fell short of our last fundraising goal, and in the past few weeks, we’ve seen a significant dip in the number of grassroots donations to our campaign.

I don’t want to sound the alarm bells arbitrarily, but I am concerned.

Mike Johnson and his far-right money groups have already **raised $16 million in just a few weeks.** With election experts calling NY-17 one of the most important races in determining the House majority, we know Johnson will pour millions into our district to defeat me.

We need to drastically pick up the pace on our grassroots fundraising to defeat Mike Lawler and retake our House majority.

[**That’s why I need to ask: Will you dig deep and donate any amount to ensure we hit this month’s $70,000 end-of-month goal? The _Cook Political Report_ , _Inside Elections_ , and _Sabato’s Crystal Ball_ are all calling NY-17 a “toss-up” and one of the most competitive districts in the country. Mike Lawler has even been named the second-most vulnerable Republican in Congress by _Daily Kos_.

With the Republican majority hanging by a thread, flipping NY-17 is required to retake our House majority. But we need to pick up the pace if we’re going to ensure we have the resources to win.

**[Our critical end-of-month deadline is just days away. And any amount you can contribute gets us one step closer to ousting Mike Lawler, Mike Johnson, and all his MAGA buddies. Chip in $5 or any amount you can today.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73956498/440191948/-1250271359?refcode=em23_231125_eom1_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231125_eom1_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5a8a777d-bc8b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YThhNzc3ZC1iYzhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jly4UvjRtcypglViwByk2ga04SKi-pDjiwV05K7_kcI=)**

body:
Toplines inside

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73957152/440193773/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=231125_team_issue_response&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzI1OWQzMS1iZDhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBDujszRkkCRNZ19u7SEssJniS14f8nDXfk_InhgESk=)
---
Hi friend, Recently, we sent out an email asking our supporters to share the issues that matter most to them and their families — and we were blown away by the responses. Here are just a few of them:
* We heard from Ohioans concerned about wages and working conditions, and their ability to retire with dignity.
* We heard about the high cost of housing, healthcare and prescription drugs.
* We heard from constituents concerned about GOP attacks on voting rights, civil rights, and reproductive rights.
* We heard about the urgent need to stop climate change and protect our Great Lakes environment.

Our campaign represents the people of Northern Ohio, friend — _**not**_ the big-money special interest groups. Your concerns will shape our priorities in 2024 and beyond. We're so grateful to everyone who shared their opinions. **[If you're ready to fight for these issues, join us! Marcy is going to bat every day for Ohio communities and for working people across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73957153/440193774/1037629634?refcode=231125_team_issue_response_11&ms=231125_team_issue_response&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzI1OWQzMS1iZDhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBDujszRkkCRNZ19u7SEssJniS14f8nDXfk_InhgESk=)** **[Support our campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73957154/440193775/1037629634?refcode=231125_team_issue_response_b1&ms=231125_team_issue_response&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzI1OWQzMS1iZDhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBDujszRkkCRNZ19u7SEssJniS14f8nDXfk_InhgESk=)** **[Give monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73957155/440193776/1037629634?recurring=true&refcode=231125_team_issue_response_b2&ms=231125_team_issue_response&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzI1OWQzMS1iZDhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lBDujszRkkCRNZ19u7SEssJniS14f8nDXfk_InhgESk=)** Thank you for always having Marcy's back. \- Team Kaptur

clean_body: Toplines inside | | = Hi friend, Recently, we sent out an email asking our supporters to share the issues that matter most to them and their families — and we were blown away by the responses. Here are just a few of them: We heard from Ohioans concerned about wages and working conditions, and their ability to retire with dignity. We heard about the high cost of housing, healthcare and prescription drugs. We heard from constituents concerned about GOP attacks on voting rights, civil rights, and reproductive rights. We heard about the urgent need to stop climate change and protect our Great Lakes environment. Our campaign represents the people of Northern Ohio, friend — not the big-money special interest groups. Your concerns will shape our priorities in 2024 and beyond. We're so grateful to everyone who shared their opinions. = = = Thank you for always having Marcy's back. \- Team Kaptur | Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. name: DC Daily Journal
subject: HGH, without a prescription?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Hi,

I'm
medical scientist Clint Winters.

In the
world of anti-aging, there is nothing more powerful or
controversial than HGH.

It has
the reputation of "freezing age" for anyone that uses it.

... And
now you can access it without expensive doctors or prescriptions.

No - I'm
not giving you "illegal" information.

Here is
how HGH is now 100% legal and available in All 50 States

In a
nutshell, after 5 years of intense study, there is now a
naturally extracted form of IGF 1 (the conversion of HGH) that
does not require a script to buy or use.

... And
it is already rapidly changing lives

In fact,
it costs 90% less than traditional HGH treatments, making it
affordable for anyone over 50 years old looking to get an edge on
life.

But don't
let the pricing fool you, this is a very powerful compound that
has yielded stunning results for those over 40.

Since
2019, it has been privately tested on over 15,000 aging
Americans, many looking years (or even decades younger) in 30
days.

Heck, it
has even personally changed my life.

After 41,
this powerful compound has allowed me to virtually age backwards.

Results
so powerful it is still very much banned in tested sports.

As you
may recall, this breakthrough is why Vijay Singh, Tiger Woods and
Ray Lewis were all under fire due to their superhuman ability to
heal and defy age.

Here is a
private page explaining exactly how it works

Point
blank, this is a major "unfair advantage" for anyone over 40
years old.

This is a
scientifically proven chance to look and feel years younger.

All you
have to do is read this report (I break it all down)

Here is
one last thing to keep in mind...

This
natural solution faces a very real threat.

Big
Pharma wants this "buried and gone".

This
innovation is projected to cost their HGH clinics billions of
dollars.

The link
above will explain everything...

Clint
Winters, Medical Scientist

P.S. I
must warn you again, do not use this if you are a tested athlete,
you could test positive for a performance enhancer.

This ad is sent
on behalf of GDR Labs.

1360
Union Hill Rd, Alpharetta, GA, 30004.

If you
would like to unsubscribe from receiving offers from us, please
click here.

DCDailyJournal.com

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

Reserved.

name: Mike Rogers
subject: Enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
I couldn't bear to watch any longer| | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=09d3e3d5c58f4f9da6e2ea611eb3d8b2&_e=c8sR6kjsD8G0bS_ZgWuGS-nPiJTtDuf8C2LjytXmHWot0khl6Zxm1zL3-MNpLXOv0yN-ST9A7Q4XpHwb8vJa7fiIqLph5ckTX9JDL-oKcLtRxVhNEGJlxGgSIBM_Xi7ozuZmJliO1Jj5aRbSl7ubivcvI_XVzgzXVUTnyHkgdA62WwzBNreljQuV242apvy2U5ViAj4coY0Hz3Fdsx7aiKuVOA-o-sLEPNEd5_YbalD3cW7393Rz8l0PhxEc3OaFkUX0lZBRbs5J5t_NK47fz_Uw0BhZiOPMgXiIDbh5iTno2xJeL-rRBdzO_rFIdR4_6alVm2cgBVaw43NaOg8fwhLS6OM5JH6K6FMGHPnuShprizx4zH27yXKulhHJt0rg8PgVTLx9ZWAxzD5K00AmOw%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Integrity isn’t a dirty word. But some politicians certainly act like it is. My name is Mike Rogers. I’m a former FBI Special Agent, businessman, and Army veteran. 10 years ago, I decided to leave Congress and focus on my family... But since then Washington D.C. has gone down hill. Corruption is on the rise, and integrity is on the decline. After many prayerful conversations with my friends, family, and God I decided that it was time to rededicate my life to serving my country. **[That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Michigan.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=09d3e3d5c58f4f9da6e2ea611eb3d8b2&_e=c8sR6kjsD8G0bS_ZgWuGS-nPiJTtDuf8C2LjytXmHWot0khl6Zxm1zL3-MNpLXOv0yN-ST9A7Q4XpHwb8vJa7fiIqLph5ckTX9JDL-oKcLtRxVhNEGJlxGgSIBM_Xi7ozuZmJliO1Jj5aRbSl7ubivcvI_XVzgzXVUTnyHkgdA62WwzBNreljQuV242apvy2U5ViAj4coY0Hz3Fdsx7aiKuVOA-o-sLEPNEd5_YbalD3cW7393Rz8l0PhxEc3OaFRRyoCw7Kdh8jywSs2keuMKZNNtYeD7VI0p-aVKnWWVdF9CDpor5Qb_uG2xRRoDlnst4zFozc4qdLYYq2lizANPpbwbMxAO2fUE9O20Ns1FLdK71n4ixDd9l3wlrFEgbfCvx47XXzMOcku3VB9BRdgA%3D%3D)** To say that Washington has problems is the understatement of the century. Politicians who don’t care about their constituents, policies that have given us crushing inflation and open borders, and a complete lack of accountability for anyone involved have led me to say **[ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=09d3e3d5c58f4f9da6e2ea611eb3d8b2&_e=c8sR6kjsD8G0bS_ZgWuGS-nPiJTtDuf8C2LjytXmHWot0khl6Zxm1zL3-MNpLXOv0yN-ST9A7Q4XpHwb8vJa7fiIqLph5ckTX9JDL-oKcLtRxVhNEGJlxGgSIBM_Xi7ozuZmJliO1Jj5aRbSl7ubivcvI_XVzgzXVUTnyHkgdA62WwzBNreljQuV242apvy2U5ViAj4coY0Hz3Fdsx7aiKuVOA-o-sLEPNEd5_YbalD3cW7393Rz8l0PhxEc3OaFtX1xuId74ZY4Xx3TdRUDvjb72P1LIKlAsdyN8uayQ1iu-t9_pxZHRmb4vJEDJXU4jaVdw7S-WmdpmQAFkOzJvWBzMFJK_gKGrdi7VuygjJ5lEIF1V4dta6RFkbN1wIWNX7yRa7QSsdiPk3pI-j8weQ%3D%3D)** In 2024, we have the chance to end corruption, restore integrity, secure our borders, and stop reckless spending. But none of that's possible unless we deliver a decisive win in my home state of Michigan. You know it as well as I do. Michigan was the swing state that delivered President Trump’s victory in 2016. And in 2020, Michigan helped to deliver a majority for Senate Democrats. Now, in 2024... **_[If we win Michigan’s Senate race Republicans will hold the reigns again.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=09d3e3d5c58f4f9da6e2ea611eb3d8b2&_e=c8sR6kjsD8G0bS_ZgWuGS-nPiJTtDuf8C2LjytXmHWot0khl6Zxm1zL3-MNpLXOv0yN-ST9A7Q4XpHwb8vJa7fiIqLph5ckTX9JDL-oKcLtRxVhNEGJlxGgSIBM_Xi7ozuZmJliO1Jj5aRbSl7ubivcvI_XVzgzXVUTnyHkgdA62WwzBNreljQuV242apvy2U5ViAj4coY0Hz3Fdsx7aiKuVOA-o-sLEPNEd5_YbalD3cW7393Rz8l0PhxEc3OaFRNHskkEWrpsrBOwW6gg9s1rGGMWydlwXpq1jnKOAESHZP5JcNLCYEmLxdnq6tGE7xZkqs0HU3L1GhlLfx0-xeLMKtrvkD0nfClthSvjmkUjitSN3hSw7dJqb05GbOlMF4ZStPX5vYC3_OjhibsAGyA%3D%3D)_** Friend, Michigan is the ONLY competitive seat in the country without an incumbent in the race. That means we have all the ingredients necessary to pull off a major victory. But only if we have the support of patriots like you. I’m running for U.S. Senate to RESTORE INTEGRITY to Washington D.C. and deliver a decisive blow to the radical left’s agenda. **[Can I count on your support to help me do just that?](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=09d3e3d5c58f4f9da6e2ea611eb3d8b2&_e=c8sR6kjsD8G0bS_ZgWuGS-nPiJTtDuf8C2LjytXmHWot0khl6Zxm1zL3-MNpLXOv0yN-ST9A7Q4XpHwb8vJa7fiIqLph5ckTX9JDL-oKcLtRxVhNEGJlxGgSIBM_Xi7ozuZmJliO1Jj5aRbSl7ubivcvI_XVzgzXVUTnyHkgdA62WwzBNreljQuV242apvy2U5ViAj4coY0Hz3Fdsx7aiKuVOA-o-sLEPNEd5_YbalD3cW7393Rz8l0PhxEc3OaFQ6xcA5ReEBxynr6Hp4PKxzTb2DULGr6kUZmjRfck89NKwNvbZuUbbTE4Hv6HQtLxJP9enlGwfQzQjvI5fUNyoy8XfaeiE3tPiQPaAh5UXS6vEwblCTl8wm5CXiJ0TzoRruIE1OEcPI1ZGmu0vQreDA%3D%3D)** I’ll be straight with you — this campaign is going to be expensive and it’s going to take EVERYONE pitching in to win. Truly, thank you for your consideration. _**[I hope I can count on you, Friend.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=09d3e3d5c58f4f9da6e2ea611eb3d8b2&_e=c8sR6kjsD8G0bS_ZgWuGS-nPiJTtDuf8C2LjytXmHWot0khl6Zxm1zL3-MNpLXOv0yN-ST9A7Q4XpHwb8vJa7fiIqLph5ckTX9JDL-oKcLtRxVhNEGJlxGgSIBM_Xi7ozuZmJliO1Jj5aRbSl7ubivcvI_XVzgzXVUTnyHkgdA62WwzBNreljQuV242apvy2U5ViAj4coY0Hz3Fdsx7aiKuVOA-o-sLEPNEd5_YbalD3cW7393Rz8l0PhxEc3OaFxLW2tOWbLTCQ3wFqBTrkIFoheiHD4HtpssyrHvSU1e3fbyXnp7MLcckIh51Q3EbLN-_ZrSaDmExJY3pSshTmX6ff0a4SHrHYG4AsR8MiReXbsG0NYbeqCkJ7gF3Bw0ecDIsCQSleFgyGV06pKW1xqQ%3D%3D)**_ Sincerely,

clean_body: I couldn't bear to watch any longer| | | Friend, Integrity isn’t a dirty word. But some politicians certainly act like it is. My name is Mike Rogers. I’m a former FBI Special Agent, businessman, and Army veteran. 10 years ago, I decided to leave Congress and focus on my family... But since then Washington D.C. has gone down hill. Corruption is on the rise, and integrity is on the decline. After many prayerful conversations with my friends, family, and God I decided that it was time to rededicate my life to serving my country. To say that Washington has problems is the understatement of the century. Politicians who don’t care about their constituents, policies that have given us crushing inflation and open borders, and a complete lack of accountability for anyone involved have led me to say In 2024, we have the chance to end corruption, restore integrity, secure our borders, and stop reckless spending. But none of that's possible unless we deliver a decisive win in my home state of Michigan. You know it as well as I do. Michigan was the swing state that delivered President Trump’s victory in 2016. And in 2020, Michigan helped to deliver a majority for Senate Democrats. Now, in 2024... Friend, Michigan is the ONLY competitive seat in the country without an incumbent in the race. That means we have all the ingredients necessary to pull off a major victory. But only if we have the support of patriots like you. I’m running for U.S. Senate to RESTORE INTEGRITY to Washington D.C. and deliver a decisive blow to the radical left’s agenda. I’ll be straight with you — this campaign is going to be expensive and it’s going to take EVERYONE pitching in to win. Truly, thank you for your consideration. Sincerely, Mike Rogers Paid for by Rogers for Senate.

name: Michael B. Moore
subject: Can you read these 5 sentences?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael B
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73958045/440196115/-251759529?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTNiMWFjNDctYmY4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=APqTOyHt7cmTiWeqeQYFduo_l_s_N8DkxCjE5uO-BNk=) | Peter,

I'm going to tell you why we need to defeat Nancy Mace in five sentences and I hope by the end, you'll feel inspired to chip in to our $15,000 end-of-month goal.

Look, we need to be honest with ourselves: **taking on the Republican fundraising machine won't be easy, and certainly won't come cheap.**

But, I believe in the Lowcountry and the people who live here – and they deserve representation that puts their voices first.

**[If you've been waiting for the perfect day to chip in, today is that day given the size of the goal we have in front of us. Hey there — I wanted to show you this. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73958114/440196358/-779099450?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGViMWFjNDctYmY4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KmZhIduXUYunns9XACJD2gCQAB1c7Mlui8KVkd7-jZI=) Yup, that’s me, back in 2016 as a senior alongside my sister who was a freshman at the time at Arizona State. We’d just finished Echo from the Buttes, a tradition that spans over 80 years to paint the iconic Tempe “A” white to signify the start of the school year. We even spent a night or two in the crisp November air protecting the “A” from those pesky wildcats. Ever since I was a kid, I always knew that I wanted to be a Sun Devil. But before I dive in too far, I have to let you know: I was meeting with Justin from Senator Kelly's team and we decided to make a friendly wager to see who can help us raise $5,000 online before this afternoon's kick off — my fellow Sun Devils or Justin's fellow Wildcats. [**Can I count on you to step up and pitch in $6.08 or more right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73958115/440196359/-779099450?amount=6.08&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGViMWFjNDctYmY4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KmZhIduXUYunns9XACJD2gCQAB1c7Mlui8KVkd7-jZI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $6.08](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73958116/440196360/-779099450?express_lane=true&amount=6.08&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGViMWFjNDctYmY4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KmZhIduXUYunns9XACJD2gCQAB1c7Mlui8KVkd7-jZI=)

Some of my earliest, and most cherished memories are in Sun Devil Stadium. My family has proudly attended every single ASU home game for decades. I’ll never forget sitting in the front row for a Territorial Cup game (or the UofA fans that made it a memorable experience for a 10-year old.)
It wasn’t a huge surprise to my folks when I decided to attend ASU — and I wouldn’t change my experience for anything. I even got to be a campus tour guide, where I’d walk backwards showing aspiring freshmen around the campus that I loved so much (with my forks of course, because pointing is rude.)
Now, as an alum, I get to help mobilize voters at my alma mater and support the next generation of Young Dems as they work to make history in our state.
[**So before kickoff, will you help us raise $5,000 and beat the team down south today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73958119/440196363/-779099450?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231125_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGViMWFjNDctYmY4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KmZhIduXUYunns9XACJD2gCQAB1c7Mlui8KVkd7-jZI=)
