We’d just finished Echo from the Buttes, a tradition that spans over 80 years to paint the iconic Tempe “A” white to signify the start of the school year. We even spent a night or two in the crisp November air protecting the “A” from those pesky wildcats. Ever since I was a kid, I always knew that I wanted to be a Sun Devil. But before I dive in too far, I have to let you know: I was meeting with Justin from Senator Kelly's team and we decided to make a friendly wager to see who can help us raise $5,000 online before this afternoon's kick off — my fellow Sun Devils or Justin's fellow Wildcats. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Some of my earliest, and most cherished memories are in Sun Devil Stadium. My family has proudly attended every single ASU home game for decades. I’ll never forget sitting in the front row for a Territorial Cup game (or the UofA fans that made it a memorable experience for a 10-year old.) It wasn’t a huge surprise to my folks when I decided to attend ASU — and I wouldn’t change my experience for anything. I even got to be a campus tour guide, where I’d walk backwards showing aspiring freshmen around the campus that I loved so much (with my forks of course, because pointing is rude.) Now, as an alum, I get to help mobilize voters at my alma mater and support the next generation of Young Dems as they work to make history in our state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thanks— and onward to victory! 🔱Morgan Dick, = Executive Director, Arizona Democratic Party Arizona State University, 2017 Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | Paid for by Arizona Democrats

subject: Reproductive rights must be federally protected
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73958502/440197589/1436736915?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ0YTVmYWYtYzA4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a5Amaw6Mi8btTpWZTF-Tax_mUr_uD4r5FCgVRWdqO0U=)
Peter,

Earlier this month I was proud to host a Reproductive Rights Tele-Town Hall with Assemblywoman Cottie Petrie-Norris.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73958505/440197592/1436736915?refcode=em-11.25.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ0YTVmYWYtYzA4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a5Amaw6Mi8btTpWZTF-Tax_mUr_uD4r5FCgVRWdqO0U=)
During our virtual town hall where we took calls from participants, I made it clear that we must keep CA-47 blue to enact federal protections for reproductive rights. This is one of my top priorities.

**Choice is not merely a “woman’s issue.” Reproductive rights and abortion access affect us all -- they are economic and equity imperatives.**

I am concerned with the onslaught of attacks on reproductive rights by the Republican Party. Our GOP opponent, Scott Baugh, supports a nationwide abortion ban, with no exceptions.

The new Speaker of the House Mike Johnson feels similarly. **With the far-right reaches of the GOP prioritizing stripping reproductive freedoms away from all Americans, it is more important than ever to win the House majority and stop this madness in its tracks.**

**[Republicans and Democrats alike realize how important CA-47 is for the majority -- and I am determined to keep this seat blue for the sake of our reproductive rights. If you are with me, will you make a critical $3 donation toward our grassroots campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73958508/440197595/1436736915?refcode=em-11.25.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ0YTVmYWYtYzA4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a5Amaw6Mi8btTpWZTF-Tax_mUr_uD4r5FCgVRWdqO0U=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, Earlier this month I was proud to host a Reproductive Rights Tele-Town Hall with Assemblywoman Cottie Petrie-Norris. = During our virtual town hall where we took calls from participants, I made it clear that we must keep CA-47 blue to enact federal protections for reproductive rights. This is one of my top priorities. Choice is not merely a “woman’s issue.” Reproductive rights and abortion access affect us all -- they are economic and equity imperatives. I am concerned with the onslaught of attacks on reproductive rights by the Republican Party. Our GOP opponent, Scott Baugh, supports a nationwide abortion ban, with no exceptions. The new Speaker of the House Mike Johnson feels similarly. With the far-right reaches of the GOP prioritizing stripping reproductive freedoms away from all Americans, it is more important than ever to win the House majority and stop this madness in its tracks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** In unity, Joanna | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Joanna's campaign = To learn more about Joanna, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS Joanna Weiss for Congress PO Box 3122 Costa Mesa, CA 92628 United States

name: Tina Smith
subject: There’s more work to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The best way for us to keep making progress and achieving growth is by protecting (and expanding!) our Democratic Senate Majority. |
#
Hi there — I hope you had a joyful, restful Thanksgiving with loved ones. As we enter the holiday season, I’m incredibly grateful for the good health of my friends and family and the happy times that Archie and I have been able to spend with our children and grandchildren. I’m also beginning to reflect on this year — what we accomplished together. We’ve created new union jobs here in Minnesota and across the country. We’ve worked to rebuild old infrastructure and expand broadband access. We’ve fought inflation and lowered costs for hard-working families. But there’s more work to do, and I’m excited to roll up my sleeves and get to work. **The best way for us to keep making progress and achieving growth is by protecting (and expanding!) our Democratic Senate Majority.** **[Before our upcoming monthly fundraising deadline, would you consider chipping in a few dollars to my work to hold the Senate and keep achieving progress for hard-working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73958882/440198263/-1565639837?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20231125_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTkwMmQ2Mi1jMThiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e3Ta1WMrsbWftYBQ0D3bHSfVBZ_nbwfLQHABSpK7pEk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73958883/440198264/-1565639837?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_EOM_AC60_20231125_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTkwMmQ2Mi1jMThiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e3Ta1WMrsbWftYBQ0D3bHSfVBZ_nbwfLQHABSpK7pEk=)

subject: Dem-Run Cities Thrown Into Desperation As Migrant Influx Strains Winter Housing
body:
And Federal Debt Increased $2.45 Trillion Since Thanksgiving 2022 $7,304 For Every Person In US

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685613%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aN5yo7Fd%2f7t3ujoDExBrsA&sysid=1 Dem-Run Cities Thrown Into Desperation As Migrant Influx Strains Winter Housing

Several Democratic-led cities that have received migrants from the Southern border are concerned that they cannot house enough of them in the winter. Large cities in New York, Illinois and Massachusetts have received thousands of migrants from the Southern border since 2021, when migrant crossings began to surge and Republican-led states sought to transport them to Democratic-led cities.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73963575/440202704/-1899356716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmMxNjZiMS1jNThiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=33UZ9RxDw8oYOj21A92USHhQidk5KySJmNTzsb6hAVY=&emci=ed48055c-bd87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a2c166b1-c58b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25681160) Peter, you might know David as the progressive Congressman fighting for you in Washington. But here are a few more fun things you may not know:
1. When David was 11, his dad moved the family to start a working farm. From collecting eggs to cleaning chicken houses, David helped carry out all the work a farm requires.

2. David met his wife June at the Wharton School of Business while earning their MBAs.

3. While attending graduate school on student loans, David started his business Total Wine & More as employee number one. Now, the business has grown into more than 260 stores in over 28 states with 12,000 team members.

4. David lives in Potomac with his wife and two golden doodles, Hubert and Lyndon.

5. David loves ice cream and will often stop for a Dairy Queen or McDonald's soft-serve cone between campaign events.

[_**Here’s the deal: David isn’t a career politician. He’s committed to fighting for working families like the one he came from. And the best part of his job is hearing directly from folks like you. Is there anything you’d like to ask David?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73963578/440202708/-1899356716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmMxNjZiMS1jNThiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=33UZ9RxDw8oYOj21A92USHhQidk5KySJmNTzsb6hAVY=&emci=ed48055c-bd87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a2c166b1-c58b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25681160) | [ASK DAVID ANYTHING >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73963580/440202710/-1899356716?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmMxNjZiMS1jNThiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=33UZ9RxDw8oYOj21A92USHhQidk5KySJmNTzsb6hAVY=&emci=ed48055c-bd87-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=a2c166b1-c58b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=25681160)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Is this email correct?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It’s been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you’re not on Team Johnson yet. We’re emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=e79e415045944eb0a2cf9ae87907e82d&_t=QOpeAi2xngDILfAvkspft7-RSlhABQ_OSHNWPsYOkHhLBAzUOPh2d3hMjzppuMGrUDodZrst9O7uzeV-OucGQAbzt9_wNZeJEaA8VbApBKc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=e79e415045944eb0a2cf9ae87907e82d&_t=QOpeAi2xngDILfAvkspft7-RSlhABQ_OSHNWPsYOkHhLBAzUOPh2d3hMjzppuMGrUDodZrst9O7uzeV-OucGQAbzt9_wNZeJEaA8VbApBKc%3D)
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e79e415045944eb0a2cf9ae87907e82d&_e=ug8tKtYS4I_FZv9CR89590pYrNDchz0F47gpBG6DgasiLWsTZ8dfACEjAKQRpvxS_KGx9aLpURrEBEm_TZ7X_AVPKm3nCFUMj6srBIT1hpzI_1-gsOv2oZGftlZfo7I8-Ixh6OhiuUesodwGdwn5a_OFRAw3djKWYrL41BBWDCH1kZsIwB1dKAH6GY-VI62xFKqtnKftabpyxhwcxRlNEDJK6F4vF0jAsjsjVBOirfnPZ8XgJeXtmwSbY9z5SmM50yszO93D-siLUz5CBkFgEX_azPv0eOWPfVnjrKn-93KY10Jr0kQtjElUo_deWUJ4gHCVuHEPl3xU0YTJ1Lqw9de3VkfaLNNDMWWBW7EWCILaYaBu-TqcOZjbhyfh-iA1SkmSAc7us8EC264tA58yJis4rqVI0Eyj8VIwW6_Azj8%3D)
---
Fellow American -

I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well.

Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give.

[**I’m reaching out today because I want to make sure that my team has the appropriate email, phone number, and mailing address on file for you.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e79e415045944eb0a2cf9ae87907e82d&_e=ug8tKtYS4I_FZv9CR89590pYrNDchz0F47gpBG6DgasiLWsTZ8dfACEjAKQRpvxS_KGx9aLpURrEBEm_TZ7X_AVPKm3nCFUMj6srBIT1hpzI_1-gsOv2oZGftlZfo7I8-Ixh6OhiuUesodwGdwn5a_OFRAw3djKWYrL41BBWDCH1kZsIwB1dKAH6GY-VI62xFKqtnKftabpyxhwcxRlNEDJK6F4vF0jAsjsjVBOirfnPZ8XgJeXtmwSbY9z5SmM5qPkIyhz7JHKQDPXmTEJFakIc-HF82lFVT9yE2uWYW_HCY9Bsx2sdSEsy8_Gbcrp6TwcskhqbZkqlVAitQgLiq3LRg_KCC9SB0JwHjsul_VctRIUTebmznnD8ITekqpj853x0OedC7yc8Otc6_FrgKR3qjotAgXvy7UHVNeBRqjo%3D)
[** UPDATE OUR RECORDS **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=e79e415045944eb0a2cf9ae87907e82d&_e=ug8tKtYS4I_FZv9CR89590pYrNDchz0F47gpBG6DgasiLWsTZ8dfACEjAKQRpvxS_KGx9aLpURrEBEm_TZ7X_AVPKm3nCFUMj6srBIT1hpzI_1-gsOv2oZGftlZfo7I8-Ixh6OhiuUesodwGdwn5a_OFRAw3djKWYrL41BBWDCH1kZsIwB1dKAH6GY-VI62xFKqtnKftabpyxhwcxRlNEDJK6F4vF0jAsjsjVBOirfnPZ8XgJeXtmwSbY9z5SmM55XX639AoRRd9BBI29et0Ih9BjZ9pqQSvXIJXzycl1qRPxpQJOAEfQipnqc_KzKI2IJ-Dog7gYiBWsujwcEkb85cC1V_dboZhiuNMKl95qYG6CQbRDKmcOKOc2DtBHtJOOYBepof7N2NZPtNyLY2dSFgxdSv9d76-82TUBx-xiUk%3D)
Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. _But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed._

clean_body: It’s been a crazy couple of weeks, so I understand if you’re not on Team Johnson yet. We’re emailing today to make sure we have the information we need to contact you. | | Fellow American - I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well. Believe it or not, there wasn’t a manual left behind that I can reference in this new role. So, as you can imagine, we’ve been wasting no time settling in and figuring out how to best prioritize your interests and needs. The American people deserve nothing less than my best and that’s what I intend to give. Before my colleagues elected me the 56th Speaker of the House, our mailing list was mainly comprised of folks from the great state of Louisiana. But now as Speaker, every Republican in the country is a constituent of mine and I need to be able to know I can reach out as needed. Holding on to the House majority in next November’s election is going to be a tall order – I’ll be honest with you, before I was elected to lead the House a few weeks ago, I was relatively unknown nationally, meaning I probably didn’t have you on my mailing list. As we build out our campaign operation from the ground up, I am going to need every patriot to step forward. Friend,
Very reliable sources have informed me that Crooked Joe will be receiving massive lumps of coal in his stocking this Christmas.
Perhaps it’s because of his lies, his bribes, his attempts to imprison an innocent man for 1,000 years, or the great suffering he has caused America. (And our great coal miners whose jobs he’s threatened will gladly mine the coal for his stocking!)

Perhaps it’s because of his lies, his bribes, his attempts to imprison an innocent man for 1,000 years, or the great suffering he has caused America. (And our great coal miners whose jobs he’s threatened will gladly mine the coal for his stocking!) But these same reliable sources have said that a patriot like YOU should expect GREAT things this Christmas. You will of course need a stocking to receive your Christmas bounty. Reproductive rights AND democracy are under attack in Florida |

Hey Peter, we have an urgent update on reproductive rights in Florida: **Florida’s Attorney General is seeking to override the will of the voters by BLOCKING a proposed ballot measure to protect abortion — a measure that over 400,000 Floridians have said they want on next year’s ballot. ** The AG has said the proposed amendment is invalid, with no explanation as to why. The proposed amendment would ban laws that restrict abortion before viability or when necessary to protect the health of the mother — the absolute BARE MINIMUM in reproductive rights. **Republicans are scared.** They know that when reproductive rights are put to a vote, they will always lose. That’s why they have to pack the courts with conservative judges and count on them to restrict women’s bodies. [_**But we’re watching, and we’re ready to fight back. We will show Republicans that they’re on the wrong side of this issue, and they’re going to lose their seats over it. clean_body: Reproductive rights AND democracy are under attack in Florida | = Hey Peter, we have an urgent update on reproductive rights in Florida: Florida’s Attorney General is seeking to override the will of the voters by BLOCKING a proposed ballot measure to protect abortion — a measure that over 400,000 Floridians have said they want on next year’s ballot. The AG has said the proposed amendment is invalid, with no explanation as to why. The proposed amendment would ban laws that restrict abortion before viability or when necessary to protect the health of the mother — the absolute BARE MINIMUM in reproductive rights. Republicans are scared. They know that when reproductive rights are put to a vote, they will always lose. That’s why they have to pack the courts with conservative judges and count on them to restrict women’s bodies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for your support, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our identity as Americans. | | This is our average donation so far in November, Fellow American ⬇️ ⬇️ Since launching this campaign on February 21st, we've been overwhelmed by grassroots supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. Team Vivek is proving in each debate that we are here to stay and revolutionize the way our government works for its citizens. We are shaking up the status quo with each TRUTH we deliver on the campaign trail. Between attacks from rival candidates to attacks from the mainstream media – and even from the Establishment within our own party – we are here to stay. Your grassroots support scares them and, together, we are creating a wave of change that no other candidate is capable of ushering in. | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our identity as Americans. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly – not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. I will lead where the other candidates appear afraid to even venture but I need your help to amplify our message. Thank you for your support, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. As a Tucson native, I always knew I wanted to be a Wildcat just like my dad. In fact, one of my earliest memories is being 5 years old at a UofA basketball game with him and breaking away to chase down Cap’n Eegee for his signature.
When I first got to the UofA, I wasted no time getting involved on campus. I double majored in Political Science and Communications and I volunteered with the Transfer Student Association to help support other students transferring from community colleges just like I did.
I also helped organize a student club that helped queer students on campus find community and a safe space to thrive. And it was at the UofA that I first got involved with Democratic campaigns by interning for the 2012 Senate race.
I’ll always treasure my time on campus, and I’m proud to be using everything I learned during my time at the UofA to help mobilize and register students to vote on campuses across Arizona.

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Jay=20Lee?=
subject: Small Business Saturday
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a40cc37ec251/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12666517?e=91a702298f)
---
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=96e4b8af41&e=91a702298f)
|
---
Friend,
During this Small Business Saturday, I’ve been reflecting a lot of my own personal experiences as a plumber. It’s a profession that has taught me a lot about fixing problems and being able to take on difficult situations when no one else can. But my story is not too different from small business owners across the state who work every day to support their families and keep the lights on.
Small businesses are the backbone of Nevada, and whether it’s been fixing leaky pipes or fixing debt issues in North Las Vegas, my personal drive to solve problems and make a difference has not left me. Small business owners and employees deserve leadership in Washington that understands what they are going through. I understand what it means to be the first one to work and the last one to leave, and workers like these deserve all the respect and representation they can get.
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=cb7eaeaada&e=91a702298f)
On this Small Business Saturday, I am proud to reaffirm my commitment to the small business owners of Nevada, and let them know that they will have an unwavering ally in their corner when I become their next Congressman.
There’s never been a more urgent time to support small businesses, and this campaign is all about them.
| [VISIT MY WEBSITE >>](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=9e18ff8870&e=91a702298f)

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: just $1, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/CN5XpT6yK26vJ158OQSggQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnRNc-P0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTEyNV9lbV9mcl9iMV9kaXNjbG9zdXJlZm9sbG93dXBfZW4tcnMmY2RtYz0yWWNyMnk1Zk5zcVR1UlJKZTJtR2hMdDBzZmUmcmVmY29kZTI9MlljcjJ5NWZOc3FUdVJSSmUybUdoTHQwc2ZlJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJZY3IyeTVmTnNxVHVSUkplMm1HaEx0MHNmZVcDc3BjQgplXz5SYmVZdQSQUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) Hey Peter – I emailed you a couple of days ago about how Republicans were attacking me for trying to make ends meet and driving for Uber during my campaign. But I told you I have no shame, and I mean it. Republicans think that just because I’m not wealthy like other members of Congress, I shouldn’t have a seat at the table. But they’re so wrong. I’ll never stop fighting for those ignored by these out of touch politicians, but I need your support to keep me fighting in Washington in the face of these baseless attacks. **So today, I’m asking you for just $1.** **[**_Peter, I know the value of a dollar. When the results started coming in on Election Night last year, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes: **Lauren Boebert and her Democratic opponent Adam Frisch were in a TIED race!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73979477/440210935/1610638071?refcode=em20231125pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=1ab57810-ce8b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWI1NzgxMC1jZThiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xCStvJrlzkbvjVZmaN4XgFzq5U19pynsUnwb1Z80L8k=)

Adam is running against Boebert again – and although no one gave him a chance in 2022, every single political pundit now says that Adam absolutely _can_ defeat her in 2024.
Lauren Boebert’s Washington allies and her Super PACs are about to relentlessly attack Adam, but he’s not taking money from corporate PACs. **If Adam Frisch is going to counter their lies and finally kick Boebert out of Congress, he’s counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now to help us raise the last $150,000 we need to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal:**

clean_body: When the results started coming in on Election Night last year, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes: Lauren Boebert and her Democratic opponent Adam Frisch were in a TIED race! = Hello, When the results started coming in on Election Night last year, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes: Lauren Boebert and her Democratic opponent Adam Frisch were in a TIED race! = The race went to a recount, but ultimately, Adam Frisch lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. Adam is running against Boebert again – and although no one gave him a chance in 2022, every single political pundit now says that Adam absolutely can defeat her in 2024. Lauren Boebert’s Washington allies and her Super PACs are about to relentlessly attack Adam, but he’s not taking money from corporate PACs. If Adam Frisch is going to counter their lies and finally kick Boebert out of Congress, he’s counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now to help us raise the last $150,000 we need to hit our end-of-month fundraising goal: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = When Adam defeats Lauren Boebert on November 5, 2024, it will be because people like you stepped up now and gave what you could. On behalf of our district, our country, and our democracy – thank you. Team Frisch ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: FINAL PLEA: Sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Goal: 1,000,000 Signatures

| |

---
| | | Friend -

Last time the Democrats were in power, they fast-tracked an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use _your_ tax dollars to fund _their_ campaigns, make it harder for Republicans to win competitive races, and gut voter ID laws.

And if the Democrats win the next election, we know they will try it again.

We're racing against the clock to protect the integrity of the most important election of our lifetimes. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign The Petition: Stop brutal trophy hunting of innocent bear cubs
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2142948?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **BEARS NEED YOU:** As bear families are building their dens and getting ready to make it through the long winter ahead, **TROPHY HUNTERS** are loading up their guns and equipping themselves with bait, traps, and other deadly weapons to **_savagely ATTACK and MURDER_** innocent bears _who are already at their most vulnerable during hibernation season._ Barbaric hunting tactics are wiping out bear populations in mass numbers. Grizzlies, who once roamed the entire U.S., have **lost 98% of their historic range due** to _**_OVERHUNTING._**_ **[The grizzly bear population is rapidly declining, so please, Friend, act now to help save these beloved mammals from EXTINCTION. Add your name to DEMAND stronger protections for grizzly bears before it’s too late!>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2142949?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2142950?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The winter season is already a highly vulnerable time for bears -- which makes them the _**PERFECT EASY TARGET**_ for trophy hunters who will sneak up and **_MERCILESSLY ATTACK_** bear families hibernating in their dens or LURE them out with bait while these weakened bears are desperate for food.
Dens are used as a safe environment for hibernation where mama bears give birth and nurse tiny cubs until springtime. When the mama bear emerges from her den to nourish her frail body and build up enough strength to care for her cubs, hunters could be waiting to _**SHOOT and KILL her.**_ Waiting anxiously for mama bear’s return, her _**helpless newborn cubs will be ORPHANED**_ with _**no chance of survival on their own.**_
[**Without comprehensive Endangered Species Act protections, defenseless grizzly mamas and their cubs are in danger of being slaughtered by cruel trophy hunters. Hibernation season is rapidly approaching, Friend, and we’re running out of time to speak up for these precious bears. Can these treasured animals count on you to be their voice today?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2142951?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2142950?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for using your voice to protect grizzly bears,
Friends of the Earth**
|

clean_body: We have less than 4 months until the primary in March and things will only heat up after that. | | | Peter, in just 5 days we’ll be hitting the end of November. We need to be looking ahead because this isn’t just about the primary, it’s about defeating Monica De La Cruz, winning back the House, and bringing real leadership to TX-15. What happens here in Oregon has the ability to impact the entire country. Here’s why:

House Republicans only have a _five seat Majority_ , so they need to go all in on swing districts to ensure they can maintain and expand their Majority. And national Republican dark money groups have already signaled that we are a #1 target.

If they succeed in flipping OR-06 red and maintaining control of the House, it gives the extreme GOP another two years to pass as much extreme, far-right legislation as possible – including a national abortion ban.

**So when I say what happens here in Oregon has the power to impact every single person across America, I really mean it.**

That’s why I need your help.

[**If we all work together, I know we can keep Oregon blue and retake the House Majority. That’s why your $1 donation is so critical. So please, can I count on your support?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73983009/440215153/809151987?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.25_b1_as_all-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDE1NjZlOC1kYjhiLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XdhInCNFPYGKvzo08Venf911QBDUkvyuptlW6Nk8fXo=)

Thank you so much,

_Andrea_

I’m reaching out today with a somewhat surprising request: Will you chip in $1 – yes, only $1 – to my re-election campaign today? The path back to the House Majority runs through Oregon, and hinges on keeping OR-06 blue. Can I count on you to help do just that? = Hi friend – I hope you’ve had a wonderful and relaxing holiday weekend! I’m reaching out today with a somewhat surprising request:= | = What happens here in Oregon has the ability to impact the entire country. Here’s why: House Republicans only have a five seat Majority , so they need to go all in on swing districts to ensure they can maintain and expand their Majority. And national Republican dark money groups have already signaled that we are a #1 target. If they succeed in flipping OR-06 red and maintaining control of the House, it gives the extreme GOP another two years to pass as much extreme, far-right legislation as possible – including a national abortion ban. So when I say what happens here in Oregon has the power to impact every single person across America, I really mean it. | Peter—

Never in my wildest dreams did I expect to be the Republican Party’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. But if investigating Donald Trump for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**

If investigating and impeaching Donald Trump means Kevin McCarthy calling me a liar and kicking me off the Intelligence Committee, **so be it.**

And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me “shifty Schiff” or a “sleaze bag” for holding him to account again (and again, and _again_), **so be it.**

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. | | Patriot,

---
I’m emailing you from South Carolina where I’m attending the Palmetto Bowl to watch the Clemson Tigers face the South Carolina Gamecocks in their annual rivalry game that has its roots from all the way back in 1896!
---
You may recall a very famous photograph that will be preserved for centuries in world history books in which I welcomed the Clemson Tigers to the White House after they won the NCAA championship:

---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=4f902ef7c6eb4848a6aebb062ff88ca1&_e=wWSyIzlToYYKNjsHHBtv9PodTySN15-9ToJ8ZDfXpQCPSTle8021abQcI7jUE8ih2EYzJa67H6Qj7BKjBKQfHoxhlMXlsOtIVVPGNviXVZX7yIWqZ_aowMllcJnu7oHp5Lb_5IgRR56VSIAGc_mCrw4PLvE_mLWA637HlVm28zd73tMqo5kUwF0IPO7CTTE0E-u-3C8sjdbRYJ4GbjVNhpXyrTmtgz0ycLwB-0_bllUx5NvXDWReSFapflDBH7hXWpBw-EnXeWCk4T3wg43fA8bYfcFVOI16guwde7PhaD5XVtC-XdyuGbTjdje_2geDOob4_V9I0GrlKKfh4azcdvtCWHjz4qPbFlb_kVQTDgu1PrMTsZUGZf77r9RFzGCGgJsaUUFL530tXY-gmt-n42TtBIva1kDRJ-vWWjO2B-FtAJ1KCzmUfK6WUJsCehEg2rs_NpODPLAqEqY3dFbHg6tM4hYOqxsSxvFqrSrRiecbJ9sShXUMNMV8KbtaLTl6)
---
Those were great times, weren’t they? I can only imagine how much the food in that picture would cost today thanks to Crooked Joe’s inflation.

---
But do not fear – very soon, your favorite president will be back in the White House and we will fix this mess faster than you could ever imagine.

---
Until then, we need to wrap up the GOP primary ASAP so that we can focus all of our energy on firing the incompetent crook in the White House.

---
That’s why I checked the polling scoreboard this morning to see how we’re doing in the primary here in South Carolina. After all, this is the SECOND PRIMARY of 2024. Very important!

---
And you guessed right – we are WINNING.

---
One of the most recent polls shows that we officially have a clear majority. Not only that, we are beating a candidate who was once even the _governor_ of this state.

---
**[So, as I make my way to the stadium right now to enjoy the game with the hardworking patriots of our country, please consider making a contribution of even just $1 to wrap up the primary and help us return to better times when America was _winning_!](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=4f902ef7c6eb4848a6aebb062ff88ca1&_e=wWSyIzlToYYKNjsHHBtv9PodTySN15-9ToJ8ZDfXpQCPSTle8021abQcI7jUE8ih2EYzJa67H6Qj7BKjBKQfHoxhlMXlsOtIVVPGNviXVZX7yIWqZ_aowMllcJnu7oHp5Lb_5IgRR56VSIAGc_mCrw4PLvE_mLWA637HlVm28zd73tMqo5kUwF0IPO7CTTE0E-u-3C8sjdbRYJ4GbjVNhpXyrTmtgz0ycLwB-0_bllUx5NvXDWReSFapflDBH7hXWpBw-EnXeWCk4T3wg43fA8bYfcFVOI16guwde7PhaD5XVtC-XdyuGbTjdje_2geDOob4_V9I0GrlKKfh4azcdpgBOqf3DITOd4zLceVgFZ6JWVLMk5AYbyxIFOC2WmOUSLjI9yryQg9ZEp95lyFDUZ7q4xQdwAMefVm2NY1Gk6480itZRfRbmclxFXTiKYzp502QRGLVXweXYXiXBeV2rxGRcHoay8z23PwgAPA8zefCi0iDae9ACAgLHKKdHAkv)**

clean_body: —----------------------🏈—----------------------| | | | | Patriot, I’m emailing you from South Carolina where I’m attending the Palmetto Bowl to watch the Clemson Tigers face the South Carolina Gamecocks in their annual rivalry game that has its roots from all the way back in 1896! You may recall a very famous photograph that will be preserved for centuries in world history books in which I welcomed the Clemson Tigers to the White House after they won the NCAA championship: Those were great times, weren’t they? I can only imagine how much the food in that picture would cost today thanks to Crooked Joe’s inflation. But do not fear – very soon, your favorite president will be back in the White House and we will fix this mess faster than you could ever imagine. Until then, we need to wrap up the GOP primary ASAP so that we can focus all of our energy on firing the incompetent crook in the White House. That’s why I checked the polling scoreboard this morning to see how we’re doing in the primary here in South Carolina. After all, this is the SECOND PRIMARY of 2024. Very important! And you guessed right – we are WINNING. One of the most recent polls shows that we officially have a clear majority. Not only that, we are beating a candidate who was once even the governor of this state. | | THANK YOU, Donald J. Trump | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

**If you’re not convinced, let me tell you about Debbie’s story.** When she was 14, her family came to America from Ecuador in search of a better life. Debbie’s mom worked double shifts to afford rent for their one room apartment. When Debbie turned 15, she started working at the local doughnut shop to help make ends meet.
Because of their relentless hope and hard work, Debbie graduated college, helped expand health care access in her community, and eventually became the first South American immigrant elected to Congress.
_Friend, Debbie’s story of hope, perseverance, and opportunity is America’s story._
**Rick Scott, on the other hand, has spent his time in the Senate working to _destroy_ the opportunities that make the American dream possible. **
Now, with Scott’s approval rating tanking and the incredible energy behind Debbie’s campaign, we have an extraordinary opportunity to win Floridians the leadership that they deserve. _And if we defeat Scott, Democrats can expand our ultra-slim Senate majority._

clean_body: This is a major moment for Debbie’s campaign | | | = Friend, It’s Sen. Chuck Schumer — have you heard about what’s happening in Florida? My friend Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, a former Congresswoman and a gun safety advocate, has launched her campaign to defeat Sen. Rick Scott in Florida. And she’s about to hit her end-of-month deadline. This is a major moment for Debbie’s campaign. The latest polling already shows that this race is a statistical tie. With a huge outpouring of grassroots support tonight, Debbie has the opportunity to pull ahead in the polls. But if she falls short of her $150,000 end-of-month fundraising goal, Scott could take the lead. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = If you’re not convinced, let me tell you about Debbie’s story. When she was 14, her family came to America from Ecuador in search of a better life. Debbie’s mom worked double shifts to afford rent for their one room apartment. When Debbie turned 15, she started working at the local doughnut shop to help make ends meet. Because of their relentless hope and hard work, Debbie graduated college, helped expand health care access in her community, and eventually became the first South American immigrant elected to Congress. Friend, Debbie’s story of hope, perseverance, and opportunity is America’s story. Rick Scott, on the other hand, has spent his time in the Senate working to destroy the opportunities that make the American dream possible. Now, with Scott’s approval rating tanking and the incredible energy behind Debbie’s campaign, we have an extraordinary opportunity to win Floridians the leadership that they deserve. And if we defeat Scott, Democrats can expand our ultra-slim Senate majority. This race is winnable — but only if people like you believe in Debbie and invest in Florida.= | | = Thank you, Chuck Schumer | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Josh Harder
subject: school lunches
body:
This makes no sense.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73983760/440217727/1738685995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNmZWNhYmYtZTM4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ehXB0uxQ40V5rNBnAX7OEBWoPq26HR2Qo9I48XtAngw=) | Peter, Since it was just Thanksgiving, I’ve been doing (probably too much) thinking about food. And I thought it would be a good time to tell you about one of my bills I’m really passionate about. Here in California’s Central Valley, we grow some of the best produce in the world. Seriously, if you haven’t tried our fruit or nuts, you’re missing out. My team is obsessed with the fresh dates. And yet I recently learned about how our kids’ school lunches are full of unhealthy produce that is grown... in China! Why in the world are we not filling our kids’ cafeterias with healthy, locally grown produce? **It made no sense to me. That’s why I introduced the Kids Eat Local Act. The goal is very simple: make sure our kids have access to the freshest fruits, nuts, and vegetables while in school. It helps our kids, helps our farmers and helps our economy.** [_**If you agree this is a good idea, will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73983762/440217729/1364593346?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNmZWNhYmYtZTM4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ehXB0uxQ40V5rNBnAX7OEBWoPq26HR2Qo9I48XtAngw=&emci=b4fa60e2-7f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=fcfecabf-e38b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73983764/440217731/1364593346?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNmZWNhYmYtZTM4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ehXB0uxQ40V5rNBnAX7OEBWoPq26HR2Qo9I48XtAngw=&emci=b4fa60e2-7f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=fcfecabf-e38b-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=6455652) Sometimes legislating doesn’t need to be complicated - in fact sometimes it just means seeing a good idea and jumping at it. That’s what this bill is. Thanks for all your support, and I hope you’ll consider signing on as a citizen co-sponsor. \- Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Your early investment and support is critical so we can build the grassroots movement we need to win in 2024. Our race will be competitive and Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so please chip in now to our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73983767/440217733/1738685995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNmZWNhYmYtZTM4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ehXB0uxQ40V5rNBnAX7OEBWoPq26HR2Qo9I48XtAngw=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73983769/440217736/1738685995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNmZWNhYmYtZTM4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ehXB0uxQ40V5rNBnAX7OEBWoPq26HR2Qo9I48XtAngw=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73983770/440217739/1738685995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNmZWNhYmYtZTM4Yi1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ehXB0uxQ40V5rNBnAX7OEBWoPq26HR2Qo9I48XtAngw=) If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. The Fulton County District Attorney responsible for my world famous Mugshot has officially requested that my TRIAL BEGIN _3 MONTHS_ before Election Day 2024.

With your support, we will continue to soar to such incredible new highs that no matter what these left-wing radical tyrants throw our way, we will be UNSTOPPABLE - and on November 5, 2024, we will forever SAVE AMERICA from falling to the dark forces of tyranny. | Thank you, Donald J. Peter,

As an immigrant to America, I know firsthand how difficult it can be for working families to get by.

But I've also seen the incredible opportunities that are only possible in America — **and now, I'm running for Senate to safeguard those opportunities that self-serving politicians like my opponent, Rick Scott, want to destroy.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73984556/440220349/-113979641?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231125_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxNjU2ODc0LWVhOGItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KMHNNDaLItBXiIv3GAU0SzQD7NzFbnzBCXwO7270A2Q=)
[If you're ready to pitch in and help this team reach our critical $150,000 end-of-November goal, you can click here to split a gift between my campaign and Defeat Republicans](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73984557/440220350/-113979641?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231125_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxNjU2ODc0LWVhOGItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KMHNNDaLItBXiIv3GAU0SzQD7NzFbnzBCXwO7270A2Q=) —**but first, I hope you'll let me explain why I'm fighting to keep the American Dream alive.**
| **[DONATE NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73984558/440220352/-113979641?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231125_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxNjU2ODc0LWVhOGItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KMHNNDaLItBXiIv3GAU0SzQD7NzFbnzBCXwO7270A2Q=)**

My American Dream came true because my mother left our home in Ecuador and bravely brought my sisters and me to this country to give us a chance to build the future she dreamed of.

My American Dream came true because my mother worked day and night to afford rent in our one room apartment and provide us with a better education, a better home, and a better future.

My American Dream came true because I was able to go from working a minimum wage job to help my mom make ends meet to serving in Congress.

My American Dream came true because I had a strong community to lean on, opportunities to grow, and the right to live my life as I wanted.

**I'm fighting to protect those same opportunities, which are now out of reach for far too many working families.**

See, my opponent has made a career — and nearly a quarter-billion dollars — off trampling vital programs, dividing communities, and threatening the opportunities upon which American Dreams like mine were built.

With a massive fortune built through in-roads with corporate special interests, he's not beholden to hard working Americans.

**And that's why I'm running for Senate — _because Florida deserves better._**

I'm running so that everyone is equipped with the support they need to achieve their dreams. **And unlike my opponent, I'm relying on the help of this grassroots community to win in Florida and keep the American Dream alive.**

**But the only way I can do that is by hitting critical fundraising deadlines like the one coming up in less than 5 days** — [so if you're with me in the fight to make the American Dream come true for all of us, will you please rush $15 — split between my team and Defeat Republicans — before midnight to help me flip Florida's Senate seat blue?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73984561/440220353/-113979641?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231125_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxNjU2ODc0LWVhOGItZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KMHNNDaLItBXiIv3GAU0SzQD7NzFbnzBCXwO7270A2Q=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Two disasters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Matt Gaetz and Kevin McCarthy are two of the biggest disasters in Congress, and while they despise each other, they certainly agree on trying to stop me from reaching the Senate.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4566%2E5257348%2EGnf7YP)
Derek —
Two of the Republican members of Congress who go after me the most are Kevin McCarthy and Matt Gaetz — which is ironic, considering they can’t stand each other.
Kevin kicked me off the House Intel Committee two days before I announced my Senate campaign, and Matt introduced legislation to block me from receiving classified information that very day.
**Besides their loathing of me, it seems the only other thing that unites them is their desire to be Donald Trump’s favorite puppet in Congress.**
For months, Kevin McCarthy bent under pressure to Trump’s every demand, and he’s shown no signs of stopping. He recently doubled down on his support of the indicted, impeached former president in an interview with _CNN_.
Meanwhile, Matt Gaetz proudly stands next to Trump at *every* possible photo op.
While Kevin and Matt’s public feud continues to make headlines as they throw elbows and ethics complaints each other’s way, I’m focused on winning our campaign for U.S. Senate to hold their fearless leader, Donald Trump, to account.
**[Matt Gaetz and Kevin McCarthy are two of the biggest disasters in Congress, and while they despise each other, they certainly agree on trying to stop me from reaching the Senate. Please, chip in $3 to push back and help my campaign today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em_eom.8xjxgy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231125_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4566%2E5257348%2EGnf7YP)**

the Supreme Court could DESTROY Social Security

**_BREAKING NEWS:_ The Supreme Court heard a case that could END Social Security! **
Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. **And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.**
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — _that's 1 in every 5 Americans!_
Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. **But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. **
These extremists have already made it clear that they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.**We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us:**
**Should the Supreme Court Protect Social Security?**
